Method: 提出UniSD统一框架，集成五大互补机制：1) 多教师一致性（multi-teacher agreement）提高监督可靠性；2) EMA教师稳定化（EMA teacher stabilization）；3) token级对比学习（token-level contrastive learning）；4) 特征匹配（feature matching）；5) 发散裁剪（divergence clipping）。在此基础上构建集成管道UniSDfull。

Result: 在6个基准、3个模型家族的6个模型上验证，UniSDfull在基础模型上提升+5.4分，在最强基线上提升+2.8分，全面超越现有方法。

Conclusion: 自蒸馏是一种实用且可控的高效LLM适配方法，无需依赖更强的外部教师模型；通过合理组合互补机制可显著提升性能。

Abstract: Self-distillation (SD) offers a promising path for adapting large language models (LLMs) without relying on stronger external teachers. However, SD in autoregressive LLMs remains challenging because self-generated trajectories are free-form, correctness is task-dependent, and plausible rationales can still provide unstable or unreliable supervision. Existing methods mainly examine isolated design choices, leaving their effectiveness, roles, and interactions unclear. In this paper, we propose UniSD, a unified framework to systematically study self-distillation. UniSD integrates complementary mechanisms that address supervision reliability, representation alignment, and training stability, including multi-teacher agreement, EMA teacher stabilization, token-level contrastive learning, feature matching, and divergence clipping. Across six benchmarks and six models from three model families, UniSD reveals when self-distillation improves over static imitation, which components drive the gains, and how these components interact across tasks. Guided by these insights, we construct UniSDfull, an integrated pipeline that combines complementary components and achieves the strongest overall performance, improving over the base model by +5.4 points and the strongest baseline by +2.8 points. Extensive evaluation highlights self-distillation as a practical and steerable approach for efficient LLM adaptation without stronger external teachers.

</details>


### [183] [Algospeak, Hiding in the Open: The Trade-off Between Legible Meaning and Detection Avoidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06619)
*Jan Fillies,Ronald E. Robertson,Jeffrey Hancock*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可复现的框架来研究Algospeak（算法黑话）中语言规避策略与检测器之间的共演化关系，引入"多数可理解调制"（MUM）概念，并通过COVID-19虚假信息数据集和七种语言模型验证了可理解性与检测规避之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM日益主导内容生成与审核，Algospeak策略促使规避者与检测器之间的共演化加剧，但缺乏对该动态的正式建模和量化分析框架。

Method: 基于联合行动模型形式化Algospeak动力学，提出MUM概念；基于已有分类法构建700条七种策略、五级调制的COVID-19虚假信息数据集；用七种语言模型进行意义恢复（可理解性）和虚假信息检测（规避性）双评估，通过曲线拟合估算MUM阈值。

Result: 揭示了调制水平与可理解性之间的特征关系，成功估计了MUM阈值，并实现了跨策略和跨模型的敏感性分析。

Conclusion: 该研究为理解Algospeak的动态机制奠定了基础，提供了可复现的框架、数据集和实验设置，有助于平衡内容审核中的检测效果与受众理解。

Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) increasingly mediate both content generation and moderation, linguistic evasion strategies known as Algospeak have intensified the coevolution between evaders and detectors. This research formalizes the underlying dynamics grounded in a joint action model: when Algospeak increases, detectability and understandability decrease. Further, the concept of Majority Understandable Modulation (MUM) is introduced and defined as the modulation level at which additional evasive alteration increases detector evasion but loses comprehension for the majority of recipients. To empirically probe this trade-off, we introduce a reproducible framework that can be used to create meaning-preserving, Algospeak-style variants, based on an existing taxonomy and with tunable modulation levels. Using COVID-19 disinformation as a first proof-by-example setting, we construct a reference dataset of 700 modulated items, drawn from twenty base sentences across five modulation levels and seven strategies. We then run two linked evaluations with seven different language models: one testing for interpretation through meaning recovery and one for disinformation detection through classification. Curve fitting over modulation levels yields an estimate of the Majority Understandable Modulation threshold and enables sensitivity analyses across strategies and models, see Figure 1. Results reveal the characteristic relationships between understandability and modulation. This study lays the groundwork for understanding the dynamics behind Algospeak and provides the framework, dataset, and experimental setups described.

</details>


### [184] [Parser agreement and disagreement in L2 Korean UD: Implications for human-in-the-loop annotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06625)
*Hakyung Sung,Gyu-Ho Shin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种简化的人机协作工作流程，通过两个领域自适应解析器的一致性来实现韩语二语形态句法标注，验证了解析器一致性可作为人工判断的有效代理，并分析了分歧的 linguistic 特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 韩语二语（L2）学习者的语料在形态句法上具有特殊性，传统人工标注成本高且主观性强，需要一种更高效的半自动标注方法。

Method: 采用两个领域自适应的解析器进行一致性判断，将解析器一致性结果与独立人工标注者的判断进行对比验证，并分析解析器分歧的具体语言学模式。

Result: 解析器一致性与人工判断之间存在强对应关系；分歧主要集中在语法关系区分和从句边界模糊等语言学可预测的领域；部分分歧可通过模型迭代解决，部分反映了深层表征挑战。

Conclusion: 解析器一致性可作为 L2 韩语 UD 标注的可行代理工具，半自动标注流程可行，但需注意深层语言学表征难题。

Abstract: We propose a simplified human-in-the-loop workflow for second language (L2) Korean morphosyntactic annotation by leveraging agreement between two domain-adapted parsers. We first evaluate whether parser agreement can serve as a proxy for annotation correctness by comparing it with independent human judgments. The results show strong correspondence between parser and human judgments, supporting the feasibility of semi-automatic L2-Korean UD annotation. Further analysis demonstrates that parser disagreements cluster in linguistically predictable domains such as grammatical-relation distinctions and clause-boundary ambiguity. While many disagreement cases are tractable for iterative model refinement, others reflect deeper representational challenges inherent in parsing and tagging L2-Korean corpora.

</details>


### [185] [Cited but Not Verified: Parsing and Evaluating Source Attribution in LLM Deep Research Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06635)
*Hailey Onweller,Elias Lumer,Austin Huber,Pia Ramchandani,Vamse Kumar Subbiah,Corey Feld*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出首个基于AST解析器的来源归因评估框架，从链接可用性、内容相关性和事实一致性三个维度系统评估LLM生成报告中的引用质量。对14个闭源和开源LLM的基准测试表明，最强模型链接有效性和内容相关性分别达94%和80%以上，但事实准确性仅39-77%；且随着检索深度增加，事实准确性平均下降约42%，揭示检索越多不一定带来更准确引用的关键问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM生成的深度研究报告中的引用无法被可靠验证。直接信任模型自引用存在偏见风险，RAG方法也无法验证来源的可访问性、相关性和事实一致性。因此需要构建一个系统化的引用评估框架。

Method: 提出基于可复现AST解析器的评估框架，从三个维度评估引用：(1) Link Works验证URL可访问性；(2) Relevant Content衡量主题对齐度；(3) Fact Check验证事实准确性。使用基于人类校准的LLM-as-a-judge评估器，对14个闭源和开源LLM进行基准测试，并进行消融实验分析研究深度影响。

Result: 最强模型链接有效性和相关性分别超94%和80%，但事实准确性仅39-77%；不到半数开源模型能一次性成功生成带引用的报告。消融实验表明，当工具调用从2次扩展到150次时，事实准确性平均下降约42%。

Conclusion: 表面引用质量与事实可靠性之间存在严重脱节，更多的检索并不能产生更准确引用。该框架为评估这一脱节提供了基础设施。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) power deep research agents that synthesize information from hundreds of web sources into cited reports, yet these citations cannot be reliably verified. Current approaches either trust models to self-cite accurately, risking bias, or employ retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) that does not validate source accessibility, relevance, or factual consistency. We introduce the first source attribution evaluation framework that uses a reproducible AST parser to extract and evaluate inline citations from LLM-generated Markdown reports at scale. Unlike methods that verify claims in isolation, our framework closes the loop by retrieving the actual cited content, enabling human or model evaluators to judge each citation against its source. Citations are evaluated along three dimensions. (1) Link Works verifies URL accessibility, (2) Relevant Content measures topical alignment, and (3) Fact Check validates factual accuracy against source content. We benchmark 14 closed-source and open-source LLMs across three evaluation dimensions using rubric-based LLM-as-a-judge evaluators calibrated through human review. Our results reveal that even the strongest frontier models maintain link validity above 94% and relevance above 80%, yet achieve only 39-77% factual accuracy, while fewer than half of open-source models successfully generate cited reports in a one-shot setting. Ablation studies on research depth show that Fact Check accuracy drops by approximately 42% on average across two frontier models as tool calls scale from 2 to 150, demonstrating that more retrieval does not produce more accurate citations. These findings reveal a critical disconnect between surface-level citation quality and factual reliability, and our framework provides the evaluation infrastructure to assess the disconnect.

</details>


### [186] [StraTA: Incentivizing Agentic Reinforcement Learning with Strategic Trajectory Abstraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06642)
*Xiangyuan Xue,Yifan Zhou,Zidong Wang,Shengji Tang,Philip Torr,Wanli Ouyang,Lei Bai,Zhenfei Yin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: StraTA是一个通过引入轨迹级策略来增强智能体强化学习（分层GRPO风格）的框架，在ALFWorld、WebShop和SciWorld上显著提升了样本效率和最终性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体大多是纯反应式的，在长程决策中探索和信用分配较弱，缺乏显式的轨迹级策略引导。

Method: 提出Strategic Trajectory Abstraction (StraTA)：从初始状态采样紧凑策略，基于该策略约束后续动作，采用分层GRPO风格的联合训练，并加入多样化策略展开和关键自我判断机制。

Result: ALFWorld上93.1%，WebShop上84.2%的成功率；SciWorld上63.5%的总体得分，超越了前沿闭源模型。

Conclusion: 引入显式的轨迹级策略能有效提升LLM智能体在长程决策任务中的表现，StraTA在样本效率和最终性能上均优于强基线。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as interactive agents, but optimizing them for long-horizon decision making remains difficult because current methods are largely purely reactive, which weakens both exploration and credit assignment over extended trajectories. In this work, we present Strategic Trajectory Abstraction (StraTA), a simple framework that introduces an explicit trajectory-level strategy into agentic reinforcement learning (RL). StraTA samples a compact strategy from the initial task state, conditions subsequent actions on that strategy, and trains strategy generation and action execution jointly with a hierarchical GRPO-style rollout design, further enhanced by diverse strategy rollout and critical self-judgment. Experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and SciWorld show that StraTA consistently improves both sample efficiency and final performance over strong baselines. StraTA reaches success rates of 93.1% on ALFWorld and 84.2% on WebShop. On SciWorld, StraTA attains a 63.5% overall score, outperforming frontier closed-source models.

</details>


### [187] [Beyond Negative Rollouts: Positive-Only Policy Optimization with Implicit Negative Gradients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06650)
*Mingwei Xu,Hao Fang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出POPO，一种仅利用正向轨迹进行强化学习的框架，无需负样本即可实现策略优化，在数学推理任务上达到或超越GRPO性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法（如GRPO）依赖正负分组轨迹进行优势估计，但负样本在稀疏二元奖励下难以提供有意义的梯度信号，且组合空间巨大导致采样效率低下。

Method: 1) 仅使用在线正向轨迹，通过有界重要性采样实现策略优化；2) 利用轨迹重分配机制，通过强化正向概率隐式产生负梯度；3) 引入连体策略网络与基于动量的自适应更新；4) 用表示空间中的有界相似性惩罚项替代KL散度。

Result: 在AIME 2025上，POPO（Qwen-Math-7B）达到36.67%，显著优于GRPO的30.00%；消融实验验证了各组件的必要性与鲁棒性。

Conclusion: POPO证明了仅依赖正向轨迹进行RLVR训练是可行且高效的，为LLM推理能力增强提供了新的范式。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), due to the deterministic verification, becomes a dominant paradigm for enhancing the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs). The community witnesses the rapid change from the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), in which GRPO reduces the complicated advantage estimation with simple estimation over grouped positive and negative rollouts. However, we note that negative rollouts may admit no gradation of failure severity, and the combinatorial vastness makes penalizing a few sampled negatives unlikely to cover a meaningful reward signal under sparse binary rewards. In this work, we propose Positive-Only Policy Optimization (POPO), a novel RLVR framework in which learning can occur exclusively via online positive rollouts. Specifically, POPO utilizes bounded importance sampling over the positive rollout set. Thus, no disjoint negative rollouts are used for the gradient guidance. We show that implicit negative gradients can emerge naturally through reinforcing the positive probability via rollouts redistribution. Next, POPO stabilizes the policy optimization through two mechanisms. First, it applies a siamese policy network with a momentum-based adaptation law for stabilized policy evolution. Second, we replace the KL-divergence with a bounded similarity penalty term in the siamese representation space. We conduct extensive experiments using publicly available, well-established text-LLM models, e.g., the Qwen family, across all-level mathematical benchmarks. Our experiment demonstrates that POPO achieves performance comparable to, or even superior to GRPO. Notably, we show that POPO can achieve 36.67% in AIME 2025 with Qwen-Math-7B, outperforming GRPO 30.00%. Our ablation and sweep studies further illustrate the necessity and robustness of POPO components.

</details>


### [188] [EMO: Pretraining Mixture of Experts for Emergent Modularity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06663)
*Ryan Wang,Akshita Bhagia,Sewon Min*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出EMO（专家混合模型），通过文档级共享专家池约束，使得MoE无需人为先验即可实现模块化，仅用25%专家即可保持接近完整模型性能，而标准MoE在此设置下性能严重下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型通常以整体系统部署，即使应用只需要模型的部分能力（如代码、数学等），也必须加载完整模型，导致内存浪费。标准MoE虽理论上可激活部分专家，但实际中限制专家子集会导致严重性能下降，限制了其在内存受限场景下的实用性。

Method: EMO的核心思想是鼓励相似领域的token选择相似的专家。具体做法是：同一文档内的token必须从一个共享的专家池中选择专家，不同文档可以使用不同的专家池。这种简单的约束仅利用文档边界，就能在预训练过程中自然形成语义级别的专家分组。

Result: 预训练了一个1B活跃参数、14B总参数的EMO模型（1T tokens）。作为完整模型，性能与标准MoE相当。关键在于支持选择性专家使用：仅保留25%专家时性能仅下降1%，保留12.5%专家时下降3%，而标准MoE在此设置下完全失效。专家子集呈现语义级别（如数学、代码领域）的专门化。

Conclusion: EMO展示了实现模块化、内存高效部署大规模稀疏模型的可行路径，为可组合架构开辟了新机会。

Abstract: Large language models are typically deployed as monolithic systems, requiring the full model even when applications need only a narrow subset of capabilities, e.g., code, math, or domain-specific knowledge. Mixture-of-Experts (MoEs) seemingly offer a potential alternative by activating only a subset of experts per input, but in practice, restricting inference to a subset of experts for a given domain leads to severe performance degradation. This limits their practicality in memory-constrained settings, especially as models grow larger and sparser. We introduce EMO, an MoE designed for modularity-the independent use and composition of expert subsets-without requiring human-defined priors. Our key idea is to encourage tokens from similar domains to rely on similar experts. Since tokens within a document often share a domain, EMO restricts them to select experts from a shared pool, while allowing different documents to use different pools. This simple constraint enables coherent expert groupings to emerge during pretraining using document boundaries alone. We pretrain a 1B-active, 14B-total EMO on 1T tokens. As a full model, it matches standard MoE performance. Crucially, it enables selective expert use: retaining only 25% (12.5%) of experts incurs just a 1% (3%) absolute drop, whereas standard MoEs break under the same setting. We further find that expert subsets in EMO specialize at semantic levels (e.g., domains such as math or code), in contrast to the low-level syntactic specialization observed in standard MoEs. Altogether, our results demonstrate a path toward modular, memory-efficient deployment of large, sparse models and open new opportunities for composable architectures.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [189] [DADL: A Declarative Description Language for Enterprise Tool Libraries in LLM Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05247)
*Axel Dunkel*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出DADL（Dunkel API描述语言），一种用YAML声明式描述REST API的格式，通过统一运行时替代传统每个API一个独立服务器的MCP模式，实现集中凭证管理、固定大小的Code Mode接口，将工具上下文物耗降低142倍（从14.2万降至约1000 token），并发布了包含1833个工具定义的公共注册库。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MCP协议在组织规模下存在两个结构性问题：1）每个API集成需要部署独立服务器进程，包含自己的依赖、凭证处理，而多数只是REST API的薄封装；2）逐工具注册模型导致上下文窗口消耗随工具目录线性增长，实际部署只能暴露组织实际使用API的一小部分。

Method: 提出DADL格式，用单一YAML文件声明REST API的端点、认证方式、分页、响应整形和访问分类；由运行时执行层在运行期解释执行，无需为每个API部署独立服务器或生成集成代码；所有工具共享同一运行时，实现集中凭证与授权管理；通过固定大小的Code Mode接口向LLM暴露工具目录，目录规模不影响上下文消耗。

Result: 发布了DADL v0.1规范（CC BY-SA 4.0），公共注册库包含20个服务的1833个工具定义。Code Mode将工具广告的上下文成本从约142,000 token降至约1,000 token，降低142倍。

Conclusion: DADL通过声明式描述和统一运行时，解决了MCP在组织规模下的部署复杂性和上下文窗口膨胀问题，实现了企业级工具库：版本化、可审计、跨团队共享、统一认证授权边界的API集成集合。

Abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is the standard interface between large language model (LLM) agents and external tools. At organizational scale, however, it exposes two structural problems. First, every API integration is shipped as a dedicated server process with its own deployment, dependency tree, and credential handling; recent empirical work shows the overwhelming majority of these servers are thin wrappers around REST APIs. Second, the per-tool registration model causes context window consumption to grow linearly with catalog size, forcing real deployments to expose only a small fraction of the APIs an organization actually uses.
  We present DADL (Dunkel API Description Language), a YAML format describing a REST API's endpoints, authentication, pagination, response shaping, and access classification in a single declarative file. A DADL file is interpreted by an execution layer at runtime; no per-API server process is deployed and no integration code is generated, though the runtime is itself a server. Because all tools share that runtime, credentials and authorization are managed centrally, and the catalog reaches the LLM through a fixed-size Code Mode interface independent of size. The result is an Enterprise Tool Library: a versioned, auditable collection of API integrations any team can extend, share, and consume through one authentication and authorization boundary.
  The DADL v0.1 specification is released under CC BY-SA 4.0, and a public registry contains 1,833 tool definitions across 20 services. On this catalog, Code Mode reduces the context cost of tool advertisement from approximately 142,000 tokens to approximately 1,000, a 142x reduction; the per-call cost of search and execute invocations is additional and depends on the task.

</details>


### [190] [Automated Population-Level Audit Assurance via AI-Based Document Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05252)
*Santosh Vasudevan,Velu Natarajan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于Snowflake Document AI的自动化审计交易测试框架，仅用约20个标注文档即可从非结构化PDF中提取数据，与权威数据集对账，实现全量级而非抽样级审计覆盖，并通过交互式仪表盘呈现结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统人工抽样审核非结构化PDF对账单的方式劳动密集、无法扩展至数百万级交易，亟需自动化方案实现大规模审计交易测试。

Method: 利用Snowflake Document AI，结合约20份标注语料进行小样本学习，从非结构化PDF中提取结构化数据，再与内部权威数据源进行自动化对账比对。

Result: 实现了从抽样测试到全量级（population-level）测试的转变，显著提升审计覆盖范围，支持持续审计（continuous assurance）目标。

Conclusion: AI驱动的文档智能与大数据分析框架可实现可扩展、近实时的风险识别，为现代审计提供持续保障能力。

Abstract: Audit transaction testing validates accuracy and completeness of customer-facing statements against internal systems of record. Traditional manual, sample-based review of unstructured PDF statements is labor-intensive and does not scale to millions of transactions. This paper presents an automated framework for large-scale audit transaction testing using AI-based document intelligence. The solution leverages Snowflake Document AI to extract structured data from unstructured PDF statements using a small labeled corpus (approximately 20 documents). Extracted data are reconciled against authoritative source-of-truth datasets to identify discrepancies at scale. Results are surfaced through interactive dashboards and automated reports. The framework enables population-level testing rather than sampling-based approaches, improving audit coverage and supporting continuous assurance objectives. Recent advances in document intelligence and analytics-driven audit frameworks enable scalable, near real-time risk identification and continuous assurance.

</details>


### [191] [PARNESS: A Paper Harness for End-to-End Automated Scientific Research with Dynamic Workflows, Full-Text Indexing, and Cross-Run Knowledge Accumulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05258)
*Yuchen Wang,Zhongzhi Luan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 现有自主研究系统（AI-Scientist等）框架僵化，PARNESS通过有向无环图内核、全文PDF解析、知识图谱索引和编码代理扩展四个设计，构建了首个结合声明式流水线、全文与代码索引及跨轮次知识的开源框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM自主研究系统存在五种刚性根源：(1)工作流动态且因学科而异；(2)构思受限于LLM上下文长度；(3)摘要视角遗漏论文正文；(4)论文到代码的链接被忽视；(5)缺乏跨轮次知识持久化工具。

Method: 四个设计点：(i) 四字段Agent契约的轻量DAG内核，解耦调度与领域语义；(ii) 全文PDF解析与文献库子系统，支持图表等类型化对象索引；(iii) 论文、想法、实验、代码的知识图谱索引，支持情景类型化检索；(iv) 小扩展面允许现代编码代理（Claude Code等）增删模块。

Result: PARNESS是首个结合声明式流水线、全文PDF与代码仓库索引、跨轮次知识的开源系统。

Conclusion: 通过灵活DAG编排、全文索引、知识图谱和代理扩展，PARNESS克服了现有框架的刚性局限，支持跨学科动态研究流程。

Abstract: Recent autonomous research systems -- AI-Scientist, PaperOrchestra, AutoSOTA, DeepResearch, InternAgent, ResearchAgent and others -- show LLM agents can ideate, run experiments and write papers, but each fixes a particular control-flow shape (linear pipeline, state machine, single-agent loop, or fixed-recipe skill pack) at the framework level. We argue this rigidity has five roots: (1) workflows are dynamic and discipline-specific (lab work, surveys, simulations, theory all loop differently); (2) ideation is bounded by LLM context and cross-domain ideation needs knowledge a single context cannot hold; (3) summary-only views miss the paper body, yet full-text access is uneven, so the cumulative corpus must do the work; (4) a paper's open-source repository is often the only complete specification of its experimental scheme, but the paper-to-code link is neglected; (5) no tool persists cross-run knowledge retrievably into a finite LLM context.
  We present PARNESS, an open-source framework built on four design moves. (i) A thin DAG kernel with a four-field Agent contract decouples scheduling from domain semantics, so any discipline's loop is expressible as user-editable YAML. (ii) A full-text PDF-parsing and literature-library subsystem indexes paper bodies, figures and tables as typed objects, with graceful abstract-only fall-back. (iii) A knowledge-graph index over papers, ideas, experiments and code repositories, with scenario-typed retrieval (similar / contradictory / cross-domain / counter-intuitive), surfaces a focused slice into each LLM call. (iv) A small extension surface lets any modern coding agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenCode) add or replace any module. To our knowledge PARNESS is the first open-source system combining declarative pipelines, full-PDF and code-repository indexing, and cross-run knowledge. Source: https://github.com/gtrhythm/PARNESS

</details>


### [192] [Bridging Generation and Training: A Systematic Review of Quality Issues in LLMs for Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05267)
*Kaifeng He,Xiaojun Zhang,Peiliang Cai,Mingwei Liu,Yanlin Wang,Chong Wang,Kaifeng Huang,Bihuan Chen,Xin Peng,Zibin Zheng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对114篇论文进行了系统文献综述，建立了训练数据质量问题与代码生成缺陷之间的因果关系框架，提出了统一分类法（9种生成代码问题维度、代码与非代码数据属性），总结了18种传播映射机制，并归纳了数据-模型-生成全生命周期的检测与缓解技术，揭示了从被动后过滤到主动数据治理的方法论转变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在代码生成任务中频繁产生有缺陷输出（逻辑错误到安全漏洞），现有研究多将其归因于模型层面限制，但实证表明根因在于训练语料库的缺陷。然而，训练数据质量问题与生成代码质量问题之间的具体关联机制尚缺乏系统映射，因此亟需建立统一的因果框架来理解这一传播链条。

Method: 采用系统文献综述方法，筛选并分析了114篇相关研究。首先构建了包含9个维度的生成代码质量问题分类法和包含代码属性与非代码属性的训练数据质量问题分类法；进而基于此分类法形式化了一个包含18种典型传播映射机制的因果框架；最后综合评述了数据、模型、生成三种生命周期阶段的检测与缓解技术。

Result: 建立了训练数据质量问题→生成代码质量问题的统一分类体系与因果映射框架（18种传播机制）；揭示了该领域正在发生的范式转变：从被动、启发式的生成后过滤转向主动的、以数据为中心的治理与闭环修复；识别出当前方法的局限性和开放挑战。

Conclusion: 未来可靠代码生成LLM的发展方向应聚焦于集成化的数据治理与持续评估机制，以从根本上解决数据质量问题向代码缺陷的传播问题。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) frequently generate defective outputs in code generation tasks, ranging from logical bugs to security vulnerabilities. While these generation failures are often treated as model-level limitations, empirical evidence increasingly traces their root causes to imperfections within the training corpora. Yet, the specific mechanisms linking training data quality issues to generated code quality issues remain largely unmapped. This paper presents a systematic literature review of 114 primary studies to investigate how training data quality issues propagate into code generation. We establish a unified taxonomy that categorizes generated code quality issues across nine dimensions and training data quality issues into code and non-code attributes. Based on this taxonomy, we formalize a causal framework detailing 18 typical propagation mapping mechanisms. Furthermore, we synthesize state-of-the-art detection and mitigation techniques across the data, model, and generation lifecycles. The reviewed literature reveals a clear methodological shift: quality assurance is transitioning from reactive, heuristic-based post-generation filtering toward proactive, data-centric governance and closed-loop repair. Finally, we identify open challenges and outline research directions for developing reliable LLMs for code through integrated data curation and continuous evaluation. Our repository is available at https://github.com/SYSUSELab/From-Data-to-Code.

</details>


### [193] [Mise en Place for Agentic Coding: Deliberate Preparation as Context Engineering Methodology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05400)
*Andrew Zigler*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出MEP（Mise en Place）三阶段准备方法——上下文基础构建、协作规范制定、任务分解，以解决AI编码代理因缺乏上下文而导致的系统性对齐问题。在黑客马拉松中，两小时的准备即可实现多代理并行开发全栈平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前"氛围编码"（vibe coding）模式优先追求实现速度，导致AI代理缺乏足够上下文，产生大量需要调试和重构的代码，消耗大量开发时间，形成系统性对齐问题。

Method: 借鉴烹饪中的Mise en Place概念，提出三阶段准备方法：(1) 上下文基础构建——将领域专长和隐性知识外化为结构化文档；(2) 协作规范制定——通过人机对话产生详细设计工件；(3) 任务分解——将规范转换为结构化的、依赖感知的任务记录。

Result: 在黑客马拉松中，大约两小时的MEP准备使得多个并发AI代理能够快速并行实现一个全栈教育平台。

Conclusion: 提出"上下文流畅度"（context fluency）作为新兴开发者技能，并将其与逆向设计、隐性知识外化等已有框架相联系。最后提出一个研究议程，以实证验证AI辅助软件开发中的准备阶段方法论。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of AI coding agents has produced a dominant workflow pattern -- often called "vibe coding" -- that prioritizes speed of implementation over deliberate preparation. We argue that this approach creates a systematic alignment problem: agents that lack sufficient context produce code requiring extensive debugging and refactoring, consuming substantial development time. Drawing on the culinary concept of mise en place (everything in its place; abbreviated MEP), we propose a three-phase preparation methodology for agentic coding: (1) contextual grounding, where domain expertise and tacit knowledge are externalized into structured documents; (2) collaborative specification, where human-agent dialogue produces detailed design artifacts; and (3) task decomposition, where specifications are converted into structured, dependency-aware task records. We report on the application of MEP during a competitive hackathon, where roughly two hours of preparation enabled a rapid parallel implementation of a full-stack educational platform by concurrent AI agents. We introduce the concept of context fluency as an emerging developer skill -- the ability to create rich, structured context that agents can act on -- and connect it to established frameworks in backward design and tacit knowledge externalization. We conclude with a research agenda for empirically validating preparation-phase methodologies in AI-assisted software development.

</details>


### [194] [Is this Build Failure Related to my Patch? An Empirical Study of Unrelated Build Failures in Continuous Integration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05564)
*Andie Huang,Daniel Alencar da Costa,Grant Dick,Mariam El Mezouar*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究CI系统中无关构建失败的识别问题，通过分析77,354个失败案例，发现开发者平均花费4小时判断失败相关性，并提出基于PU学习的预测模型，F1-score达0.44-0.91。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CI系统中并发构建常导致与当前代码推送无关的构建失败，开发者需花费大量时间排查此类失败是否为可执行问题，浪费开发效率。

Method: 分析7个Apache开源项目77,354个CI构建失败案例，对371个确认无关失败进行文档分析，提取33个特征（问题报告、评论、提交记录），构建半监督PU学习模型。

Result: PU模型在7个Apache项目上精度0.70-0.88，召回率0.30-1.00，F1-score 0.44-0.91，AUC 0.63-0.97。无关测试失败占20%，CI延迟、重复错误信息、前置评论数是最重要特征。

Conclusion: PU学习可有效帮助开发者识别与当前推送无关的构建失败，减少不必要的问题排查时间。

Abstract: Continuous Integration (CI) systems often run many builds concurrently. In this setting, a legitimate build failure may not be caused by the code push that triggered it. Such unrelated build failures can waste developer effort because developers must determine whether the failure is actionable for their current change. We study 77,354 CI build failures from seven open source Apache projects to understand and predict unrelated build failures. We find that developers spend a median of 4 hours identifying whether a failure is related or unrelated to their push. We also perform a document analysis of 371 confirmed unrelated build failures sampled from 10,316 potentially unrelated failures. The analysis shows that unrelated test failures account for 20% of the cases in which developers classify build failures as unrelated. To predict unrelated build failures, we extract 33 features from issue reports, issue comments, and commits associated with the triggering push. We build semi-supervised Positive and Unlabeled (PU) learning models for seven Apache projects. The models achieve precision from 0.70 to 0.88, recall from 0.30 to 1.00, F1-score from 0.44 to 0.91, and AUC from 0.63 to 0.97. Feature importance analysis shows that CI latency, repeated error messages, and the number of preceding comments are useful indicators of unrelated build failures. These results show that PU learning can help developers identify build failures that are unlikely to be caused by their current push.

</details>


### [195] [Operationalizing Ethics for AI Agents: How Developers Encode Values into Repository Context Files](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05584)
*Christoph Treude,Sebastian Baltes,Marc Cheong*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文探讨开发者如何通过AGENTS.md等仓库级上下文文件，将伦理原则（公平性、可访问性、可持续性、语气、隐私）编码为AI编码智能体的行为规则，提出研究这一新兴治理实践的议程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI编码智能体已嵌入软件开发流程，但抽象层面的AI伦理讨论缺乏对实践中如何将伦理原则转化为可操作指令的关注。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究开发者如何在真实工作流中为AI智能体制定行为规范。

Method: 通过初步调查（初步研究），分析开发者已在AGENTS.md等文件中嵌入的伦理相关指导内容，识别其中涉及的价值观类别，并提出研究议程。

Result: 发现开发者已在文件中嵌入涉及公平性、可访问性、可持续性、语气和隐私的指导；这些文件充当了开发者撰写的治理层，将抽象原则转化为具体自然语言指令。

Conclusion: 理解AI智能体的伦理实践化对于将AI治理扎根于现代软件工程实践至关重要；需进一步研究编码价值观的社区差异、多贡献者协商的治理动态，以及智能体对约束的遵循可靠性。

Abstract: As AI coding agents become embedded in software development workflows, developers are beginning to operationalize ethical principles by encoding behavioral rules into repository-level context files for AI agents, such as AGENTS.md files. Rather than examining the ethics of AI agents in the abstract, this vision paper investigates how ethics and values are already being translated for AI agents into actionable instructions that shape agent behavior. Through a preliminary investigation, we find that developers are already embedding guidance related to fairness, accessibility, sustainability, tone, and privacy. These artifacts function as a developer-authored governance layer, translating abstract principles into situated, natural-language directives within development workflows. We outline a research agenda for studying this emerging practice, including how encoded values vary across communities, what governance dynamics emerge when multiple contributors negotiate these files, and whether agents reliably adhere to the constraints specified. Understanding how ethics and values are operationalized for AI agents is essential to ground AI governance in modern software engineering practice.

</details>


### [196] [An Empirical Study of Proactive Coding Assistants in Real-World Software Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05700)
*Lehui Li,Ruixuan Jia,Guo-Ye Yang,Jia Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过大规模实证研究发现，基于LLM模拟的IDE开发者行为数据与真实数据存在显著差异，模拟数据会高估系统性能，并提出了真实基准ProCodeBench用于评估主动式编码助手。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主动式编码助手研究受限于缺少大规模真实开发者行为数据，多依赖LLM模拟数据，但模拟数据与真实行为的差距未知，亟需系统性地评估这一仿真到现实的差距。

Method: 收集1,246名经验丰富的行业开发者在3天内的真实IDE交互轨迹（通过VS Code扩展），并构建配对的LLM模拟轨迹；提出ProCodeBench基准；评估多种LLM、检索增强方法和Agent基线。

Result: 模拟轨迹与真实轨迹在行为多样性、时间结构和探索模式上存在显著差异；当前方法在真实轨迹上远不可靠，模拟评估会高估实际性能；模拟数据不能替代真实数据，但可在微调前作为补充。

Conclusion: 真实开发者行为数据对于评估和训练主动式编码助手至关重要，未来研究应重视采集真实数据而非仅依赖模拟数据。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based coding assistants have made substantial progress, yet most systems remain reactive, requiring developers to explicitly formulate their needs. Proactive coding assistants aim to infer latent developer intent from integrated development environment (IDE) interactions and repository context, thereby reducing interaction overhead and supporting more seamless assistance. However, research in this direction is limited by the scarcity of large-scale real-world developer behavior data. Existing studies therefore often rely on LLM-simulated IDE traces, whose fidelity to real development behavior remains unclear. In this paper, we investigate this simulation-to-reality gap through a large-scale empirical study. We collect real IDE interaction traces from 1{,}246 experienced industry developers over three consecutive days using a custom Visual Studio Code extension, and construct paired LLM-simulated traces for controlled comparison. Our analysis shows that simulated traces differ substantially from real traces in behavioral diversity, temporal structure, and exploratory patterns. Based on the collected data, we introduce \textbf{ProCodeBench}, a real-world benchmark for proactive intent prediction. Experiments with representative LLMs, retrieval-augmented methods, and agentic baselines show that current approaches remain far from reliable under real IDE traces, suggesting that simulation-based evaluation can overestimate real-world performance. Finally, our training study shows that simulated data cannot replace real data, but can complement it when used before real-world fine-tuning. These findings highlight the importance of real developer behavior data for evaluating and training proactive coding assistants.

</details>


### [197] [From Chat to Interview: Agentic Requirements Elicitation with an Experience Ontology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05828)
*Dongming Jin,Zhi Jin,Yaotian Yang,Linyu Li,Zheng Fang,Yuanpeng He,Wenchun Jing,Xiaohong Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出OntoAgent，一种基于经验本体的需求获取访谈智能体，通过自动构建领域本体来引导结构化、可解释的需求访谈，实验表明其在有效性和效率上显著优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的需求获取方法仅依赖自由对话，忽略了分析师的经验和结构化认知框架，导致隐式需求遗漏和冗余提问。受经验丰富的分析师会遵循结构化认知框架启发，作者提出用经验本体来引导自动化需求访谈。

Method: OntoAgent首先自动分析领域需求描述构建经验本体；在访谈中，通过四个本体引导的操作（ParseUser, ScoreOnto, ReRankOnto, GatePrune）识别相关需求关注点，再结合对话上下文生成提问。

Result: 在网站应用领域的定量实验中，OntoAgent在IRE指标上提升33%，在TKQR指标上提升21%，消融实验验证了各关键组件的贡献，用户研究也证明了实际场景中的优势。

Conclusion: OntoAgent是一种有效的需求获取方法，可扩展到其他领域的需求访谈任务。

Abstract: Requirements elicitation interviews are crucial and time-consuming in requirements engineering, but heavily rely on the experience of requirements analysts. Although recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have created new opportunities to automate this process, existing approaches rely solely on LLMs for free-form chat without taking into account the interview and development experience. That leads to the omission of implicit requirements and redundant questions. Practically, experienced analysts implicitly follow a structured cognitive framework when conducting requirements elicitation. Inspired by this observation, this paper proposes an interview agent named OntoAgent for the elicitation of requirements guided by an experience ontology. OntoAgent automatically analyzes domain-specific requirements descriptions to construct an experience ontology, which organizes requirements concerns into an ontology to support systematic and explainable interviews. During the interview, OntoAgent first performs four operations (i.e., ParseUser, ScoreOnto, ReRankOnto, GatePrune) guided by the ontology to identify the relevant requirement concerns. The selected concern is then combined with the current dialogue context to generate the elicitation question. To validate OntoAgent, we conduct comprehensive quantitative experiments using the widely adopted website application domain. The results show that OntoAgent significantly outperforms existing baselines in both elicitation effectiveness and questioning efficiency, achieving a 33% improvement in IRE and a 21% improvement in TKQR. Ablation studies further validate the contribution of each key design component. In addition, a qualitative user study demonstrates its practical advantages in real-world scenarios. We believe that OntoAgent can also be extended to requirements interview tasks in other domains.

</details>


### [198] [On Fixing Insecure AI-Generated Code through Model Fine-Tuning and Prompting Strategies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05867)
*Ali Soltanian Fard Jahromi,Amjed Tahir,Peng Liang,Foutse Khomh*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了提升AI生成代码安全性的多种策略（微调与提示工程），发现安全改进高度依赖于策略和模型，且修复漏洞时常引入新的弱点，不存在普适的“防弹”解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI生成代码在功能基准测试上表现优异，但频繁出现安全漏洞和弱点，严重阻碍了其广泛采用。现有缓解方法效果不一，缺乏系统性评估。

Method: 针对常见弱点枚举（CWE）列表，采用微调（fine-tuning）和提示工程（prompting）两种方式对模型输出进行精炼，系统评估这些策略在不同模型和编程语言上的安全性提升效果，并分析CWE的严重性、共现模式以及修复的副作用。

Result: 安全改进高度依赖具体策略和模型；部分方法能减少特定类型的弱点，但常因修复引入新的弱点；没有任何策略能在所有模型和场景下一致地消除弱点。

Conclusion: 不存在通用的“防弹”方案来保证AI生成代码的安全性，安全加固需要根据具体策略和模型进行定制化处理。

Abstract: The security of AI-generated code remains a major obstacle to its widespread adoption. Although code generation models achieve strong performance on functional benchmarks, their outputs frequently contain bugs and security weaknesses that undermine their trustworthiness. Prior work has explored a range of approaches to mitigate security issues in AI-generated code, e.g., using static analysis-guided generation and prompt engineering. However, their effectiveness varies widely across models and settings. This paper presents a systematic investigation of strategies for hardening model-generated code against a list of Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE). We assess the extent to which these strategies improve security across models and programming languages, using fine-tuning and prompting approaches for model output refinement. Beyond the prevalence of security weaknesses, we analyse the severity of identified CWEs, their co-occurrence, and the unintended consequences of remediation (i.e., whether fixing certain weaknesses introduces new weaknesses elsewhere in the same code). Our results show that security improvements are highly strategy- and model-dependent. Although some approaches reduce specific classes of weaknesses, they often introduce new weaknesses as side effects of the fixes. Moreover, no strategy consistently eliminates weaknesses across all models and scenarios, highlighting the absence of a universally effective "bulletproof" solution for secure AI-generated code.

</details>


### [199] [Evaluating Non-English Developer Support in Machine Learning for Software Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05902)
*Jonathan Katzy,Yongcheng Huang,Gopal-Raj Panchu,Maksym Ziemlewski,Paris Loizides,Sander Vermeulen,Arie van Deursen,Maliheh Izadi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文研究了大型语言模型在多语言代码注释生成中的表现，发现非英语场景下生成质量显著下降（语言错误最高增加15.1倍），且现有自动评估方法（包括神经指标和LLM作为评判者）均不可靠，人类判断仍不可或缺。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前代码生成和评估主要面向英语，忽视了多语言开发场景中代码包含非英语自然语言的情况，缺乏对非英语代码注释生成及其评估可靠性的理解。

Method: 评估5个代码LLM（CodeGemma等）在5种语言（荷兰语、英语、希腊语、波兰语、中文）上的表现；对12,500条生成注释进行开放编码研究，构建人类标注数据集和26种错误类型的分类体系；基于此评估神经指标和LLM-as-a-judge管线的性能。

Result: 非英语场景下生成性能严重下降，语言错误增加最多15.1倍；所有自动评估方法均不可靠，神经指标无法区分正确/错误输出甚至随机噪声，LLM-as-a-judge虽与人类一致性最高但无法可靠捕获语言和语义错误。

Conclusion: 评估和生成是多语言工具的关键障碍，人类判断仍然不可或缺。

Abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly used in software engineering, but both code generation and its evaluation remain predominantly English-centric. This leaves a major gap in our understanding of how well current tools support multilingual development, where code contains non-English natural language. In this paper, we investigate non-English code comment generation and the reliability of current methods for evaluating such outputs. We evaluate five code LLMs (CodeGemma, CodeLlama, CodeQwen1.5, GraniteCode, and StarCoder2) across five natural languages: Dutch, English, Greek, Polish and Chinese. We further conduct an open-coding study of 12,500 generated comments, from which we derive a publicly released human-annotated dataset and a taxonomy of 26 error types. We use these human annotations, to evaluate the performance of neural metrics, and LLM-as-a-judge pipelines.
  Our findings show that generative performance deteriorates substantially outside English, with linguistic errors increasing by up to 15.1$\times$, alongside frequent incoherent generations and a rise in semantic errors. More critically, we show that detecting errors in non-English comments underperforms. Across classical overlap-based metrics, off-the-shelf neural metrics, extended neural metrics using newer multilingual, language-specific, and code-specific models, and LLM-as-a-judge pipelines, no automatic approach provides reliable and consistent assessment. Neural metrics fail to distinguish correct comments from incorrect outputs or even random noise, and tend to overestimate quality in non-English settings. LLM-as-a-judge methods achieve the highest agreement with human annotations but fail to reliably capture important language-related and semantic errors. Overall, our results show that evaluation and generation are key barriers for multilingual tooling, and that human judgment remains indispensable.

</details>


### [200] [Exploring the Effectiveness of Abstract Syntax Tree Patterns for Algorithm Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06098)
*Denis Neumüller,Florian Sihler,Raphael Straub,Matthias Tichy*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于抽象语法树的算法自动识别方法，通过领域特定语言定义搜索模式，在BigCloneEval基准测试中F1分数达0.74，显著优于大型语言模型CodeLlama（0.35）和代码克隆检测工具（最佳召回率0.20）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算法识别方法存在可用性差、可扩展性不足且缺乏准确率评估的问题，无法有效支持软件维护、重工程以及代码质量评估（如识别低效的冒泡排序并推荐替代算法）。

Method: 基于抽象语法树（AST）的匹配方法，包括：设计领域特定语言（DSL）描述算法关键特征并在AST上表达搜索模式；实现匹配算法；构建初始模式库。通过算法名称进行网络搜索，将参考实现的关键特征用DSL描述为搜索模式。

Result: 在BigCloneEval基准测试的子集（含Fibonacci、冒泡排序、二分查找等算法）上，平均F1分数为0.74，优于CodeLlama（0.35）；召回率为0.62，优于最佳代码克隆检测工具（0.20）。

Conclusion: 基于AST的算法识别方法在准确性和实用性上显著优于现有大型语言模型和代码克隆检测工具，能有效支持软件质量评估和算法改进建议。

Abstract: The automated recognition of algorithm implementations can support many software maintenance and re-engineering activities by providing knowledge about the concerns present in the code base. Moreover, recognizing inefficient algorithms like Bubble Sort and suggesting superior alternatives from a library can help in assessing and improving the quality of a system. Approaches from related work suffer from usability as well as scalability issues and their accuracy is not evaluated. In this paper, we investigate how well our approach based on the abstract syntax tree of a program performs for automatic algorithm recognition. To this end, we have implemented a prototype consisting of: A domain-specific language designed to capture the key features of an algorithm and used to express a search pattern on the abstract syntax tree, a matching algorithm to find these features, and an initial catalog of "ready to use" patterns. To create our search patterns we performed a web search using the algorithm name and described key features of the found reference implementations with our domain-specific language. We evaluate our prototype on a subset of the BigCloneEval benchmark containing algorithms like Fibonacci, Bubble Sort, and Binary Search. We achieve an average F1-score of 0.74 outperforming the large language model Codellama which attains 0.35. Additionally, we use multiple code clone detection tools as a baseline for comparison, achieving a recall of 0.62 while the best-performing tool reaches 0.20.

</details>


### [201] [Schedule-and-Calibrate: Utility-Guided Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning for Code LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06111)
*Yujia Chen,Yang Ye,Xiao Chu,Yuchi Ma,Cuiyun Gao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出ASTOR框架，通过任务效用驱动的分层数据调度和自适应策略优化，在统一多任务强化学习中提升代码生成LLM的性能，超越单任务专家和其他多任务基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL post-training方法为每个任务部署独立专家模型，成本随任务数线性增长；而统一多任务RL方法对所有任务采用固定数据调度和统一优化策略，限制了训练效果。

Method: ASTOR框架包含两个模块：1) 分层效用路由数据调度模块，按任务效用分层分配训练预算并优先选择信息量大的样本；2) 自适应效用校准策略优化模块，根据每个任务的当前训练状态动态调整KL正则化强度。

Result: 在4个代表性编码任务上，ASTOR使单一模型在所有任务上一致提升，超过最佳单任务专家9.0%-9.5%，超过最强多任务基线7.5%-12.8%。

Conclusion: 基于任务效用的协调机制能有效提升多任务编码RL训练效果，既避免了训练多个专家模型的高成本，又解决了统一训练中各任务学习进度不一致的问题。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards has proven effective at post-training LLMs for coding, yet deploying separate task-specific specialists incurs costs that scale with the number of tasks, motivating a unified multi-task RL (MTRL) approach. However, existing MTRL methods treat all coding tasks uniformly, relying on fixed data curricula under a shared optimization strategy, ultimately limiting the effectiveness of multi-task training. To address these limitations, we propose ASTOR, a multi-tASk code reinforcement learning framework via uTility-driven coORdination. Centered on task utility, a signal capturing each task learning potential and cross-task synergy, ASTOR comprises two coupled modules: 1) Hierarchical Utility-Routed Data Scheduling module hierarchically allocates training budget and prioritizes informative prompts, steering training toward the most valuable data and 2) Adaptive Utility-Calibrated Policy Optimization module dynamically scales per-task KL regularization, matching update constraints to each tasks current training state. Experiments on two widely-used LLMs across four representative coding tasks demonstrate that ASTOR consistently improves a single model across all tasks, outperforming the best task-specific specialist by 9.0%-9.5% and surpassing the strongest MTRL baseline by 7.5%-12.8%.

</details>


### [202] [Breaking, Stale, or Missing? Benchmarking Coding Agents on Project-Level Test Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06125)
*Ye Shang,Quanjun Zhang,Haichuan Hu,Chunrong Fang,Liang Xiao,Zhenyu Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: TEBench是首个项目级别的测试演化基准，包含314个任务实例，涵盖三种演化类型（Test-Breaking、Test-Stale、Test-Missing）。评估发现现有框架在识别上存在性能天花板（F1约45-49%），其中Test-Stale最难处理，且系统普遍陷入"执行-失败-修复"的被动循环。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有测试演化基准仅停留在方法级别，使用预配对的输入，绕过了从完整项目中定位受影响测试以及生成新测试的任务，无法反映真实的测试演化场景。

Method: 基于Defects4J项目构建四阶段流水线，构建包含314个实例的基准TEBench，涵盖10个项目。每个实例标注三种演化类型：Test-Breaking（测试失败）、Test-Stale（测试通过但不再有效）、Test-Missing（需要新测试）。评估7种配置（含Claude Code、Codex CLI、OpenCode等框架及6种基础模型）和启发式基线。

Result: 所有配置在识别上的F1值收敛于45.7%-49.4%，存在性能天花板。Test-Stale最难（F1约36%）。生成的测试补丁虽可执行但与ground truth偏差大。分析显示系统陷入"执行-失败-修复"的被动循环，无法主动处理Stale和Missing测试。

Conclusion: 现有测试演化方法存在根本性局限：过度依赖执行失败信号，缺乏主动语义推理能力。TEBench揭示了测试演化中尚未解决的核心挑战，特别是Test-Stale类型需要新的方法突破。

Abstract: As production code evolves, the test suite must co-evolve to remain effective. Existing benchmarks for test evolution operate at method-level granularity with pre-paired inputs, bypassing the task of locating affected tests from the full project and excluding the need for new tests entirely. We present TEBench, the first project-level benchmark for test evolution. Given a project repository and a code-changing commit, TEBench requires systems to autonomously identify tests requiring modification, determine where new tests are needed, and produce the corresponding test patch. We construct TEBench through a four-stage pipeline over Defects4J projects, curating 314 task instances from 10 projects with developer-written ground truth. Each instance is annotated with one or more of three evolution types: Test-Breaking (tests that fail), Test-Stale (tests that pass but no longer meaningfully validate updated behavior), and Test-Missing (new tests needed for introduced behavior). We evaluate seven configurations spanning three industrial agent frameworks (Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode) and six base models, alongside a heuristic baseline. All seven configurations converge on an identification F1 of 45.7% to 49.4%, revealing a shared performance ceiling across both frameworks and base models. Test-Stale is the most challenging type, averaging F1 around 36%, since configurations rely on execution failure signals and lack proactive semantic reasoning. On the update task, configurations produce highly executable test modifications whose surface form diverges substantially from ground truth. Trajectory analysis reveals a reactive "execute-fail-fix" loop that succeeds for breaking tests but structurally cannot address stale or missing tests. TEBench is available at https://github.com/iSEngLab/TEBench with a leaderboard at https://tebench-leadership.vercel.app.

</details>


### [203] [BUILD-AND-FIND: An Effort-Aware Protocol for Evaluating Agent-Managed Codebases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06136)
*Jhen-Ke Lin*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出BUILD-AND-FIND评估协议，衡量生成代码仓库的意图可恢复性——下游智能体能否从仓库中恢复隐藏的设计意图，以及恢复所需的工作量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仓库级工程日益由智能体管理，生成的仓库不仅是任务答案，更是后续工作的沟通产物。仅关注行为正确性不足以评估仓库质量，需要衡量意图的可恢复性。

Method: 构建者根据隐藏的仓库规范创建代码库；查找者仅凭代码库和规范追踪的多选题库恢复意图。通过恢复准确率、可重复性、实现覆盖率和检查工作量四个指标评估，并设置仅问题/仅规范对照组及审计机制。

Result: 在已发布的高先验任务包中，恢复准确率接近饱和，因此检查工作量和查找者特定效应成为主要比较维度。

Conclusion: BUILD-AND-FIND将行为正确性与工件侧意图恢复能力分离，为评估AI生成仓库的可维护性和可理解性提供了新范式。

Abstract: Most coding-agent benchmarks ask whether generated code behaves correctly. That remains essential, but repository-level engineering is increasingly agent-managed: one agent writes a repository, and later agents inspect, audit, or extend it as working context. In that setting, a generated repository is not only an answer to a task but also a communication artifact for future work. Even when strong agents nearly satisfy the visible behavioral objective, repositories can differ in how clearly they expose the intended behavior and design choices behind that behavior. We introduce BUILD-AND-FIND, a protocol for evaluating whether downstream agents can recover those intended choices from generated repositories, and how much inspection that recovery requires. For each task, a builder sees a hidden repository specification and creates a codebase; a finder sees only the codebase and a specification-traced multiple-choice question bank. The protocol separates behavioral correctness from artifact-side recovery and reports recovery accuracy, repeatability, implementation coverage, and inspection effort. Accuracy and stability act as gates: effort is interpreted only when recovery succeeds reliably. Among artifacts from which the same intent can be recovered, lower effort by the same finder suggests that the artifact makes that intent easier to locate. Question-only and spec-only controls quantify generic priors and specification access, while audits separate omitted claims from finder failures and check whether correct answers cite artifact evidence. In the released high-prior task pack, recovery accuracy is near saturation, so inspection effort and finder-specific effects provide the main panel-local comparison.

</details>


### [204] [Modeling Dependency-Propagated Ecosystem Impact of Changes in Maintenance Activities: Evaluating Support Strategies in the PyPI Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06164)
*Alexandros Tsakpinis,Emil Schwenger,Alexander Pretschner*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种依赖感知的生态系统影响模型，用于量化PyPI生态系统中维护活动变化的影响传播，并识别出少量高影响力包（0.1%的包贡献约80%的生态影响），为开源支持决策提供系统化依据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开源软件支持机制缺乏明确的、依赖感知的生态系统影响概念来指导支持决策。

Method: 基于依赖传播的生态系统影响模型，分析PyPI中718,750个包和超过200万个依赖关系，将影响驱动的支持策略与Tidelift、Ecosyste.ms、GitHub Sponsors及PageRank基线进行比较。

Result: 0.1%的PyPI包贡献了约80%的生态系统影响；外部支持集与生态影响的对齐程度差异显著；生态影响、社交足迹和操作可行性是互补但不同的支持维度。

Conclusion: 依赖感知的影响建模为大规模软件生态系统的支持优先级提供了透明、系统化的基础，建议支持策略应补充影响驱动的决策逻辑。

Abstract: Background: Open source software ecosystems exhibit dense dependency networks in which maintenance degradation of structurally central packages can propagate widely. Despite increasing attention to open source sustainability, existing support mechanisms lack an explicit, dependencyaware notion of ecosystem-level impact to guide support decisions. Aims: In this paper, we introduce a dependency-aware model of ecosystem impact that captures how changes in maintenance activities propagate through the Python Package Index (PyPI) ecosystem and affect its overall state. Based on this model, we prioritize packages for ecosystem support using our dependency-propagated notion of ecosystem impact. Method: Applying this framework to a snapshot of 718,750 PyPI packages and over 2 million dependencies, we compare our impact-driven support strategy with existing support mechanisms (Tidelift, Ecosyste.ms, and GitHub Sponsors) and with PageRank as a baseline measure of structural importance. Results: Our results show that a large share of the modeled ecosystem impact (approximately 80%) can be attributed to just 0.1% of all PyPI packages when prioritized based on dependency-propagated impact. In contrast, externally defined support sets vary substantially in their alignment with ecosystem impact. We further analyze maintainer reach and metadata accessibility, revealing that ecosystem impact, social footprint, and operational feasibility represent distinct but complementary dimensions of ecosystem support. Conclusions: Dependencyaware ecosystem impact modeling provides a transparent and systematic basis for prioritizing support in large-scale software ecosystems. Our findings suggest that effective support strategies, driven by ecosystem stewards, funding bodies, and organizations operating support programs, should complement existing allocation logic with impact-informed decision making.

</details>


### [205] [Teaching LLMs Program Semantics via Symbolic Execution Traces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06184)
*Jonas Bayer,Stefan Zetzsche,Olivier Bouissou,Remi Delmas,Michael Tautschnig,Soonho Kong*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个包含500个C语言验证任务的评估框架（基于SV-COMP 2025），评估了14个模型，发现高准确率掩盖了违规检测能力薄弱的问题。通过使用Soteria符号执行引擎生成的约3,000条bug traces对Qwen3-8B进行持续预训练，并结合思维链推理，将违规检测提升17个百分点，训练后的8B模型在违规检测上超越4倍大的Qwen3-32B（无推理），且trace训练与思维链存在超加性协同效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型在C代码验证任务中，高总体准确率掩盖了违规检测能力严重不足的问题，且该能力随程序长度增加急剧下降，亟需弥补这一关键缺陷。

Method: 基于SV-COMP 2025构建500个C验证任务（覆盖5种属性类型），评估14个模型；使用Soteria符号执行引擎对通用开源C代码生成执行轨迹，用约3,000条bug traces对Qwen3-8B进行持续预训练，并在推理时结合思维链推理。

Result: 违规检测提升超17个百分点；8B模型在违规检测上超越4倍大的Qwen3-32B（无推理）；trace训练与思维链协同效果超加性；改进跨所有5种属性类型泛化。

Conclusion: trace训练与思维链的组合可有效弥补模型在违规检测上的薄弱环节，且效益并非来自代码量而是轨迹语义，轨迹的筛选和格式至关重要。

Abstract: We introduce an evaluation framework of 500 C verification tasks across five property types (memory safety, overflow, termination, reachability, data races) built on SV-COMP 2025, and evaluate 14 models across six families. We find that high overall accuracy masks a critical weakness: while most models reliably confirm properties hold, violation detection varies widely and degrades sharply with program length. To close this gap, we train on formal verification artifacts: running the Soteria symbolic execution engine on generic open-source C code and using the resulting traces for continued pretraining of Qwen3-8B. Just ${\sim}$3,000 bug traces combined with chain-of-thought reasoning at inference time improve violation detection by over 17 percentage points, producing one of the most balanced accuracy profiles among evaluated models. On violation detection, the trained 8B model outperforms the 4$\times$ larger Qwen3-32B without thinking and approaches it in overall accuracy. The interaction between trace training and chain-of-thought is superadditive: neither alone provides meaningful gains, but their combination does. Improvements transfer across all five property types, including ones the training traces do not target. Our 28 configurations confirm the gains stem from trace semantics, not code volume, and that trace curation and format matter.

</details>


### [206] [SiblingRepair: Sibling-Based Multi-Hunk Repair with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06209)
*Xinyu Liu,Jiayu Ren,Yusen Wang,Qi Xin,Xiaoyuan Xie,Jifeng Xuan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出SiblingRepair，一种基于LLM的多hunk自动程序修复技术，专门针对兄弟代码位置的修复。它通过token和嵌入匹配搜索语义相似的兄弟候选，利用LLM识别故障相关兄弟并通过同步修复和迭代修复两种策略生成一致补丁。在Defects4J和GHRB基准上显著优于现有SOTA技术Hercules。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发者经常在不同代码位置（兄弟位置）犯相似错误，需要相似修复。现有SOTA技术Hercules存在局限性：对兄弟位置和提交历史有强假设、基于AST的匹配僵化、模板补丁生成不灵活。需要更通用的兄弟修复方法。

Method: 1) 基于频谱故障定位识别可疑位置；2) 通过token匹配和嵌入匹配搜索语义相似的兄弟候选（不局限于失败测试覆盖或提交历史）；3) 使用LLM识别与故障相关的兄弟；4) 通过同步修复（联合修复兄弟）和迭代修复（逐步分析候选构建补丁）两种策略生成一致补丁；5) 保留早期可疑位置产生的补丁，合并为广义多hunk补丁。

Result: 在Defects4J和GHRB基准上，SiblingRepair显著优于包括Hercules在内的SOTA多hunk修复技术。修复效率高，兄弟检测和修复组件有效，LLM数据泄露影响有限。

Conclusion: SiblingRepair推进了自动兄弟修复和通用多hunk修复领域，通过LLM和灵活匹配策略克服了Hercules的局限性，展现了更优的修复性能。

Abstract: Developers often make similar mistakes across code locations implementing related functionalities. These locations, called siblings, share similar issues and require similar fixes. Accurately identifying siblings and consistently repairing them are crucial for automated program repair. Hercules is a SOTA technique designed for sibling repair. However, it is limited by strong assumptions about sibling locations and commit-history availability, rigid AST-based sibling matching, and inflexible template-based patch generation. To address these limitations, we present SiblingRepair, a new LLM-based multi-hunk APR technique specialized for sibling repair. Starting from a suspicious location identified by spectrum-based fault localization, SiblingRepair searches for semantically related sibling candidates using token- and embedding-based code matching, without restricting discovery to failing-test coverage or commit history. It then uses an LLM to identify failure-relevant siblings and generate consistent patches through two complementary strategies: simultaneous repair, which jointly repairs siblings, and iterative repair, which progressively analyzes candidates for patch construction. SiblingRepair further preserves promising patches generated from earlier suspicious locations and combines them into generalized multi-hunk patches. We evaluate SiblingRepair on the Defects4J and GHRB benchmarks. The results show that SiblingRepair substantially outperforms SOTA multi-hunk repair techniques including Hercules. Our evaluation further demonstrates its repair efficiency, the effectiveness of its sibling detection and repair components, and limited impact of the LLM data leakage on the results. Overall, SiblingRepair advances automated sibling and general multi-hunk repair.

</details>


### [207] [Correct Code, Vulnerable Dependencies: A Large Scale Measurement Study of LLM-Specified Library Versions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06279)
*Chengjie Wang,Jingzheng Wu,Xiang Ling,Tianyue Luo,Chen Zhao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文首次大规模测量了LLM生成Python代码中第三方库版本选择的安全与兼容性风险，发现模型存在系统性偏向高风险版本的严重问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM生成的代码大量使用第三方库版本标识，但这些版本选择带来的安全与兼容性风险此前未被系统研究。

Method: 基于PinTrace基准（1000个Stack Overflow编程任务），评估10个LLM的版本指定行为，测量CVE暴露率、兼容性失败率，并通过动态测试和消融实验验证风险来源。

Result: LLM指定版本比率为26.83%-95.18%；36.70%-55.70%的任务含至少一个已知CVE，其中62.75%-74.51%为Critical/High严重等级；兼容性通过率仅19.70%-63.20%；动态测试通过率低至6.49%-48.62%。所有模型趋同于同一小批高风险版本。

Conclusion: LLM版本选择是此前被忽视的一类风险面，源于系统性偏差而非孤立错误；外部锚定的版本约束可显著降低漏洞暴露与兼容性失败。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are now largely involved in software development workflows, and the code they generate routinely includes third-party library (TPL) imports annotated with specific version identifiers. These version choices can carry security and compatibility risks, yet they have not been systematically studied.
  We present the first large-scale measurement study of version-level risk in LLM-generated Python code, evaluating 10 LLMs on PinTrace, a curated benchmark of 1,000 Stack Overflow programming tasks. LLMs tend to specify version identifiers when directly prompted at 26.83%-95.18%, while down to 6.45%-59.19% in creating a manifest file directly. Among the specified versions, 36.70%-55.70% of tasks contain at least one known CVE, and 62.75%-74.51% of them carry Critical or High severity ratings. In 72.27%-91.37% of cases, the associated CVEs were publicly disclosed before the model's knowledge cutoff. The statistics show all models converge on the same small set of risky release versions, indicating a systemic bias rather than isolated model error. Static compatibility rates range from 19.70% to 63.20%, with installation failure as the dominant cause. The dynamic test cases confirm the pattern by 6.49%-48.62% pass rates. Further experiments confirm that these failures are attributable to version selection rather than code quality, and that externally anchored version constraints substantially reduce both vulnerability exposure and compatibility failures. Our findings reveal LLM version selection as a first-class, previously overlooked risk surface in LLM-based development. We disclosed these findings to the community of the evaluated models, and several confirmed the issue. All the code and dataset have been released for open science at https://github.com/dw763j/PinTrace.

</details>


### [208] [Constraint Decay: The Fragility of LLM Agents in Backend Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06445)
*Francesco Dente,Dario Satriani,Paolo Papotti*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究系统评估了LLM代理在严格结构约束下生成多文件后端代码的能力，发现结构约束会导致性能显著下降（"约束衰减"），其中数据层缺陷是主要错误来源，且代理在约定密集型框架（如FastAPI、Django）中表现明显差于轻量级框架（如Flask）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试往往忽略非功能需求（如架构模式、数据库和ORM映射等结构约束），奖励功能正确但结构随意的解决方案。作者希望系统研究LLM代理在处理严格结构约束时的表现，填补这一评估空白。

Method: 在80个绿字段生成任务和20个功能实现任务上，统一API契约，覆盖8个Web框架。采用双重评估方式：端到端行为测试（检查功能正确性）和静态验证器（检查结构合规性），从而隔离结构复杂度的影响。

Result: 1) 存在"约束衰减"现象：结构要求积累导致性能大幅下降，强配置代理平均下降30点断言通过率，弱配置接近零。2) 框架敏感性差异显著：代理在显式、轻量级框架（Flask）中表现良好，在约定密集型框架（FastAPI、Django）中表现大幅下降。3) 数据层缺陷是首要错误原因（不正确的查询组合和ORM运行时违规）。

Conclusion: 同时满足功能需求和结构约束对编码代理而言仍是一项关键的开放挑战。现有代理在面对真实生产级多文件后端生成时，结构合规能力严重不足。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents demonstrate strong performance in autonomous code generation under loose specifications. However, production-grade software requires strict adherence to structural constraints, such as architectural patterns, databases, and object-relational mappings. Existing benchmarks often overlook these non-functional requirements, rewarding functionally correct but structurally arbitrary solutions. We present a systematic study evaluating how well agents handle structural constraints in multi-file backend generation. By fixing a unified API contract across 80 greenfield generation tasks and 20 feature-implementation tasks spanning eight web frameworks, we isolate the effect of structural complexity using a dual evaluation with end-to-end behavioral tests and static verifiers. Our findings reveal a phenomenon of constraint decay: as structural requirements accumulate, agent performance exhibits a substantial decline. Capable configurations lose 30 points on average in assertion pass rates from baseline to fully specified tasks, while some weaker configurations approach zero. Framework sensitivity analysis exposes significant performance disparities: agents succeed in minimal, explicit frameworks (e.g., Flask) but perform substantially worse on average in convention-heavy environments (e.g., FastAPI, Django). Finally, error analysis identifies data-layer defects (e.g., incorrect query composition and ORM runtime violations) as the leading root causes. This work highlights that jointly satisfying functional and structural requirements remains a key open challenge for coding agents.

</details>


### [209] [To What Extent Does Agent-generated Code Require Maintenance? An Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06464)
*Shota Sawada,Tatsuya Shirai,Yutaro Kashiwa,Ken'ichi Yamaguchi,Hiroshi Iwata,Hajimu Iida*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 这篇论文实证研究了AI生成代码的可维护性，发现AI生成的代码比人类编写的代码维护频率更低、更新规模更小，且修改类型以功能扩展为主（而人类代码修改以修复bug为主），维护工作主要由人类开发者完成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究基于LLM的自主编码代理生成的代码在长期可维护性方面存在的问题，弥补对AI生成代码维护性实证研究的空白。

Method: 使用AIDev数据集，从GitHub上100个流行仓库中分析AI生成的拉取请求（PR），共计分析超过1000个文件和约3200处代码变更，与人类编写的代码进行对比。

Result: (i) AI生成的文件维护频率低于人类编写的代码，更新仅影响文件的一小部分；(ii) AI代码中最常见的修改是功能扩展，而人类代码的修改主要是修复bug；(iii) 大部分维护工作由人类开发者完成。

Conclusion: AI生成代码的可维护性存在局限性，人类仍需深度参与其维护过程，并且AI代码的维护模式与人类代码存在显著差异。

Abstract: LLM-based autonomous coding agents have reshaped software development. While these agents excel at code generation, open questions persist about the long-term maintainability of AI-generated code. This study empirically investigates the maintenance extent, human involvement, and modification types of AI-generated files versus human-authored code. Using the AIDev dataset of AI-generated pull requests and GitHub, we analyzed over 1,000 files and approximately 3,200 changes from 100 popular repositories. Our findings show that: (i) AI-generated files receive less frequent maintenance than human-authored code, with updates affecting only a small fraction of file size; (ii) the most frequent modifications to AI code are feature extensions, whereas human updates focus on bug fixes, and (iii) human developers perform the large majority of this maintenance.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [210] [Adversarial procurement in blockchains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05559)
*Maryam Bahrani,Michael Neuder,S. Matthew Weinberg*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了区块链中利用计算不对称性的协议设计问题（如SNARKs），将其形式化为机制设计问题，发现最优协议的经济损失与活性故障成本成对数关系，并给出了类似领导者共识的实用设计建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 去中心化环境下，如何高效地激励节点执行昂贵计算任务（如生成SNARKs证明），同时平衡活性故障风险与激励成本。

Method: 将问题形式化为机制设计模型，分析最优协议在对抗性环境下的经济效率，推导活性故障成本与最优损失之间的对数关系，并刻画最优均衡结构。

Result: 最优协议的经济损失与活性故障成本呈对数关系（受网络敌对方比例影响）；最优均衡呈现直观结构：随机指定单个主节点+委员会备用机制；刻画了负支付（即slashing）特别有效的渐近区间。

Conclusion: 该机制设计框架为区块链中利用计算不对称性的协议提供了理论指导，尤其是类似领导者共识的委托-备用结构在实践中具有优势。

Abstract: An emerging blockchain protocol design pattern leverages the asymmetry between the computational effort in performing versus verifying tasks. For example, cryptographic validity proofs (e.g., SNARKS) require the prover to expend significant effort demonstrating the correctness of their claim, while the verifiers benefit from extremely easy validation. The operationalization of this paradigm requires efficiently soliciting the performance of expensive tasks in pseudonymous, adversarial environments. We formalize this as a mechanism design question. The protocol balances the economic cost of a liveness fault, where the work is not completed, with the payments required to incentivize specific behavior from candidate suppliers.
  We show that the loss of the optimal protocol scales logarithmically in the cost of a liveness fault, scaled up by the adversarial fraction of the network. Further, we find that the optimal equilibria have an intuitive structure, allowing us to provide concrete advice to practitioners. Specifically, in many regimes, the optimum designates a single, random node as the primary worker and a committee as a fallback, which is reminiscent of leader-based consensus mechanisms. We also characterize the asymptotic regimes where having negative payments (i.e., slashing in blockchain parlance) is especially helpful.

</details>


### [211] [Core Existence in Approval-Based Committee Elections with up to Five Voter Types](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06194)
*Patrick Becker,Matthias Greger,Dominik Peters*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文证明了在最多5个选民的审批制委员会选举中，核心（core）一定非空，并给出了多项式时间算法；同时指出该方法在6个选民或更一般模型下无法直接推广。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究审批制委员会选举中核心（core）非空性这一开放问题，旨在证明在小规模选民场景下核心委员会一定存在。

Method: 利用仿射幺半群（affine monoid）方法，将分数委员会通过确定性取整（deterministic rounding）转化为整数委员会，且保证每个选民的效用向下取整不变。

Result: 对于最多5个选民的选举，核心非空，且可多项式时间求解；加权选民设置下最多5个不同审批集时同样成立；但方法在n=6时失效，在n=3且考虑可加估值或非单位成本时也失效。

Conclusion: 核心非空性在小规模选民（≤5）场景下成立，但方法存在严格边界，无法直接扩展到更大规模或更一般模型。

Abstract: In an approval-based committee election, the task is to select a committee of up to $k$ candidates from a set of $m$ candidates based on the preferences of $n$ voters, each of whom approves a subset of the candidates. A central open question is whether there always exists a committee in the core, a stability notion capturing proportional representation. We prove core non-emptiness for all approval-based committee elections with at most five voters. The proof is based on affine monoid methods and shows that, for $n\le5$, every fractional committee admits a deterministic rounding to an integral committee that preserves each voter's utility up to floors. We extend our argument to the weighted voter setting, which implies core existence for instances with up to five distinct approval sets. In all these cases, a core committee can be computed in polynomial time. We show that our technique cannot be extended as-is: our rounding method breaks down for $n=6$, and for $n=3$ when applied to more general models with additive valuations or non-unit candidate costs.

</details>


### [212] [Independent Learning of Nash Equilibria in Partially Observable Markov Potential Games with Decoupled Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06377)
*Philip Jordan,Maryam Kamgarpour*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了部分可观测马尔可夫博弈中的纳什均衡学习问题，针对一类具有独立状态转移且底层完全观测博弈为势博弈的子类，提出了一种无需通信的独立学习算法，并在滤波器稳定性假设下证明了算法能以拟多项式复杂度收敛到近似纳什均衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有部分可观测马尔可夫博弈中的学习算法依赖集中式架构或信息共享，样本和计算复杂度随玩家数量指数增长，缺乏高效的独立学习方法。

Method: 聚焦于独立状态转移且底层为马尔可夫势博弈的子类，提出独立学习算法；利用滤波器稳定性假设，证明有限历史窗口的策略能提供充分近似，将POMG近似为近势博弈的替代马尔可夫博弈。

Result: 获得了拟多项式级别的样本和计算复杂度，实现了部分可观测马尔可夫博弈中独立的纳什均衡学习。

Conclusion: 在特定假设下，无需通信和集中化的独立学习可以在POMG中高效收敛到近似纳什均衡，为去中心化多智能体强化学习提供了理论保证。

Abstract: We study Nash equilibrium learning in partially observable Markov games (POMGs), a multi-agent reinforcement learning framework in which agents cannot fully observe the underlying state. Prior work in this setting relies on centralization or information sharing, and suffers from sample and computational complexity that scales exponentially in the number of players. We focus on a subclass of POMGs with independent state transitions, where agents remain coupled through their rewards, and assume that the underlying fully observed Markov game is a Markov potential game. For this class, we present an independent learning algorithm in which players, observing only their own actions and observations and without communication, jointly converge to an approximate Nash equilibrium. Due to partial observability, optimal policies may in general depend on the full action-observation history. Under a filter stability assumption, we show that policies based on finite history windows provide sufficient approximation guarantees. This enables us to approximate the POMG by a surrogate Markov game that is near-potential, leading to quasi-polynomial sample and computational complexity for independent Nash equilibrium learning in the underlying POMG.

</details>


### [213] [Counterexamples to EFX for Submodular and Subadditive Valuations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06451)
*Simon Mackenzie,Mashbat Suzuki*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文构造了三个智能体、八种商品的反例，证明在单调次可加估值下不存在任意α>0.89的α-EFX分配，且在子模（加权覆盖）估值下也不存在EFX分配。关键在于智能体的估值仅存在商品标签差异，表明EFX即使在对称设置下也可能不存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EFX分配的存在性是公平分配领域的根本问题，此前尚未有明确结论。本文旨在通过构造紧凑、可人工验证的反例，揭示EFX在一般估值条件下可能不存在。

Method: 构造了一个三智能体、八商品的具体实例，分别针对单调次可加估值和子模（加权覆盖）估值两种情形，通过对称性设计（智能体估值仅因商品标签不同而异）来证明EFX的不存在性。

Result: 对于单调次可加估值，不存在任何α>1/∛2 ≈ 0.89的α-EFX分配；对于子模（加权覆盖）估值，不存在任何EFX分配。反例具有高度对称性和紧凑性。

Conclusion: EFX分配的存在性即使在强对称性（智能体仅因商品标签不同）和常见估值类别（如子模估值）下也可能失效，这对公平分配理论的边界给出了重要的下界刻画。

Abstract: The existence of EFX allocations is a fundamental question in fair division. In this paper, we construct a three-agent, eight-good instance with monotone subadditive valuations such that no allocation satisfies $α$-EFX for any $α> \frac{1}{\sqrt[6]{2}} \approx 0.89$. We also provide a closely related three-agent, eight-good instance with submodular (in fact weighted coverage) valuations for which no EFX allocation exists.
  A key feature of our construction is its symmetry: the agents' valuations are identical up to a relabeling of the goods. Thus, EFX can fail even when agents differ only in how the goods are labeled. This symmetry makes the counterexamples compact and human-verifiable, yielding simple combinatorial obstructions to the existence of EFX.

</details>


### [214] [Optimizing Social Utility in Sequential Experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06520)
*Ander Artola Velasco,Stratis Tsirtsis,Manuel Gomez-Rodriguez*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种序贯实验统计协议，通过部分补贴机制平衡药物开发的激励与社会效益，使用信念马尔可夫决策过程建模，证明社会效用是补贴水平的分段线性凸函数，模拟显示相比标准协议可提升35%以上社会效用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模随机对照试验的高昂成本阻碍了具有高社会潜力的"登月"项目开发，现有审批流程缺乏对开发者不确定性的弹性机制，导致社会效率损失。

Method: 提出序贯实验统计协议：开发者（代理人）顺序进行随机对照试验，监管者（委托人）部分补贴成本。使用信念马尔可夫决策过程建模代理人最优策略，并通过动态规划求解；证明社会效用为补贴水平的分段线性凸函数，采用分治算法找到社会最优补贴。

Result: 基于抗生素开发与审批的公开数据模拟显示，相比标准的非序贯协议，该协议可将社会效用提升超过35%。

Conclusion: 引入序贯实验与部分补贴机制能够有效解决高成本临床试验带来的开发不足问题，在激励创新与控制监管风险之间取得更优平衡。

Abstract: Regulatory approval of products in high-stakes domains such as drug development requires statistical evidence of safety and efficacy through large-scale randomized controlled trials. However, the high financial cost of these trials may deter developers who lack absolute certainty in their product's efficacy, ultimately stifling the development of `moonshot' products that could offer high social utility. To address this inefficiency, in this paper, we introduce a statistical protocol for experimentation where the product developer (the agent) conducts a randomized controlled trial sequentially and the regulator (the principal) partially subsidizes its cost. By modeling the protocol using a belief Markov decision process, we show that the agent's optimal strategy can be found efficiently using dynamic programming. Further, we show that the social utility is a piecewise linear and convex function over the subsidy level the principal selects, and thus the socially optimal subsidy can also be found efficiently using divide-and-conquer. Simulation experiments using publicly available data on antibiotic development and approval demonstrate that our statistical protocol can be used to increase social utility by more than $35$$\%$ relative to standard, non-sequential protocols.

</details>


### [215] [Sustaining Cooperation in Populations Guided by AI: A Folk Theorem for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06525)
*Jonathan Shaki,Eden Hartman,Sarit Kraus,Yonatan Aumann*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究多个大语言模型（LLMs）各自指导一群客户进行博弈时，LLMs之间产生的元博弈。在一次性博弈中，共享指令仅在LLM能影响同一交互中多个角色时才改变均衡行为；在重复博弈中，我们证明了LLM的民间定理：即使客户无法识别对手的LLM，所有可行且个体理性的结果都能作为ε-均衡维持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM被广泛用于指导多个交互中的智能体，这些看似独立的智能体实际上可能受同一个模型引导，这种耦合会改变激励不一致的智能体之间的合作前景。作者旨在理解这种共享LLM指导对战略互动的影响。

Method: 将问题建模为LLM层面的元博弈：多个LLM各自指导一群客户，客户参与基础博弈。分别分析一次性博弈和重复博弈两种情况。重复博弈中借鉴民间定理思想，但需要新的证明技术来处理LLM无法直接观察对手行动、客户无法识别对手LLM等约束。

Result: 一次性博弈中，共享指令仅在LLM能影响同一交互中多个角色时才能改变均衡行为，合作可能涌现，客户份额的影响可能是有益的、有害的或非单调的。重复博弈中，证明了LLM的民间定理：即使有间接观测和识别限制，所有可行且个体理性的结果都可作为ε-均衡维持。

Conclusion: 共享LLM指导可以在激励不一致的智能体群体中维持合作。这一结论对理解AI系统在多智能体环境中的战略影响具有重要意义。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to provide instructions to many agents who interact with one another. Such shared reliance couples agents who appear to act independently: they may in fact be guided by a common model. This coupling can change the prospects for cooperation among agents with misaligned incentives. We study settings in which multiple LLMs each advise a population of clients who participate in instances of an underlying game, creating strategic interaction at the level of the LLMs themselves. This induces a meta-game among the LLMs, mediated through clients. We first analyze the one-shot setting, where shared instructions can change equilibrium behavior only when an LLM may influence more than one role in the same interaction; in such cases, cooperation may emerge, and the effect of client share can be beneficial, harmful, or non-monotone, depending on the base game. Our main result concerns the repeated setting. We prove a folk theorem for LLMs: despite indirect observation and the clients' inability to identify which LLM advised their opponents, all feasible and individually rational outcomes can be sustained as $\varepsilon$-equilibria. The result does not follow from the standard folk theorem and requires new proof techniques. Together, these results show that shared LLM guidance can sustain cooperation among populations of agents even when the underlying incentives are misaligned.

</details>


### [216] [Online Scalarization in Vector-Valued Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06624)
*Ehsan Asadollahi,Calvin Hawkins,Matthew Hale*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究重复多玩家向量值博弈，提出一个双层学习框架：外层学习者缓慢选择标量化方法，内层快速无遗憾学习器根据所选标量反馈选择动作。提供了基于在线镜像下降和稳定重要性加权的可实现算法，并证明了次线性遗憾界的有限时间性能保证。实验表明，在典型博弈的向量值扩展中，收敛到偏好均衡的比例从非自适应标量化的约50%提升到所提方法的约80%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大多数研究将标量化方法视为固定建模决策，而本文认为标量化应作为在线决策变量，而非预先固定的选择。

Method: 提出双层学习框架：外层在有限候选类中缓慢选择标量化方法，内层使用bandit无遗憾学习器（基于bandit在线镜像下降与稳定重要性加权）根据所选标量反馈选择动作。

Result: 在向量值扩展的典型博弈实验中，收敛到偏好均衡的比例从非自适应标量化的约50%提升到约80%。

Conclusion: 所提出的自适应标量化方法能有效提升多玩家向量值博弈中收敛到偏好均衡的成功率，具有理论上的次线性遗憾界保证。

Abstract: We study repeated multi-player vector-valued games in which a player observes a payoff vector each round and evaluates outcomes through linear scalarizations of those vectors. Different from most prior works, the choice of scalarization is treated as an online decision variable rather than a fixed modeling decision. We propose a bi-level learning framework in which an outer learner chooses a scalarization from a finite candidate class on a slow timescale, while a faster inner bandit no-regret learner selects actions using the scalar feedback induced by the chosen scalarization. Performance of this approach is defined with respect to a certain true weight vector, and the deployed scalarizations act as control signals that shape the induced payoff trajectory. We provide implementable algorithms based on bandit online mirror descent with stabilized importance weighting, and we derive finite-time performance guarantees in the form of sublinear regret bounds. Experiments on a vector-valued extension of a canonical game show that convergence to the preferred equilibrium rises from roughly $50\%$ under non-adaptive scalarization to about $80\%$ under our proposed method.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [217] [DisastRAG: A Multi-Source Disaster Information Integration and Access System Based on Retrieval-Augmented Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05210)
*Bo Li,Zhitong Chen,Kai Yin,Junwei Ma,Yiming Xiao,Ali Mostafavi*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: DisastRAG是一个面向灾害管理的多路径信息集成与访问系统，结合大语言模型与检索增强生成，支持文档检索、结构化数据访问和Web备用检索，实验表明检索增强可提升12-23个百分点的多项选择准确率和最多10.5个百分点的关键点覆盖率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有灾害信息系统大多基于单一通路组织，难以支持异构、时间敏感且依赖上下文的多样化信息需求。

Method: 提出DisastRAG系统，采用多路径架构整合文档检索（灾害语料库）、结构化访问（关系型灾害记录）与外部Web备用检索，结合查询理解、策略路由、响应生成与上下文记忆模块。

Result: 使用四种开源大语言模型评估文档检索性能：检索增强相比无检索基线，多项选择提升12-23个百分点，关键点覆盖提升最高10.5个百分点。更大候选池对弱模型最有利，强模型对检索噪声更敏感。混合检索在开放回答中最佳，向量检索和浅层重排序更利于事实性选择题。

Conclusion: DisastRAG通过多路径检索架构有效支持异构灾害信息需求，结构化访问和Web备用功能扩展了传统纯文档RAG的边界。

Abstract: Effective disaster management requires rapid access to information distributed across structured operational records, unstructured institutional documents, and dynamic external sources. However, most existing disaster information systems and retrieval-augmented generation frameworks remain organized around a single access pathway, limiting their ability to support heterogeneous, time-sensitive, and context-dependent information needs.
