This study presents DisastRAG, a disaster-aware information integration and access system that combines large language models with retrieval-augmented access to structured, unstructured, and contextual disaster information. The framework is built around a multi-path architecture that supports document retrieval over a curated hazard corpus, structured access over relational disaster records, and external web fallback for out-of-corpus requests, while also incorporating query understanding, strategy routing, response generation, and contextual memory within a unified system. We evaluated the document retrieval performance using four open-source large language models across multiple retrieval configurations on multiple-choice and open-ended disaster information tasks. Retrieval augmentation consistently improves performance over no-retrieval baselines, yielding multiple-choice gains of 12-23 percentage points and open-ended keypoint coverage gains of up to 10.5 percentage points. Results show that larger candidate pools are most helpful for weaker models, while stronger models are more sensitive to retrieval noise. Hybrid retrieval performs best for open-ended coverage, whereas vector retrieval and shallower reranking more often favor closed-form factual selection. Case studies further show that structured access and web fallback extend the framework beyond document-only RAG.

</details>


### [218] [Dynamic Graph with Similarity-Aware Attention Graph Neural Network for Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05238)
*Aadarsh Senapati,Neha Kujur,Vivek Yelleti*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出动态图相似性感知注意力图神经网络（DG-SA-GNN），通过动态构建四种用户相似度图、图Transformer融合和交叉注意力机制，解决了传统协同过滤和GNN方法忽视用户动态偏好和显式用户关系建模的问题，在MovieLens100K上Recall@20达0.162，优于LightGCN基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统协同过滤和现有GNN方法在推荐系统中存在两个主要局限：（1）依赖静态用户-物品交互图，无法捕捉用户偏好的动态变化；（2）缺乏显式的用户-用户关系建模，忽略了用户间相似性对推荐质量的影响。本文旨在解决这些不足，提出一种能动态建模用户相似性并自适应融合的图神经网络框架。

Method: 构建四个并行用户相似度图（Cosine、Jaccard、Discounted PCC、IPIJ），每个图由专用UserGNN处理；通过Graph Transformer融合四个视图；Cross-Attention模块将用户嵌入与物品嵌入交互优化；训练过程中按预定周期重建用户相似度图，实现动态图演化；采用小批量训练和难负采样提升可扩展性和收敛速度。

Result: 在MovieLens100K数据集上，Recall@20为0.162，NDCG@20为0.065，在Recall指标上优于LightGCN基线模型。

Conclusion: 动态多相似度图构建+注意力融合的策略能有效提升推荐性能，验证了显式建模动态用户相似性关系的必要性。

Abstract: Recommender systems are essential components of modern online platforms which presents personalized content in various domain. The traditional collaborative filtering methods depends on static user-item interaction graphs and a limited subset of similarity measures which fail to capture the changing nature of preferences of an individual. Recent graph neural network (GNN) based approaches focus on user-item bipartite graphs which do not use explicit user-user relational modelling and dynamic graph evolution during training. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a Dynamic Graph SimilarityAware Attention Graph Neural Network (DG-SA-GNN) framework that integrates dynamic user similarity graph construction with multi-similarity propagation and attention-based aggregation. The proposed architecture constructs four parallel user similarity graphs using Cosine, Jaccard, Discounted Pearson Correlation Coefficient (Discount PCC), and IPIJ similarity functions, each processed by a dedicated UserGNN module. A Graph Transformer fuses the four graph views, and a CrossAttention module refines user embeddings through interaction with item embeddings. Crucially, the graphs are reconstructed at scheduled epochs during training, enabling the model to adapt to the learned embedding space constituting the dynamic graph component. Mini-batch training with hard negative sampling improves scalability and convergence. Experiments on the MovieLens100K benchmark demonstrate that DG-SA-GNN achieves a Recall@20 of 0.162 and NDCG@20 of 0.065 which is better than the LightGCN baseline in recall. The results validate that dynamic multi-similarity graph construction coupled with attention-based fusion which produce recommendation performance

</details>


### [219] [Beyond Semantic Similarity: Rethinking Retrieval for Agentic Search via Direct Corpus Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05242)
*Zhuofeng Li,Haoxiang Zhang,Cong Wei,Pan Lu,Ping Nie,Yi Lu,Yuyang Bai,Shangbin Feng,Hangxiao Zhu,Ming Zhong,Yuyu Zhang,Jianwen Xie,Yejin Choi,James Zou,Jiawei Han,Wenhu Chen,Jimmy Lin,Dongfu Jiang,Yu Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出直接语料交互（DCI）方法，让智能体通过通用终端工具（如grep、文件读取、shell命令等）直接搜索原始语料，无需嵌入模型、向量索引或检索API。实验表明，该方法在多个基准测试上超越传统检索方法，尤其在智能体搜索任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统检索系统（无论是词法还是语义）使用固定的top-k相似性接口，在智能体搜索中成为瓶颈：无法灵活实现精确词法约束、稀疏线索组合、局部上下文检查和多步假设精炼，且早期过滤的证据无法被后续推理恢复。

Method: 提出直接语料交互（DCI）方法，智能体使用通用终端工具（grep、文件读取、shell命令、轻量脚本）直接操作原始语料，无需离线索引、嵌入模型或检索API，支持动态演化的本地语料库。

Result: 在BRIGHT、BEIR等多个数据集上显著超越强稀疏检索、稠密检索和重排序基线；在BrowseComp-Plus和多跳问答任务上无需传统语义检索器即达到强准确率。

Conclusion: 随着语言智能体能力增强，检索质量不仅取决于推理能力，还取决于模型与语料交互的接口分辨率；DCI为智能体搜索打开了更广阔的接口设计空间。

Abstract: Modern retrieval systems, whether lexical or semantic, expose a corpus through a fixed similarity interface that compresses access into a single top-k retrieval step before reasoning. This abstraction is efficient, but for agentic search, it becomes a bottleneck: exact lexical constraints, sparse clue conjunctions, local context checks, and multi-step hypothesis refinement are difficult to implement by calling a conventional off-the-shelf retriever, and evidence filtered out early cannot be recovered by stronger downstream reasoning. Agentic tasks further exacerbate this limitation because they require agents to orchestrate multiple steps, including discovering intermediate entities, combining weak clues, and revising the plan after observing partial evidence. To tackle the limitation, we study direct corpus interaction (DCI), where an agent searches the raw corpus directly with general-purpose terminal tools (e.g., grep, file reads, shell commands, lightweight scripts), without any embedding model, vector index, or retrieval API. This approach requires no offline indexing and adapts naturally to evolving local corpora. Across IR benchmarks and end-to-end agentic search tasks, this simple setup substantially outperforms strong sparse, dense, and reranking baselines on several BRIGHT and BEIR datasets, and attains strong accuracy on BrowseComp-Plus and multi-hop QA without relying on any conventional semantic retriever. Our results indicate that as language agents become stronger, retrieval quality depends not only on reasoning ability but also on the resolution of the interface through which the model interacts with the corpus, with which DCI opens a broader interface-design space for agentic search.

</details>


### [220] [Towards Dependable Retrieval-Augmented Generation Using Factual Confidence Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05244)
*Florian Geissler,Francesco Carella,Laura Fieback,Jakob Spiegelberg*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两阶段方法来预测检索增强生成（RAG）输出的事实忠实性：第一阶段使用共形预测筛选高置信度的检索块，第二阶段使用基于注意力的事实性分类器量化生成答案与检索上下文的一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前的RAG系统面临检索到的上下文可能包含无关或误导性信息的问题，缺乏对检索过程事实性的可靠置信度量，需要一种方法来评估生成答案的事实忠实性。

Method: 两阶段方法：1）使用共形预测（conformal prediction）筛选来自正确来源的高概率检索块，并提供诊断指标评估设置的适用性；2）使用基于注意力机制的事实性分类器（attention-based factuality classifier）量化生成答案与给定检索上下文之间的一致性置信度。

Result: 第一阶段可将答案质量提升最多6%，但统计保证不普遍成立；第二阶段可检测高达77%的不一致答案。

Conclusion: 该工作为广泛的工业NLP应用建立了一种新型的经过认证的RAG系统，通过两阶段方法增强了RAG输出的可靠性和可解释性。

Abstract: Incorporating specific knowledge into large language models via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a widespread technique that fuels many of today's industry AI applications. A fundamental problem is to assess if the context retrieved by some similarity search provides indeed supporting facts, or instead misguides the generator with irrelevant information. It is critical to associate meaningful confidence measures about the factuality of the retrieval process with the generated answers. We present a new, two-staged approach to predict fact faithfulness of the output of retrieval-augmented generations. First, we employ conformal prediction to select only those retrieved chunks who have a high chance to come from the correct source. This approach in itself can improve answer quality by up to 6% in some of the studied datasets, however, the associated statistical guarantees do not hold generally, since the assumption of sample exchangeability depends on the retriever setup. We present diagnostic metrics to assess whether a setup is suitable. Second, we quantify confidence in the consistency of a generated final answer with a given retrieved context, using an attention-based factuality classifier. This approach can detect inconsistent answers with a chance of up to 77%. Our work helps to establish a novel type of certified RAG systems for a broad range of natural language industry applications.

</details>


### [221] [TriAlignGR: Triangular Multitask Alignment with Multimodal Deep Interest Mining for Generative Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05249)
*Yangchen Zeng,Hao Peng,Rongfeng Guo,Zhenyu Yu,Zhiyuan Hu,Jinze Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: TriAlignGR提出统一多任务-多模态生成式推荐框架，通过两阶段多模态语义传播解决SID内容退化（SCD）和语义不透明（SSO）问题，核心组件包括跨模态语义对齐、多模态深度兴趣挖掘和三角多任务学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SID管道存在两个根本问题：SCD（级联编码和残差量化丢失关键多模态和兴趣级语义）和SSO（模型自回归生成SID序列但未真正理解其含义，导致幻觉和泛化差）。先前工作最多只做到文本-SID对齐，视觉语义和潜在用户兴趣完全未被利用。

Method: 三个紧密集成组件：1) CMSA：通过VLM生成的文本描述和多模态嵌入模型将视觉内容融入SID构建；2) MDIM：利用LLM思维链推理提取潜在用户意图；3) TMT：在单一自回归损失下联合训练八个互补生成任务，包含两个新颖的视觉语义任务（VisDesc→SID, VisDesc→Title），形成SID-文本-图像三角形。

Result: 论文尚未展示具体实验结果，但从方法设计看，TriAlignGR应能有效保留多模态语义，提升模型对SID语义的理解，减少幻觉，增强泛化能力。

Conclusion: TriAlignGR通过统一框架同时解决了SCD和SSO两个问题，首次将视觉语义和潜在用户兴趣系统性地融入SID生成式推荐，为多模态推荐提供了新范式。

Abstract: We introduce TriAlignGR, a unified multitask-multimodal framework for generative recommendation that establishes two-stage multimodal semantic propagation: (i) encoding visual semantics directly into SIDs via multimodal embeddings, and (ii) enabling the model to decode these semantics through visual description tasks. Existing Semantic ID (SID) pipelines suffer from two fundamental but underexplored problems: \textbf{SID Content Degradation (SCD)}, where cascaded encoding and residual quantization discard critical multimodal and interest-level semantics; and \textbf{SID Semantic Opacity (SSO)}, where models autoregressively generate SID sequences without truly comprehending their underlying meaning, leading to hallucination and poor generalization. Prior work addresses at most text-SID alignment, leaving visual semantics and latent user interests entirely unexploited. TriAlignGR resolves both problems through three tightly integrated components: (1)~\textbf{Cross-Modal Semantic Alignment (CMSA)} integrates visual content into SID construction through both VLM-generated textual descriptions and a multimodal embedding model that directly encodes image features alongside text, ensuring that SIDs inherently carry multimodal semantics; (2)~\textbf{Multimodal Deep Interest Mining (MDIM)} leverages LLM Chain-of-Thought reasoning to extract latent user intents (\eg ``productivity-focused lifestyle'' from noise-canceling headphones) beyond surface attributes, enriching SID semantics before discretization; and (3)~\textbf{Triangular Multitask (TMT)} jointly trains on eight complementary generation tasks under a single autoregressive loss -- including two novel visual-semantic tasks (VisDesc$\to$SID, VisDesc$\to$Title) that map VLM-generated image descriptions to SIDs and titles, completing the SID-Text-Image triangle -- without requiring task-specific towers or complex loss weighting.

</details>


### [222] [Decision-aware User Simulation Agent for Evaluating Conversational Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05250)
*Yuan-Chi Li,Li-Chi Chen,Sung-Yi Wu,Yu-Che Tsai,Shou-De Lin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 针对现有对话推荐系统用户模拟器在决策过程建模上的不足（如LLM模拟器信息处理能力过强、缺乏犹豫和延迟决策行为），提出Hesitator——一个基于理论（选择过载）的用户模拟框架，通过模块化分离效用选择与承诺决策，实验证明能缓解非真实行为并复现行为经济学模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有用户模拟器未能真实建模人类决策过程，尤其是LLM模拟器展现出不切实际的强信息处理能力，很少表现出犹豫或决策延迟行为，导致接受概率过高，无法真实反映消费者在面临过多选择时的真实行为。

Method: 提出Hesitator框架，引入模块化决策模块（Decision Module），将效用驱动的物品选择与感知过载驱动的承诺决策分离，显式建模选择过载下的犹豫与延迟行为。

Result: 在多种用户模拟框架、领域、销售模式和LLM主干上验证，集成该模块能持续缓解过载条件下的不真实行为；同时复现了行为经济学中的已知模式。

Conclusion: Hesitator能有效提升用户模拟器的真实性，通过引入选择过载理论显式建模人类决策过程中的犹豫与延迟，为对话推荐系统的评估提供更可靠的模拟工具。

Abstract: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) increasingly rely on user simulators for automated evaluation of sales agents. A key requirement for such simulators is the ability to model human decision-making. However, most existing simulation frameworks do not explicitly model the internal decision process, and LLM-based simulators often exhibit unrealistically strong information-processing capabilities, rarely exhibit the hesitation or decision deferral commonly observed in real consumer behavior, resulting in overly high acceptance probabilities. To address this limitation, we propose Hesitator, a theory-grounded user simulation framework that explicitly models human decision-making under choice overload. The framework introduces a modular Decision Module that separates utility-based item selection from overload-aware commitment decisions. Experiments across multiple user simulation frameworks, domains, sales modes, and LLM backbones show that integrating our module consistently mitigates unrealistic behaviors under increasing overload conditions. Furthermore, Hesitator reproduces established behavioral patterns from psychological economics, demonstrating its ability to model human decision behavior.

</details>


### [223] [EnterpriseRAG-Bench: A RAG Benchmark for Company Internal Knowledge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05253)
*Yuhong Sun,Joachim Rahmfeld,Chris Weaver,Roshan Desai,Wenxi Huang,Mark H. Butler*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: EnterpriseRAG-Bench 是一个包含约50万份文档、500个问题的企业级RAG基准数据集，涵盖9种企业数据源类型和10类推理能力测试，并提供了生成框架和排行榜。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG数据集和基准主要聚焦于网络或公开数据源，缺乏真实反映公司内部知识特点的数据集，而企业和研究者正越来越多地开发需要处理这类专有数据的AI Agent。

Method: 构建了涵盖9种企业数据源（Slack、Gmail等）的约50万份文档合成语料库，加入跨文档一致性、真实噪声（错放文件、近似重复、冲突信息），设计了10类共500个问题，并提供可定制化的生成框架。

Result: 发布了EnterpriseRAG-Bench数据集、生成框架、评估工具和排行榜，包含500,000+文档和500个问题。

Conclusion: 填补了企业级RAG评估的空白，提供了更贴近真实企业知识场景的基准，支持团队根据自身需求生成定制化变体。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become the standard approach for grounding large language models in information that was not available during training. While existing datasets and benchmarks focus on web or other public sources, there is still no widely adopted dataset that realistically reflects the nature of company-internal knowledge. Meanwhile, startups, enterprises, and researchers are increasingly developing AI Agents designed to operate over exactly this kind of proprietary data. To close this gap, we release a synthetic enterprise corpus, its generation framework, and a leaderboard.
  We present EnterpriseRAG-Bench, a dataset consisting of approximately 500,000 documents spanning nine enterprise source types (Slack, Gmail, Linear, Google Drive, HubSpot, Fireflies, GitHub, Jira, and Confluence) and 500 questions across ten categories that test distinct retrieval and reasoning capabilities. The corpus is generated with cross-document coherence (grounded in shared projects, people, and initiatives) and augmented with realistic noise such as misfiled documents, near-duplicates, and conflicting information. The question set ranges from simple single-document lookups to multi-document reasoning, constrained retrieval, conflict resolution, and recognizing when information is absent. The generation framework lets teams generate variants tailored to their own industry, scale, and source mix. The dataset, code, evaluation harness, and leaderboard are available at https://github.com/onyx-dot-app/EnterpriseRAG-Bench.

</details>


### [224] [Career-Aware Resume Tailoring via Multi-Source Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Provenance Tracking: A Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05257)
*Kumar Abhinav*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出Resume Tailor—一个基于向量数据库和多重RAG的智能简历定制系统，通过维护职业履历库来跨文档检索相关经历。在9个职位描述上的初步评估显示，当候选人有相关职业背景时，系统可将ATS匹配分数平均提升7.8分；若缺少相关经验则下降8.0分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI辅助简历定制系统仅基于单份上传简历进行操作，导致两个问题：一是无法恢复当前草稿中遗漏的相关经历，二是用户难以区分真实编辑与模型生成的建议。

Method: 构建纵向职业履历库（向量数据库）存储多版本简历和结构化职业记录；采用12节点LangGraph流水线实现多重检索增强生成，包含类型化状态管理、混合语义-词汇置信度评分、可溯源的后备生成、反幻觉护栏和条件审核循环。

Result: 在9个JD上的评估表明：对6个候选人有相关经验的JD，启用履历库使ATS评分平均提升7.8分；对2个领域专业知识缺失的JD，评分下降8.0分；1个部分重叠角色获得2分的适度提升。

Conclusion: 纵向检索在存在相关经验时能有效改进简历定制效果，但需要引入置信度门控机制来处理领域重叠度不足的情况。

Abstract: AI-assisted resume tailoring systems commonly operate on a single uploaded resume, which limits their ability to recover relevant experience omitted from the current draft and makes it difficult for users to distinguish grounded edits from model-generated suggestions. This paper presents Resume Tailor, an agentic resume-tailoring system that maintains a longitudinal career vault in a vector database and uses multi-source retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to assemble job-specific resume content from historical resumes and structured career records. The system is implemented as a 12-node LangGraph pipeline with typed state management, hybrid semantic-lexical confidence scoring, provenance-aware fallback generation, anti-hallucination guardrails, and a conditional review loop. We report a pilot evaluation on nine job descriptions (JDs) across software engineering, data analytics, and business analysis roles using a single candidate's career history. For six JDs where the candidate held at least one prior role in the same occupational category, enabling the career vault improved Applicant Tracking System (ATS)-style fit scores by an average of 7.8 points. For two JDs requiring domain-specific expertise absent from the vault, scores decreased by an average of 8.0 points. One partially overlapping role showed a modest gain of 2 points. These results suggest that longitudinal retrieval can improve resume tailoring when relevant prior experience exists, while also highlighting the need for confidence-gated retrieval when domain overlap is weak.

</details>


### [225] [Effective Knowledge Transfer for Multi-Task Recommendation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05730)
*Guohao Cai,Jun Yuan,Zhenhua Dong*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出EKTM方法，通过路由模块和转换模块在多个任务间传递知识，有效缓解了CVR预测中转化行为稀疏的问题，在基准数据集和工业场景中均取得显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CVR是衡量平台效果的关键指标，但用户的转化行为十分稀疏，导致排序模型难以有效训练。

Method: 提出EKTM方法，包含三个核心模块：(1) 路由模块，用于跨任务整合和传播知识；(2) 发射器模块，使每个CVR任务能转换来自路由器的知识；(3) 增强模块，确保迁移的知识有助于原始任务学习。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法；在商业平台的在线A/B测试中，eCPM提升3.93%，并已在两个主要流量场景中全面部署。

Conclusion: EKTM通过有效的知识迁移机制，缓解了CVR预测中的稀疏性问题，在大规模工业场景中验证了其有效性和可部署性。

Abstract: The conversion rate (CVR) is a crucial metric for evaluating the effectiveness of platforms, as it quantifies the alignment of content with audience preferences. However, the limited nature of customers' conversion actions presents a significant challenge for training ranking models effectively. In this paper, we propose an Effective Knowledge Transfer method for Multi-task Recommendation Models (EKTM). This method enables the ranking model to learn from diverse user behaviors, thereby enhancing performance through the transfer of knowledge across distinct yet related tasks. Each specific CVR task can directly benefit from the insights provided by other tasks. To achieve this, we first introduce a router module that integrates and disseminates knowledge across tasks. Subsequently, each CVR task is equipped with a transmitter module that facilitates the transformation of knowledge from the router. Additionally, we propose an enhanced module to ensure that the transferred knowledge benefit the original task learning. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches. Online A/B testing on a commercial platform has validated the effectiveness of the EKTM algorithm in large-scale industrial settings, resulting in a 3.93% uplift in effective Cost Per Mille (eCPM). The algorithm has since been fully deployed across two of the platform's main-traffic scenarios.

</details>


### [226] [Beyond Long Tail POIs: Transition-Centered Generalization for Human Mobility Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05771)
*Dingyang Lyu,Zhengjia Xu,Jey Han Lau,Jianzhong Qi*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出RECAP框架，通过组合泛化解决人类移动预测中的过渡级长尾问题，利用多跳传递性和历史轨迹重访证据重构长尾转移，并采用warm-transition holdout训练提升预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究关注POI级别的长尾问题，但本文发现即使热门POI的预测也会失败，根本原因在于源-目的地转移对的稀疏性（transition-level sparsity），即某些转移在训练集中极少出现或从未出现。

Method: 提出RECAP框架，将长尾转移问题建模为组合泛化问题，从两个可泛化信号（全局转移图的多跳传递性、用户历史轨迹的重访证据）重构长尾转移，并使用warm-transition holdout训练方法抑制对频繁转移的记忆、鼓励利用可迁移信号进行泛化。

Result: 在多个真实数据集上，RECAP持续提升预测准确率，尤其在尾部转移上取得显著提升。

Conclusion: 人类移动预测的核心瓶颈在于过渡级长尾泛化问题，而非单纯的POI级长尾；通过组合泛化视角和针对性训练策略可有效缓解该问题。

Abstract: Human mobility prediction forecasts a user's next Point of Interest (POI) from historical trajectories, supporting applications from recommendation to urban planning. Recent studies have recognized the problem with long-tail POIs in human mobility prediction, which are POIs with few visit records, making new visits to such POIs difficult to predict. Our analysis shows that many predictions fail even for visits to popular POIs. The underlying cause is often transition-level sparsity: the corresponding source-destination transition appears rarely, or never appears, in the training set. We therefore argue that a core bottleneck in human mobility prediction lies in transition-level long-tail generalization. We formulate this problem as compositional generalization and propose a tRansition rEconstruction framework for Compositional generAlization in next-POI prediction (RECAP). RECAP reconstructs long-tail transitions from two generalizable signals: multi-hop transitivity in the global transition graph and revisit evidence from a user's historical trajectory. It further uses warm-transition holdout training to discourage memorization of frequent transitions and encourage generalization from transferable signals. Experiments on multiple real-world datasets show that RECAP consistently improves prediction accuracy, with clear gains on tail transitions.

</details>


### [227] [Unified Value Alignment for Generative Recommendation in Industrial Advertising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05803)
*Xinxun Zhang,Yuling Xiong,Jiale Zhou,Zhengkai Guo,Zhennan Pang,Junbang Huo,Jingwen Wang,Xuyang Sun,Enming Zhang,Jiaguang Jin,Changping Wang,Yi Li,Jun Zhang,Xiao Yan,Jiawei Jiang,Jie Jiang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: UniVA是一个统一价值对齐框架，通过商业SID分词器、生成即排序的解码器、价值引导的波束搜索三大组件，将商业价值信号融入生成式推荐的全流程，在广告推荐场景中显著提升命中率和GMV。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式推荐在工业广告场景中难以直接应用，因为现有方法仅关注语义信号，无法有效将商业价值信号对齐到分词、解码和在线服务等环节。

Method: 1) 提出Commercial SID tokenizer，将价值相关属性注入SID构建；2) 提出Generation-as-Ranking SID Decoder，联合监督学习和eCPM感知的强化学习优化；3) 设计价值引导的个性化波束搜索，复用解码logits作为在线价值引导，用个性化trie树约束解码路径。

Result: 在腾讯微信视频号广告平台实验中，离线Hit Rate@100提升37.04%，在线A/B测试GMV提升1.5%。

Conclusion: UniVA通过统一价值对齐框架，成功将商业价值信号融入生成式广告推荐的各环节，验证了其在工业场景中的有效性和实用价值。

Abstract: Generative Recommendation (GR) reformulates recommendation as a next-token generation problem and has shown promise in industrial applications. However, extending GR to industrial advertising is non-trivial because the system must optimize not only user interest but also commercial value. Existing GR pipelines remain largely semantics-centric, making it difficult to align value signals across tokenization, decoding, and online serving. To address this issue, we propose UniVA, a Unified Value Alignment framework for advertising recommendation. We first introduce a Commercial SID tokenizer that injects value-related attributes into SID construction, yielding value-discriminative item representations. We then develop a Generation-as-Ranking SID Decoder jointly optimized by supervised learning and eCPM-aware reinforcement learning, which fuses value scores into next-item SID generation to perform generation and ranking in one decoding process. Finally, we design a value-guided personalized beam search that reuses generation-as-ranking logits as online value guidance and applies a personalized trie tree to constrain decoding to request-valid SID paths. Experiments on the Tencent WeChat Channels advertising platform show that UniVA achieves a 37.04\% improvement in offline Hit Rate@100 over the baseline and a 1.5\% GMV lift in online A/B tests.

</details>


### [228] [Bridging Passive and Active: Enhancing Conversation Starter Recommendation via Active Expression Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05855)
*Yiqing Wu,Haoming Li,Guanyu Jiang,Jiahao Liang,Yongchun Zhu,Jingwu Chen,Feng Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出PA-Bridge框架，通过对抗分布对齐器桥接被动推荐起始句和主动用户表达之间的分布差异，并引入语义离散化器支持流行度去偏算法，以打破对话搜索中被动推荐系统的回声室效应，在线A/B测试显示特征渗透率提升0.54%，用户活跃天数提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的对话搜索中，对话起始句推荐依赖"曝光-点击"闭环反馈机制，导致系统陷入回声室效应，偏向流行但通用的建议，无法捕捉开放世界中用户动态变化的搜索意图。

Method: 提出PA-Bridge框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 对抗分布对齐器，用于桥接被动推荐起始句与主动用户表达之间的分布差异；2) 语义离散化器，将开放文本转化为可处理的形式，以便应用流行度去偏算法。

Result: 在线A/B测试显示，PA-Bridge显著提升特征渗透率0.54%和用户活跃天数。

Conclusion: 通过利用用户的主动表达（"自由意志"）来打破传统被动推荐的反馈循环，可以有效提升对话搜索系统的推荐质量和用户参与度。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-driven conversational search is shifting information retrieval from reactive keyword matching to proactive, open-ended dialogues. In this context, Conversation Starters are widely deployed to provide personalized query recommendations that help users initiate dialogues. Conventionally, recommending these starters relies on a closed "exposure-click" loop. Yet, this feedback loop mechanism traps the system in an echo chamber where, compounded by data sparsity, it fails to capture the dynamic nature of conversational search intents shaped by the open world. As a result, the system skews towards popular but generic suggestions.In this work, we uncover an untapped paradigm shift to shatter this harmful feedback loop: harnessing user "free will" through active user expressions. Unlike traditional recommendations, conversational search empowers users to bypass menus entirely through manually typed queries. The open-world intents in active queries hold the key to breaking this loop. However, incorporating them is non-trivial: (1) there exists an inherent distribution shift between active queries and formulated starters. (2) Furthermore, the "non-ID-able" nature of open text renders traditional item-based popularity statistics ineffective for large-scale industrial streaming training. To this end, we propose Passive-Active Bridge (PA-Bridge), a novel framework that employs an adversarial distribution aligner to bridge the distributional gap between passively recommended starters and active expressions. Moreover, we introduce a semantic discretizer to enable the deployment of popularity debiasing algorithms. Online A/B tests on our platform, demonstrate that PA-Bridge significantly boosts the Feature Penetration Rate by 0.54% and User Active Days

</details>


### [229] [A Case-Driven Multi-Agent Framework for E-Commerce Search Relevance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05991)
*Global E-Commerce Search Relevance Team*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多智能体框架，用自主智能体替代电商搜索相关性优化中的人类角色（产品经理、标注员、算法工程师、评估员等），实现从坏例识别到解决的自动化闭环，显著提升了标注准确率和坏例解决的及时性与泛化性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电商搜索相关性优化涉及多个人类角色的闭环协作（用户反馈、标准制定、数据标注、模型优化、性能评估），实际工作中核心是系统性解决用户感知的坏例。作者提出疑问：能否用自主智能体替代这些人类角色，实现生态系统的重构？

Method: 提出一个案例驱动的多智能体框架，包含：1) 标注智能体（多轮标注）；2) 优化智能体（自主分析并解决坏例）；3) 用户智能体（通过对话交互识别坏例）。为提升实用性，采用约束工程范式，构建统一检索-排序模型、指令跟随相关性模型、全局记忆减少信息不对称、深度搜索智能体定位低估失败、以及人机协作聊天机器人。

Result: 广泛的人工评估表明，该框架能有效执行相关性相关任务，提升标注准确率，实现更及时且更具泛化性的坏例解决。

Conclusion: 该多智能体框架为工业级搜索相关性优化提供了一种实用范式，证明了用自主智能体替代人类角色构建自动化、持续进化系统的可行性。

Abstract: Relevance is a foundation of user experience in e-commerce search. We view relevance optimization as a closed-loop ecosystem involving multiple human roles: users who provide feedback, product managers who define standards, annotators who label data, algorithm engineers who optimize models, and evaluators who assess performance. Because improving relevance in practice means systematically resolving user-perceived bad cases, we ask a system-level question: can this ecosystem be reimagined by replacing its human roles with autonomous agents? To answer this question, we propose a case-driven multi-agent framework that automates the pipeline from bad-case identification to resolution. The framework instantiates an Annotator Agent for multi-turn annotation, an Optimizer Agent for autonomous bad-case analysis and resolution, and a User Agent that identifies bad cases through conversational interaction, together forming an autonomous and continually evolving system. To make the framework practical in production, we further adopt a harness-engineering paradigm and build a unified retrieval-and-ranking relevance model for efficient training, an instruction-following relevance model for real-time case resolution, Global Memory to reduce information asymmetry across agents, a Deep Search Agent to target underestimation failures, and an agent-based chatbot for human--agent collaboration. Extensive human evaluation shows that the framework performs relevance-related tasks effectively, improves annotation accuracy, and enables more timely and generalizable bad-case resolution, indicating a practical paradigm for industrial search relevance optimization.

</details>


### [230] [OBLIQ-Bench: Exposing Overlooked Bottlenecks in Modern Retrievers with Latent and Implicit Queries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06235)
*Diane Tchuindjo,Devavrat Shah,Omar Khattab*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出“倾斜查询”（oblique queries）概念——需要检索隐含模式的文档（如立场隐晦的推文、特定失败的聊天记录），并创建了OBLIQ-Bench基准测试。发现当前检索系统在召回相关文档方面表现很差，但推理型LLM在验证已召回文档时表现良好，揭示了检索与验证之间存在不对称性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索基准趋于饱和，但高效搜索远未解决。作者识别出一类被忽视的“倾斜查询”，即需要检索隐含潜在模式的文档，现有方法难以处理。

Method: 1. 定义了倾斜查询的三种产生机制；2. 构建了OBLIQ-Bench基准，包含五个基于真实长尾语料的倾斜搜索问题；3. 对比了检索管道与推理型LLM的表现差异。

Result: 推理LLM在被召回的相关文档上能可靠识别潜在相关性，但即使最先进的检索管道也无法召回大部分相关文档，存在显著的检索-验证不对称性。

Conclusion: OBLIQ-Bench揭示了检索系统在捕捉隐含模式和隐式信号方面的短板，希望推动针对倾斜查询的检索架构研究。

Abstract: Retrieval benchmarks are increasingly saturating, but we argue that efficient search is far from a solved problem. We identify a class of queries we call oblique, which seek documents that instantiate a latent pattern, like finding all tweets that express an implicit stance, chat logs that demonstrate a particular failure mode, or transcripts that match an abstract scenario. We study three mechanisms through which obliqueness may arise and introduce OBLIQ-Bench, a suite of five oblique search problems over real long-tail corpora. OBLIQ-Bench exposes an overlooked asymmetry between retrieval and verification, where reasoning LLMs reliably recognize latent relevance whenever relevant documents are surfaced, but even sophisticated retrieval pipelines fail to surface most relevant documents in the first place. We hope that OBLIQ-Bench will drive research into retrieval architectures that efficiently capture latent patterns and implicit signals in large corpora.

</details>


### [231] [Expressiveness Limits of Autoregressive Semantic ID Generation in Generative Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06331)
*Yupeng Hou,Haven Kim,Clark Mingxuan Ju,Eduardo Escoto,Neil Shah,Julian McAuley*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文指出了生成式推荐（GR）模型中自回归解码树结构导致项目概率与树结构强相关、限制了模型表达能力的问题，并提出Latte——通过在语义ID前注入潜变量token来重塑解码空间，从而缓解树结构导致的概率耦合，在NDCG@10上取得平均3.45%的相对提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式推荐模型采用自回归方式生成语义ID token，但由此形成的树状解码结构对模型表达能力的影响尚未被充分探索。作者观察到树结构中距离近的项目对同一用户具有相似的概率分布，这限制了模型区分用户细粒度偏好的能力。

Method: 提出Latte模型，在每个语义ID序列前注入一个潜变量token（latent token），将原本单一的解码树结构重塑为多个由潜变量token条件化的子树，从而增加项目间的多样性路径和树距离，缓解树结构导致的概率耦合问题。

Result: 在生成式推荐基准任务上，Latte在NDCG@10上取得平均3.45%的相对提升，验证了通过潜变量token重塑解码空间的有效性。

Conclusion: 生成式推荐中的树状解码结构会引入结构性的概率耦合，限制模型表达能力；Latte通过引入潜变量token提供了一种简单有效的缓解方案，为生成式推荐模型的设计提供了新视角。

Abstract: Generative recommendation (GR) models generate items by autoregressively producing a sequence of discrete tokens that jointly index the target item. However, this autoregressive generation process also induces a structured decoding space whose impact on model expressiveness remains underexplored. Specifically, token-by-token generation can be viewed as traversing a decoding tree induced by semantic ID tokens, where leaf nodes correspond to candidate items. We observe that the item probabilities produced by GR models are strongly correlated with this tree structure: items that are close in the tree tend to receive similar probabilities for any given user, making it difficult to distinguish among them based on user-specific preferences. We further show theoretically that such structural correlations prevent GR models from representing even simple patterns that can be well captured by conventional collaborative filtering models. To mitigate this issue, we propose Latte, a simple modification that injects a latent token before each semantic ID, reshaping the decoding space from a single tree into multiple latent-token-conditioned trees. This design creates multiple paths with varying tree distances between items, relaxing tree-induced probability coupling and yielding an average of 3.45% relative improvement on NDCG@10. Our code is available at https://github.com/hyp1231/Latte.

</details>


### [232] [Light-FMP: Lightweight Feature and Model Pruning for Enhanced Deep Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06441)
*Nghia Bui,Yue Ning,Lijing Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: Light-FMP框架通过预训练、剪枝和继续训练三个阶段，使用硬混凝土分布高效识别重要特征，在保证推荐准确性的同时显著提升计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度推荐系统在高维输入特征场景下难以平衡计算效率与模型准确性，现有方法要么牺牲效率追求精度，要么牺牲精度追求效率。

Method: 提出三阶段框架：1) 预训练阶段，利用硬混凝土分布在少量数据子集上高效训练掩码层识别重要特征；2) 剪枝阶段，剪除不重要特征和模型参数；3) 继续训练阶段，在剩余数据集上使用领域自适应参数继续训练。

Result: 在真实推荐系统基准数据集上，Light-FMP在效率和准确性方面均优于现有方法，同时保持可扩展性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: Light-FMP成功实现了深度推荐系统中计算效率与模型准确性的有效平衡，且具备良好的可扩展性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Deep recommender systems (DRS) often face challenges in balancing computational efficiency and model accuracy, especially when handling high-dimensional input features. Existing methods either focus on improving accuracy while neglecting training efficiency or prioritize efficiency at the cost of suboptimal accuracy across tasks. We propose Light-FMP: Lightweight Feature and Model Pruning for Enhanced DRS, a lightweight framework that addresses the challenges through three key phases: \textit{pretraining}, \textit{pruning}, and \textit{continued training}. Using a hard concrete distribution, a masking layer is efficiently pretrained on a small data subset to identify important features. The model and features are then pruned, and training continues on the remaining dataset with domain-adapted parameters. Experiments on benchmark datasets from real-world recommender systems demonstrate that Light-FMP outperforms existing methods in both efficiency and accuracy while maintaining scalability and robustness.

</details>


### [233] [Superintelligent Retrieval Agent: The Next Frontier of Information Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06647)
*Zeyu Yang,Qi Ma,Jason Chen,Anshumali Shrivastava*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出SIRA，一种将多轮探索性搜索压缩为单次检索动作的超级智能检索代理，通过LLM增强文档与查询词汇，并利用文档频率统计过滤，在BEIR基准测试中超越密集检索器和多轮代理基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索增强代理将检索视为黑箱，通过多轮探索性查询迭代获取证据，类似新手搜索数据库而非专家利用先验知识的方式，导致不必要的检索轮次、高延迟和低召回率。

Method: SIRA定义检索超智能为将多轮探索压缩为单次语料区分性检索。LLM离线为文档补充缺失搜索词汇，在线预测查询缺失的证据词汇，并通过文档频率统计作为工具调用过滤术语，最终使用加权BM25进行单次检索。

Result: 在10个BEIR基准和下游QA任务上，SIRA显著优于密集检索器和最先进的多轮代理基线，证明一个精心构造的词法查询可超越更昂贵的多轮搜索。

Conclusion: SIRA表明，结合LLM认知与轻量级语料统计的单次词法检索，在保持可解释性、无需训练和高效率的同时，能达到甚至超越多轮复杂搜索的性能。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented agents are increasingly the interface to large organizational knowledge bases, yet most still treat retrieval as a black box: they issue exploratory queries, inspect returned snippets, and iteratively reformulate until useful evidence emerges. This approach resembles how a newcomer searches an unfamiliar database rather than how an expert navigates it with strong priors about terminology and likely evidence, and results in unnecessary retrieval rounds, increased latency, and poor recall.
  We introduce \textit{SuperIntelligent Retrieval Agent} (SIRA), which defines \emph{superintelligence} in retrieval as the ability to compress multi-round exploratory search into a single corpus-discriminative retrieval action. SIRA does not merely ask what terms are relevant to the query; it asks which terms are likely to separate the desired evidence from corpus-level confusers. On the corpus side, an LLM enriches each document offline with missing search vocabulary; on the query side, it predicts evidence vocabulary omitted by the query; and document-frequency statistics as a tool call to filter proposed terms that are absent, overly common, or unlikely to create retrieval margin. The final retrieval step is a single weighted BM25 call combining the original query with the validated expansion.
  Across ten BEIR benchmarks and downstream question-answering tasks, SIRA achieves the significantly superior performance outperforming dense retrievers and state-of-the-art multi-round agentic baselines, demonstrating that one well-formed lexical query, guided by LLM cognition and lightweight corpus statistics, can exceed substantially more expensive multi-round search while remaining interpretable, training-free, and efficient.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [234] [Direct From Darwin: Deriving Advanced Optimizers From Evolutionary First Principles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05284)
*Daniel Grimmer*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文从进化第一性原理推导出梯度优化算法族，提出达尔文谱系模拟（DLS）证明Fisher和Wright的进化观在无性繁殖背景下形式等价，并通过添加DLS噪声使SGD、Adam等现代优化器成为进化上有效的仿真工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 进化计算长期承诺兼具高性能优化工具与达尔文进化的严谨科学仿真，但现代算法常为了物理启发式或浅层生物隐喻而放弃进化保真度。作者希望弥合优化算法与真实进化动力学之间的鸿沟。

Method: 提出Darwinian Lineage Simulations (DLS)，通过将Fisher确定性演化的总种群划分为Wright随机漂移的子种群，推导出DLS噪声关系，并证明满足该关系的任何记账选择都能忠实模拟进化。进而证明SGD、自然梯度下降、阻尼牛顿法、Adam等优化器通过添加DLS噪声即可成为进化仿真。

Result: 证明了Fisher和Wright的进化观在形式上等价；证明了SGD、自然梯度下降、阻尼牛顿法等优化器天然与进化动力学兼容；证明了Adam通过微小数学修正即可符合进化原则。

Conclusion: 现代梯度优化算法与真实达尔文进化动力学并非对立，通过合理引入遗传漂移噪声，可以统一优化与进化仿真两个领域，为进化计算提供新的理论基础。

Abstract: Evolutionary computation has long promised to deliver both high-performance optimization tools as well as rigorous scientific simulations of Darwinian evolution. However, modern algorithms frequently abandon evolutionary fidelity for physics-inspired heuristics or superficial biological metaphors. This paper derives a suite of advanced gradient-based optimization algorithms directly from evolutionary first principles. We introduce Darwinian Lineage Simulations (DLS) to prove that, in an asexual context, Fisher's and Wright's historically opposed views of evolution are actually formally equivalent. This unification requires carefully partitioning Fisher's deterministically-evolving total population into Wright's randomly-drifting sub-populations. We prove that proper bookkeeping requires introducing a specific kind of structured noise (the DLS noise relation). Crucially, however, any bookkeeping choices which satisfy this relation will result in a faithful simulation of evolution. Using this vast representational freedom, we prove that a broad family of battle-tested optimization algorithms are already perfectly compatible with evolutionary dynamics. These include: Stochastic Gradient Descent, Natural Gradient Descent, and the Damped Newton's method among many others. By simply adding DLS noise (i.e., evolutionarily faithful genetic drift), these algorithms become scientifically valid in silico simulations of Darwinian evolution. Finally, we demonstrate that even the state-of-the-art Adam optimizer can be brought into evolutionary compliance through a minor mathematical surgery.

</details>


### [235] [Efficient event-driven retrieval in high-capacity kernel Hopfield networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05978)
*Akira Tamamori*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文研究了KLR Hopfield网络在异步更新下的检索动力学，发现异步序列更新与同步更新的轨迹统计上不可区分，且在随机模式中实现了接近P/N≈30的经验存储容量，超越了经典极限。网络收敛所需的比特翻转次数接近初始汉明距离，表明其具有适合事件驱动计算的平滑能量景观。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高容量联想记忆模型（如KLR Hopfield网络）虽具有强大的存储能力，但其依赖计算昂贵的同步更新，成为部署在节能、事件驱动的神经形态硬件上的瓶颈。作者旨在探索异步更新机制以解决这一问题。

Method: 研究者通过实验方法，在适当调节核参数的情况下，比较了KLR Hopfield网络的异步序列更新与同步更新的动力学轨迹；同时评估了网络在静态随机模式下的经验存储容量，并通过分析状态转换（比特翻转）总数来衡量错误纠正所需的计算效率。

Result: 异步更新与同步更新的轨迹统计上不可区分，回忆准确度在测试范围内保持高位；异步网络在静态随机模式下实现了P/N≈30的经验存储容量，超越经典极限；网络收敛所需的比特翻转次数接近初始汉明距离，未观察到明显的虚假振荡。

Conclusion: KLR学习诱导的大间隔吸引子创造了平滑的能量景观，适合稀疏、事件驱动的计算，为在神经形态架构上实现可扩展、低功耗的联想记忆提供了基础。

Abstract: High-capacity associative memory models, such as Kernel Logistic Regression (KLR) Hopfield networks, have demonstrated strong storage capabilities but typically rely on computationally expensive synchronous updates. This reliance poses a bottleneck for deployment on energy-efficient, event-driven neuromorphic hardware. In this paper, we investigate the asynchronous retrieval dynamics of KLR Hopfield networks. We show empirically that, under appropriately tuned kernel parameters, asynchronous sequential updates exhibit trajectories that are statistically indistinguishable from those of synchronous dynamics, while maintaining high recall accuracy within the tested regime for random patterns. Furthermore, we find that the asynchronous network achieves empirical storage capacities approaching $P/N \approx 30$ in static random pattern regimes, exceeding classical limits. To evaluate computational efficiency, we analyze the total number of state transitions (bit flips) required for error correction. The results show that the network converges using a number of events close to the initial Hamming distance from the target pattern, without observable spurious oscillations. These findings suggest that the large-margin attractors induced by KLR learning create a smooth energy landscape suited for sparse, event-driven computation, providing a basis for scalable and low-power associative memory on neuromorphic architectures.

</details>


### [236] [CoupleEvo: Evolving Heuristics for Coupled Optimization Problems Using Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06341)
*Thomas Bömer,Bastian Amberg,Max Disselnmeyer,Anne Meyer*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出CoupleEvo框架，采用三种进化协调策略（顺序式、迭代式、集成式）利用大语言模型自动设计启发式算法，用于求解多子问题紧密耦合的复杂优化问题。实验表明分解式策略（顺序和迭代）收敛更稳定、解质量更高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的自动启发式设计方法仅适用于单问题场景，而现实世界中许多优化问题由多个紧密耦合的子问题组成，需要协调求解才能达到高性能。因此需要针对耦合优化问题的LLM驱动启发式自动设计方法。

Method: 提出CoupleEvo框架，包含三种进化协调策略：(1) 顺序策略——逐个依次进化各子问题的启发式；(2) 迭代策略——在不同子问题的启发式之间交替进化，跨代交替；(3) 集成策略——同时进化所有子问题的启发式。

Result: 在两个代表性耦合优化问题上的实验表明：基于分解的策略（顺序式和迭代式）收敛更稳定、解质量更高；集成进化策略则面临搜索复杂度增加和结果变异性大的问题。

Conclusion: 跨相互依赖子问题的进化搜索协调至关重要，证明了LLM驱动的启发式设计在复杂耦合优化问题中的潜力。

Abstract: Many real-world optimization problems consist of multiple tightly coupled subproblems whose solutions must be coordinated to achieve high overall performance. However, existing large language model driven automated heuristic design approaches are limited to single-problem settings. In this paper, we propose CoupleEvo. CoupleEvo proposes three evolutionary coordination strategies to evolve heuristics for coupled optimization problems: the sequential strategy evolves heuristics for one subproblem after the other; the iterative strategy alternates the evolution of heuristics for different subproblems over successive generations; and the integrated strategy evolves heuristics for all problems simultaneously. The approach is evaluated on two representative coupled optimization problems. Experimental results show that decomposition-based strategies (sequential and iterative) provide more stable convergence and higher solution quality, while the integrated evolution strategy suffers from increased search complexity and variability. These findings highlight the importance of coordinating evolutionary search across interdependent subproblems and demonstrate the potential of LLM-driven heuristic design for complex coupled optimization problems. The code is available: https://github.com/tb-git-kit-research/CoupleEvo.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [237] [Are Flat Minima an Illusion?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05209)
*Michael Timothy Bennett*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文挑战了神经网络泛化中“平坦最小值”理论，指出其依赖于参数化方式因而非因果关系。作者提出“弱性”（weakness）作为重参数化不变的真正驱动因素，并通过理论证明和实验（MNIST、Fashion-MNIST）展示弱性在预测泛化上优于平坦性和简单性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究认为神经网络在损失景观中的平坦区域泛化更好，Sharpness-Aware Minimisation等方法基于此。但作者指出平坦性可被函数保持的重参数化随意改变（如Hessian增大两个数量级），因此平坦性本身不可能是泛化的根本原因。需要找到真正、重参数化不变的泛化驱动因素。

Method: 提出“弱性”（weakness）概念：在学习者具身语言中，与所学函数兼容的完成空间（completions）的体积。弱性定义在网络的输出行为上，而非参数化方式，因此重参数化不变。理论上证明弱性在可交换需求下是极小化最大最优的，且PAC-Bayes界因其与弱性相关而有效。实验上：在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST上训练100个相同架构和训练方式的网络，对比弱性、锐度（sharpness）和简单性（simplicity）对泛化差距的预测能力。

Result: 1) 大batch泛化优势随训练数据增加而消失（MNIST上从n=2,000时的+1.6%降至n=60,000时的+0.02%），说明锐度是混杂因素而非原因。2) 在100个网络上，弱性显著预测泛化（MNIST: ρ=+0.374, p=0.00012；Fashion-MNIST: ρ=+0.384, p=8.15×10⁻⁵），锐度反相关（ρ=-0.226），简单性在MNIST上无预测力（p=0.848），在Fashion-MNIST上仅有部分预测力。

Conclusion: 平坦最小值并非泛化的真正原因；弱性才是重参数化不变的、真正驱动泛化的因素。简单性依赖于数据集，而弱性具有不变性。因此应重新审视神经网络的泛化理论基础，转向基于行为的度量。

Abstract: Neural networks that land in flat regions of the loss landscape tend to generalise better than those in sharp regions. Sharpness-Aware Minimisation exploits this to improve generalisation. But function-preserving reparameterisation can inflate the Hessian of any minimum by two orders of magnitude without changing a single prediction. If the geometry of weight space can be manufactured from nothing, it cannot be the cause of anything. In other words, flat is simple and simplicity depends on encoding. Here I show that the actual driver is weakness, the volume of completions compatible with the learned function in the learner's embodied language. Weakness is reparameterisation-invariant because it is defined over what the network \emph{does}, not how it is parameterised. I prove weakness is minimax-optimal under exchangeable demands, and that PAC-Bayes bounds work because they correlate with it. On MNIST, the large-batch generalisation advantage \emph{vanishes} as training data grows, from $+1.6\%$ at $n = 2{,}000$ to $+0.02\%$ at $n = 60{,}000$. A quantity whose predictive power depends on how much data you have is not a cause but a confounder. I run head-to-heads on 100 networks with identical architecture and training. For MNIST weakness predicts generalisation ($ρ= +0.374$, $p = 0.00012$), sharpness anticorrelates ($ρ= -0.226$) and simplicity predicts nothing ($p = 0.848$). For Fashion-MNIST ($ρ= +0.384$, $p = 8.15 \times 10^{-5}$), though simplicity is at least somewhat predictive there. Simplicity is dataset dependent, whereas weakness is invariant. Flat minima were never the answer.

</details>


### [238] [Evolutionary fine tuning of quantized convolution-based deep learning models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05228)
*Marcin Pietroń*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出使用进化策略优化深度神经网络的量化过程，通过迭代调整少量权重的量化状态，以提升预训练量化模型的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习模型在IoT、移动设备等场景中面临复杂度和内存过大的问题，现有基于最近邻量化的方法无法保证最优精度，因此需要更高效的量化优化技术。

Method: 采用进化策略作为优化方法，每次迭代改变少量权重的值，将其转移到不同的量化状态，通过适当的算子和参数设置快速提升量化模型精度。

Result: 在VGG、ResNet（图像分类与检测）以及自动编码器架构上进行了实验，验证了所提方法能快速提升量化模型的准确率。

Conclusion: 进化策略可以有效优化深度神经网络的量化过程，相比最近邻量化能获得更好的精度表现，适用于多种主流网络架构。

Abstract: Deep learning models are the most efficient models in many machine learning tasks. The main disadvantage when using them in IoT, mobile devices, independent autonomous or real-time systems is their complexity and memory size. Therefore, much research has concentrated on compression techniques of deep learning architectures. One of the most popular technique is quantization. In most of the works, the quantization is done based on the nearest neighbour quantization technique. This work focuses on improving the quantization efficiency in pretrained and quantized models. This approach has the potential to improve the final accuracy of quantized models. The main postulate of the work is that final quantization states of the network based on nearest neighbour rounding does not guarantee optimal accuracy. In the presented work, the evolution strategy is used as an optimization approach. The evolution in each iteration changes the values of the small percentage of weights. It shifts theirs values to different quantization states. The work shows that proposed evolution with an appropriate set of operators and parameters can fast improve the accuracy of the quantized models. The results are presented for popular architectures such as VGG and Resnet for image classification and detection. Additionally, simulations were carried out for the autoencoder architecture.

</details>


### [239] [Nationwide EHR-Based Chronic Rhinosinusitis Prediction Using Demographic-Stratified Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05213)
*Sicong Chang,Yidan Shen,Justina Varghese,Akshay R Prabhakar,Sebastian Guadarrama-Sistos-Vazquez,Jiefu Chen,Masayoshi Takashima,Omar G. Ahmed,Renjie Hu,Xin Fu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 利用《All of Us》全美纵向电子健康记录数据，通过混合特征选择与人口分层模型，在诊断前两年预测慢性鼻窦炎，AUC达0.8461。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 慢性鼻窦炎（CRS）早期识别困难，症状与过敏性鼻炎等常见病重叠，且异质性表型掩盖风险模式；现有预测研究多依赖单一机构队列，缺乏群体普适性。

Method: 采用《All of Us》全国纵向EHR数据，构建混合特征选择流程（基于患病率的统计筛选+模型重要性排序），将约11万候选代码压缩至100个可解释特征；按性别与生命阶段划分6个成年人亚组，进行分层模型训练与超参数调优。

Result: 总体AUC达0.8461，比最优基线模型提升0.0168。

Conclusion: 常规收集的EHR数据可支持具有人群代表性的CRS风险分层，有助于初级保健中的早期分诊与转诊优先级排序。

Abstract: Chronic rhinosinusitis (CRS) is a common heterogeneous inflammatory disorder that causes substantial morbidity and healthcare costs. CRS is difficult to identify early from routine encounters, as symptom presentations overlap with common conditions such as allergic rhinitis, and heterogeneous phenotypes further obscure risk patterns. Prior predictive studies often rely on single-institutional cohorts , which reduce population-level generalizability. To overcome this, we leveraged nationwide longitudinal EHR data from the \textit{All of Us} Research Program to predict CRS diagnosis using two years of pre-diagnostic history. To address extreme feature sparsity and dimensionality in coded EHR data, we implemented a hybrid feature-selection pipeline that combines prevalence-based statistical screening with model-based importance ranking, compressing approximately 110,000 candidate codes into 100 interpretable features. To capture demographic heterogeneity, we trained demographic stratified models across six adult sex and life-stage subgroups with subgroup-specific hyperparameter tuning. Our framework achieved an overall AUC of 0.8461, improving discrimination by 0.0168 over the best baseline. These results demonstrate that routinely collected EHR data may support population-representative CRS risk stratification and inform earlier triage and referral prioritization in primary care.

</details>


### [240] [Graph Normalization: Fast Binarizing Dynamics for Differentiable MWIS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05330)
*Laurent Guigues*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出图归一化（GN）方法，将其建模为一种可微分的动力系统，用于解决NP难的MWIS问题。GN保证收敛到最大独立集的二值指示器，等价于非线性演化博弈中的复制动力学，并证明了与Motzkin-Straus定理的加权推广之间的关联。在百万边规模的基准测试中，GN能在秒级内达到接近最优解（误差<1%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决NP难的MWIS问题（涵盖最优分配、调度、集合包装等众多组合优化难题），现有方法如信念传播缺乏收敛保证，而GN提供了一种既有收敛保证又可微分的近似求解引擎。

Method: 将MWIS求解建模为图上的动力系统，通过精确的Majorization-Minimization步骤实现快速拟牛顿下降；建立与非线性演化博弈中复制动力学的等价性；将Motzkin-Straus定理推广到加权情形，证明极大独立集与倾斜单纯形上二次型局部极小值一一对应。

Result: 在百万边规模的真实基准测试中，GN在CPU上数秒内找到接近最优解（误差<1%）；对于分配问题，GN作为Sinkhorn算法的变体自然收敛到硬分配；作为Bregman-Sinkhorn松弛MWIS求解器的二值化引擎表现优秀。

Conclusion: GN为深度学习架构中需要可微分的"硬"约束决策提供了新思路，可应用于结构稀疏注意力、动态网络剪枝、专家混合等，并支持计算机视觉、计算生物学和资源分配等领域的端到端约束优化学习。

Abstract: We introduce Graph Normalization (GN), a principled dynamical system on graphs that serves as a differentiable approximation engine for the NP-hard Maximum Weight Independent Set (MWIS) problem. MWIS encompasses many combinatorial challenges, including optimal assignment, scheduling, set packing, and MAP inference in discrete Markov Random Fields. Unlike Belief Propagation, we prove GN always converges to a binary indicator of a Maximum Independent Set. GN realizes a fast quasi-Newton descent through an exact Majorization-Minimization step, systematically improving the MWIS relaxed primal objective. We establish an equivalence between GN and the Replicator Dynamics of a nonlinear evolutionary game, where vertices compete for inclusion in an independent set. While a non-potential game, the GN game follows Fisher's Fundamental Theorem of Natural Selection, where the average fitness equals the MWIS primal objective and strictly increases. This connection leads to a weighted extension of the Motzkin-Straus theorem, showing MISes are in bijection with the local minima of a quadratic form over a tilted simplex. For the Assignment Problem, GN acts as a variant of the Sinkhorn algorithm that naturally converges to a hard assignment while generalizing to arbitrary constraint graphs. We demonstrate GN's performance as a fast binarization engine for the state-of-the-art Bregman-Sinkhorn relaxed MWIS solver. On real-world benchmarks with up to 1M edges, GN identifies solutions within 1% of the best known results in seconds on a CPU. GN opens new avenues for deep learning architectures requiring differentiable, "hard" decisions under constraints, with applications in structured sparse attention, dynamic network pruning, and Mixture-of-Experts. Beyond core AI, the GN framework enables end-to-end learning of constrained optimization in computer vision, computational biology, and resource allocation.

</details>


### [241] [SAT: Sequential Agent Tuning for Coordinator Free Plug and Play Multi-LLM Training with Monotonic Improvement Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05216)
*Yi Xie,Yangyang Xu,Yi Fan,Bo Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出序列化智能体调优（SAT），一种无需协调器的多智能体训练范式，通过分块坐标更新和序列感知优势估计，使得多个小型LLM组成的团队可以超越单一大型模型，并保证单调改进和即插即用不变性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单个大参数LLM虽然性能强但部署成本高昂，而用多个小模型组成的团队进行联合训练时存在复合分布偏移问题，导致训练不稳定和协调困难。

Method: 提出SAT框架：将团队表示为因式分解策略，采用分块坐标更新对智能体进行顺序训练；设计序列感知的on-policy优势估计器，结合逐智能体KL信任区域来隔离占据漂移。

Result: 三个4B参数智能体（总计12B）在SAT训练下，在AIME24/25基准上超越更大的Qwen3-32B平均3.9%；将两个智能体替换为8B后，综合评分提升10.4%。

Conclusion: SAT框架提供了单调改进和即插即用不变性的理论保证，即任何智能体可升级为更强模型而无需重新训练整个团队，且性能界会得到提升。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) with a large number of parameters achieve strong performance but are often prohibitively expensive to deploy. Recent work explores using teams of smaller, more efficient LLMs that collectively match or even outperform a single large model. However, jointly updating multiple agents introduces compounding distribution shifts, making coordination and stability during training difficult. We address this by introducing Sequential Agent Tuning (SAT), a coordinator-free training paradigm. SAT represents the team as a factorized policy and employs block-coordinate updates over agents, enabling scalable, decentralized training without a central controller. Specifically, we develop a sequence-aware, on-policy advantage estimator that conditions on the evolving team policy, coupled with per-agent KL trust regions that isolate occupancy drift. Theoretically, this framework provides two critical guarantees. First, it ensures monotonic improvement, stabilizing the training process. Second, it establishes provable plug-and-play invariance: any agent can be upgraded to a stronger model without retraining the rest of the team, with a formal guarantee that the performance bound improves. Empirically, a team of three 4B agents (12B total) trained with SAT surpasses the much larger Qwen3-32B on AIME24/25 benchmarks by 3.9\% on average. We validate our plug-and-play theory by swapping in two 8B agents, which boosts the composite score by 10.4\%. We provide code and appendix of proof at https://github.com/Yydc/SAT-AAMAS

</details>


### [242] [MDN: Parallelizing Stepwise Momentum for Delta Linear Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05838)
*Yulong Huang,Xiang Liu,Hongxiang Huang,Xiaopeng Lin,Zunchang Liu,Xiaowen Chu,Zeke Xie,Bojun Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 这篇论文提出了Momentum DeltaNet (MDN)，通过在线性注意力中引入动量机制和分块并行算法，解决了线性递归模型中信息快速衰减和次优收敛的问题。在400M和1.3B参数规模上，MDN在多个下游任务上优于Transformer、Mamba2和GDN等强基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线性注意力模型（如Mamba2、GDN）将线性递归解释为在线随机梯度下降（SGD），但朴素SGD更新存在信息快速衰减和优化收敛次优的问题。虽然基于动量的优化器可以解决这一问题，但难以同时实现训练效率和有效性。

Method: 提出分块并行算法，通过几何重排更新系数来实现带有逐步动量规则的线性注意力；从动力系统视角分析基于动量的递归为二阶系统，引入共轭复特征值，并据此设计稳定的门控约束；最终模型Momentum DeltaNet (MDN) 基于Triton内核实现。

Result: 在400M和1.3B参数模型上，MDN在多个下游评估基准上持续优于Transformer、Mamba2和GDN等强基线模型，且训练吞吐量与Mamba2、KDA等竞争性线性模型相当。

Conclusion: 通过在注意力线性递归中引入动量机制并设计高效算法和稳定约束，MDN有效提升了线性注意力模型的性能，为长序列大语言模型缩放提供了新范式。

Abstract: Linear Attention (LA) offers a promising paradigm for scaling large language models (LLMs) to long sequences by avoiding the quadratic complexity of self-attention. Recent LA models such as Mamba2 and GDN interpret linear recurrences as closed-form online stochastic gradient descent (SGD), but naive SGD updates suffer from rapid information decay and suboptimal convergence in optimization. While momentum-based optimizers provide a natural remedy, they pose challenges in simultaneously achieving training efficiency and effectiveness. To address this, we develop a chunkwise parallel algorithm for LA with a stepwise momentum rule by geometrically reordering the update coefficients. Further, from a dynamical systems perspective, we analyze the momentum-based recurrence as a second-order system that introduces complex conjugate eigenvalues. This analysis guides the design of stable gating constraints. The resulting model, Momentum DeltaNet (MDN), leverages Triton kernels to achieve comparable training throughput with competitive linear models such as Mamba2 and KDA. Extensive experiments on the 400M and 1.3B parameter models demonstrate consistent performance improvements over strong baselines, including Transformers, Mamba2 and GDN, across diverse downstream evaluation benchmarks. Code: https://github.com/HuuYuLong/MomentumDeltaNet .

</details>


### [243] [Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Learnable Loss Balancing and Transfer Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05217)
*Reza Pirayeshshirazinezhad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种自适应平衡物理约束与数据驱动的自监督物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，通过可学习的混合神经元动态调整两项贡献，结合迁移学习，在仅87个CFD数据点下实现热传递预测误差<8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PINN依赖固定或启发式权重平衡物理残差与数据损失，需要手动调参且泛化能力差，数据稀缺场景下训练不稳定。

Method: 1) 引入可学习混合神经元，基于不确定性动态调整物理项与数据项的权重；2) 结合迁移学习，从相关领域复用表征并适配新物理系统。

Result: 在液态金属微型散热器热传递预测任务中，仅用87个CFD数据点即实现误差<8%，优于浅层神经网络、核方法及纯物理基线。

Conclusion: 该框架为数据稀缺的科学问题提供了一种鲁棒且可复现的通用方案，可推广至流体动力学、材料建模等领域。

Abstract: We propose a self-supervised physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework that adaptively balances physics-based and data-driven supervision for scientific machine learning under data scarcity. Unlike prior PINNs that rely on fixed or heuristic weighting of physics residuals and data loss, our approach introduces a learnable blending neuron that dynamically adjusts the relative contribution of each term based on their uncertainties. This mechanism enables stable training and improved generalization without manual tuning. To further enhance efficiency, we integrate a transfer learning strategy that reuses representations from related domains and adapts them to new physical systems with limited data. We validate the framework for the prediction of heat transfer in liquid-metal miniature heat sinks using only 87 CFD datapoints, where the adaptive PINN achieves an error <8%, outperforming shallow neural networks, kernel methods, and physics-only baselines. Our framework provides a general recipe for embedding physics adaptively into neural networks, offering a robust and reproducible approach for data-scarce problems across various scientific domains, including fluid dynamics and material modeling.

</details>


### [244] [Horizon-Constrained Rashomon Sets for Chaotic Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05218)
*Gauri Kale,Rahul Vishwakarma,Holly Diamond,Ava Hedayatipour,Amin Rezaei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次将混沌理论与预测多重性联系起来，提出了horizon-constrained Rashomon sets框架，证明混沌系统中模型多样性随预测时域指数级收缩，并开发了基于下游效用的决策对齐模型选择算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预测多重性（predictive multiplicity）和混沌动力学（chaotic dynamics）是两个独立发展的机器学习挑战，尽管它们存在概念上的关联。现有研究缺乏对混沌系统中模型多样性如何随预测时域演化的理论理解。

Method: 提出horizon-constrained Rashomon sets理论框架，证明有效Rashomon set以最大Lyapunov指数确定的速率随提前时间指数收缩；引入Lyapunov加权度量以更紧地界定预测分歧；开发基于下游效用的决策对齐选择算法。

Result: 在Lorenz-96、Kuramoto-Sivashinsky等合成混沌系统以及风电、交通、天气等真实场景中，所提框架在保持竞争性预测性能的同时，将决策质量提升18-34%。

Conclusion: 建立了混沌理论与预测多重性之间的首个严格联系，为在安全关键的混沌领域中部署机器学习提供了原则性指导。

Abstract: Predictive multiplicity and chaotic dynamics represent two fundamental challenges in machine learning that have evolved independently despite their conceptual connections. We bridge this gap by introducing horizon-constrained Rashomon sets, a theoretical framework that characterizes how model multiplicity evolves with prediction horizon in chaotic systems. Unlike static prediction tasks where the Rashomon set remains fixed, chaos induces exponential divergence among initially similar models, fundamentally transforming the nature of predictive equivalence. We prove that the effective Rashomon set contracts exponentially with lead time at a rate determined by the maximum Lyapunov exponent and introduce Lyapunov-weighted metrics that provide tighter bounds on predictive disagreement. Leveraging these insights, we develop decision-aligned selection algorithms that choose among near-optimal models based on downstream utility rather than forecast accuracy alone. Extensive experiments on synthetic chaotic systems (Lorenz-96, Kuramoto-Sivashinsky) and real-world applications (wind power, traffic, weather) demonstrate that our framework improves decision quality by 18-34\% while maintaining competitive predictive performance. This work establishes the first rigorous connection between chaos theory and predictive multiplicity, providing principled guidance for deploying machine learning in safety-critical chaotic domains.

</details>


### [245] [Sparse Prefix Caching for Hybrid and Recurrent LLM Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05219)
*Mikhail Shirokikh,Sergey Nikolenko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出稀疏前缀缓存（Sparse Prefix Caching）方法，通过在状态空间模型（SSM）的循环层中稀疏设置检查点，在缓存命中时从最深的检查点恢复并重新计算剩余后缀，从而优化LLM推理延迟。该方法形式化为一个O(NM)的动态规划问题，在真实数据上优于标准启发式方法，尤其在低缓存预算和前缀非均匀分布的场景下效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有前缀缓存假设密集的逐token键/值重用，但状态空间模型（SSM）的循环层只需存储单个状态即可恢复，无需完整历史。这种不对称性开启了新的设计空间：在稀疏检查点位置存储精确的循环状态，在缓存命中时从最深检查点恢复并重算后缀，从而在"无重用"和"密集缓存"之间取得平衡。

Method: 将稀疏前缀缓存形式化为检查点放置问题，给定重叠深度的概率分布，推导出一个精确的O(NM)动态规划算法。该方法在重叠分布不均匀时（如共享长文档前缀但提问不同的场景）优化缓存预算分配。

Result: 在QuALITY和System Prompts数据集上，分布感知的放置方法在层组帕累托前沿上支配所有固定预算基线，匹配或超越最强启发式（块缓存）的同时使用更少的检查点。在低缓存预算下收益最大，此时重叠分布最不均匀。

Conclusion: 该方法适用于请求共享实质性但不完全相同前缀的场景，保持精确输出，不改变循环计算本身，可与现有KV缓存压缩技术结合，适用于循环/SSM层（隐藏状态可精确提取和恢复）及混合模型。

Abstract: Prefix caching is a key latency optimization for autoregressive LLM serving, yet existing systems assume dense per-token key/value reuse. State-space models change the structure of the problem: a recurrent layer can resume from a single stored state rather than requiring the entire token history. This asymmetry opens a new design point between no reuse and dense caching: store exact recurrent states at a sparse set of checkpoint positions and, on a cache hit, resume from the deepest stored checkpoint and recompute the remaining suffix exactly.
  We formalize sparse prefix caching as checkpoint placement under a distribution over overlap depths, yielding an exact O(NM) dynamic program. For use cases where requests share a non-trivial prefix (e.g. asking different questions about a single long document), we show that our method consistently improves the Pareto frontier traced by standard heuristics on real-world data. Across QuALITY and System Prompts, distribution-aware placement dominates every fixed-budget baseline on the measured layer-group Pareto frontier and matches or outperforms the strongest heuristic (block caching) while typically using substantially fewer checkpoints, with the largest gains at low checkpoint budgets where the overlap distribution is most non-uniform. The method is most relevant when many requests share a substantial but not identical prefix within a retained cache entry. It preserves exact outputs, does not change the recurrent computation itself or require new recurrent update kernels, applies to recurrent/SSM layers whose hidden state can be extracted and restored exactly, and for hybrid models can be combined with existing KV-cache compression techniques.

</details>


### [246] [MidSteer: Optimal Affine Framework for Steering Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05220)
*Tatiana Gaintseva,Andrew Stepanov,Ziquan Liu,Martin Benning,Gregory Slabaugh,Jiankang Deng,Ismail Elezi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文形式化了概念引导（concept steering）的理论框架，建立了与概念擦除的联系，提出了LEACE-Switch和MidSteer等方法，并在多种模型上验证了效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有概念引导方法缺乏统一的理论框架，作者希望从理论上填补这一空白。

Method: 首先证明标准引导方法是LEACE（仿射擦除）的特例；然后提出LEACE-Switch理论框架；最后引入MidSteer，一种更通用的最小扰动仿射引导方法。

Result: MidSteer在视觉扩散模型和大语言模型等多个任务、模态和架构上表现良好。

Conclusion: 该工作为概念引导提供了严谨的理论基础，提出的MidSteer方法在保持最小扰动的同时实现了定向概念操控。

Abstract: Steering intermediate representations has emerged as a powerful strategy for controlling generative models, particularly in post-deployment alignment and safety settings. However, despite its empirical success, it currently lacks a comprehensive theoretical framework. In this paper, we bridge this gap by formalizing the theory of concept steering. First, we establish a link between steering and affine concept erasure, proving that the standard approach for removing unwanted behaviors is a special case of LEACE (a closed-form method for affine erasure). Next, we formulate a principled theoretical framework for concept switching, LEACE-Switch, and characterize the assumptions under which it provides an optimal affine solution. Building on this analysis, we then introduce MidSteer (Minimal Disturbance concept Steering), a more general affine framework for concept manipulation that relaxes these assumptions and enables directed, minimal-disturbance transformations. We demonstrate that MidSteer performs favorably across a range of tasks, modalities, and architectures, including vision diffusion models and large language models.

</details>


### [247] [Data-Driven Variational Basis Learning Beyond Neural Networks: A Non-Neural Framework for Adaptive Basis Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05221)
*Andrew Kiruluta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出数据驱动变分基学习（DVBL），一种无需神经网络的非神经框架，通过变分优化直接从数据中学习可解释的基函数，并建立理论保证（存在性、收敛性、可识别性），同时支持流形与动力学正则化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统表示系统（傅里叶、小波等）解析可处理但无法自适应数据结构；神经网络虽能学习特征，但牺牲了可解释性和数学透明性。本文旨在弥补这一空白，发展一种既数据自适应又保持显式可解释的非神经替代方案。

Method: 将基原子作为主优化变量，与样本特定系数及潜在线性演化算子联合学习，建立变分优化框架；采用交替最小化算法，并证明其块坐标下降性质；通过流形正则化和动力学正则化扩展模型能力。

Result: 证明了极小值的存在性、交替最小化算法的块下降性质、系数恢复与基可识别性的条件；无需神经架构即可整合流形与动力学正则化。

Conclusion: DVBL在学习数据自适应基函数的同时保持数学可解释性与严格性，与经典字典学习、谱方法、Koopman算子及深度表示学习相比具有概念新颖性。

Abstract: Classical representation systems such as Fourier series, wavelets, and fixed dictionaries provide analytically tractable basis expansions, but they are not intrinsically adapted to the empirical structure of modern high-dimensional data. Neural networks overcome this limitation by learning features from data, yet they do so through layered nonlinear parameterizations that often sacrifice interpretability, explicit control over basis structure, and mathematical transparency. In this manuscript we develop a non-neural alternative that learns basis functions directly from data through variational optimization. The proposed framework, termed Data Driven Variational Basis Learning (DVBL), treats basis atoms as primary optimization variables and learns them jointly with sample-specific coefficients and, when appropriate, a latent linear evolution operator. This yields a data-adaptive basis expansion that remains explicit, interpretable, and amenable to rigorous analysis. We formulate the model, establish existence of minimizers, prove blockwise descent properties for an alternating minimization algorithm, give conditions for coefficient recovery and basis identifiability, and show how manifold and dynamical regularization can be integrated without invoking neural architectures. We also discuss the conceptual novelty of the framework relative to classical dictionary learning, spectral methods, Koopman operator methods, and deep representation learning.

</details>


### [248] [Adaptive Computation Depth via Learned Token Routing in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05222)
*Ahmed Abdelmuniem Abdalla Mohammed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Token-Selective Attention (TSA)，一种在Transformer块间添加轻量级门控机制的方法，让模型根据token难度动态跳过部分计算，在保持质量的同时节省14-23%的计算量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Transformer对所有token使用相同数量的层，忽略了不同token的上下文难度差异，造成计算浪费。

Method: 在连续Transformer块之间添加一个轻量级两层MLP作为门控网络，输出连续的停止概率，使机制端到端可微；仅增加1.7%参数，不改变基础架构；通过任务损失梯度即可学习到难度相关的路由策略。

Result: 在字符级语言建模任务中，TSA在Tiny-Shakespeare和enwik8上节省14-23%的token-layer操作，质量损失<0.5%；在同等效率下，验证损失比early exit低0.7%；学习到的路由可直接用于推理时稀疏执行，实现实际加速。

Conclusion: TSA通过轻量级可微门控机制实现了token级别的自适应深度计算，在不改变基础架构的情况下有效节省计算资源，且路由策略可直接迁移到推理阶段。

Abstract: Standard transformer architectures apply the same number of layers to every token regardless of contextual difficulty. We present Token-Selective Attention (TSA), a learned per-token gate on residual updates between consecutive transformer blocks. Each gate is a lightweight two-layer multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that produces a continuous halting probability, making the mechanism end-to-end differentiable with 1.7% parameter overhead and no changes to the base architecture. Notably, TSA learns difficulty-proportional routing without any explicit depth pressure: even at $λ=0$ (no depth regularisation), the task-loss gradient alone drives the router to skip 20% of token-layer operations. On character-level language modeling, TSA saved 14-23% of token-layer operations (TLOps) across Tiny-Shakespeare and enwik8 at <0.5% quality loss. At matched efficiency, TSA achieved 0.7% lower validation loss than early exit, and the learned routing transfers directly to inference-time sparse execution for real wall-clock speedup.

</details>


### [249] [Structural Instability of Feature Composition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05223)
*Yunpeng Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了稀疏自编码器（SAE）中组合特征激活的不稳定性问题，提出几何框架分析特征联合的坍塌阈值，并发现ReLU整流会引入类似棘轮效应的系统性漂移，揭示了线性表示假设在高维组合场景下的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管SAE已被广泛用于解耦Transformer中的特征叠加，但组合式特征激活（同时激活不同语义潜变量）的理论基础尚不清晰，线性表示假设忽略了过完备字典中的非线性干扰效应。

Method: 将激活空间建模为高维稀疏锥流形，利用球面字典模型推导组合坍塌阈值的渐近表达式（基于信号锥的高斯平均宽度/统计维度）；分析高偏置下ReLU整流将微观方差涨落转化为系统性漂移的棘轮效应；在CLEVR数据集上验证标度律。

Result: 发现了组合特征激活的坍塌阈值；验证了ReLU导致的棘轮效应造成干扰累积；在CLEVR上观察到层次化相关性加速了从随机基线到坍塌的转变。

Conclusion: 组合式激活存在几何可扩展性限制，不能简单依赖线性叠加，需要显式管理干扰的机制。

Abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for disentangling feature superposition in transformer-based architectures, enabling precise control via activation steering. However, the theoretical foundations of compositional steering -- the simultaneous activation of distinct semantic latents -- remain under-explored. The prevailing Linear Representation Hypothesis often abstracts away non-linear interference effects that arise in overcomplete dictionaries. We present a geometric framework for analyzing the instability of feature unions. Modeling the activation space as a high-dimensional sparse cone manifold, we derive an asymptotic compositional-collapse threshold under a spherical dictionary model, characterized by the Gaussian mean width (statistical dimension) of the signal cone. We further show that, in the high-bias regime, ReLU rectification converts microscopic correlation-induced variance fluctuations into a systematic drift that accumulates under composition, yielding interference growth consistent with a ratchet effect. We validate the predicted scaling trends on structured semantic features extracted from CLEVR, where hierarchical correlations accelerate the transition relative to random baselines. Together, our results highlight geometric constraints on the scalability of union-based steering and motivate composition mechanisms that explicitly manage interference beyond naive linear superposition.

</details>


### [250] [Channel-Level Semantic Perturbations: Unlearnable Examples for Diverse Training Paradigms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05224)
*Bo Wang,Jia Ni,Mengnan Zhao,Zhan Qin,Kui Ren*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究了不可学习示例在预训练-微调范式下的表现，发现现有UE方法在冻结浅层预训练权重时失效，并提出了浅层语义伪装策略(SSC)来恢复其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有不可学习示例研究主要针对从头训练场景，忽略了广泛采用的预训练-微调范式。作者发现UE方法在该范式下效果显著下降，需要针对性解决这一问题。

Method: 提出浅层语义伪装策略(SSC)，通过将扰动生成限制在语义有效子空间内，绕过预训练权重引入的语义抑制，实现层次化欺骗。

Result: SSC方法在浅层冻结和语义聚焦预训练等挑战性场景下，一致地保持了数据的不可学习性。

Conclusion: 填补了基于预训练的不可学习学习的关键空白，为保护隐私数据在更实际训练范式下的安全性提供了有效方案。

Abstract: The unauthorized use of personal data in model training has emerged as a growing privacy threat. Unlearnable examples (UEs) address this issue by embedding imperceptible perturbations into benign examples to obstruct feature learning. However, existing studies mainly evaluate UEs under from-scratch training settings, leaving their behavior under the widely adopted pretraining-finetuning (PF) paradigm largely unexplored. In this work, we provide the first systematic investigation of unlearnable examples across diverse training paradigms. Our analysis reveals that loading and freezing pretrained weights significantly weakens the effectiveness of existing UEs methods. We further explain these findings through semantic filtering: while UEs tend to induce models to overfit non-semantic noise, thereby weakening their semantic extraction capabilities, under the PF paradigm, frozen shallow layers preserve data semantics, effectively filtering out distracting information like unlearnable noise. Guided by these insights, we propose a hierarchical deception strategy, Shallow Semantic Camouflage (SSC), that confines the generation process to a semantically valid subspace, aiming to bypass the semantic suppression introduced by pretrained weights. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently preserves data unlearnability even under challenging training paradigms, such as shallow-layer freezing and semantic-focused pretraining (SF-Pretrain), bridging the critical gap in pretrain-based unlearnable learning.

</details>


### [251] [MACS: Modality-Aware Capacity Scaling for Efficient Multimodal MoE Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05225)
*Bo Li,Chuan Wu,shaolin Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MACS是一个针对MoE多模态大语言模型在专家并行推理中效率瓶颈的训练无关框架，通过熵加权负载机制和动态模态自适应容量机制解决信息异构性和模态动态性问题，显著提升多模态基准性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE多模态大语言模型在专家并行推理中因**滞后效应**出现效率瓶颈，现有基于token计数的负载均衡方法无法处理两个独特挑战：(1) **信息异构性**——冗余视觉token与语义关键token被同等对待；(2) **模态动态性**——不同任务中视觉与文本比例变化导致资源分配不当。

Method: 提出MACS框架，包含两个核心机制：(1) **熵加权负载机制**——通过量化视觉token的语义价值来解决信息异构性；(2) **动态模态自适应容量机制**——根据输入实时模态成分分配专家资源。整体为训练无关的推理框架。

Result: 在各种多模态基准测试上，MACS显著优于现有方法，为MoE MLLMs在EP推理中的高效部署提供了鲁棒解决方案。

Conclusion: MACS有效解决了MoE多模态大语言模型在专家并行推理中的效率瓶颈，是一种无需额外训练的高效部署方案。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts Multimodal Large Language Models (MoE MLLMs) suffer from a significant efficiency bottleneck during Expert Parallelism (EP) inference due to the straggler effect. This issue is worsened in the multimodal context, as existing token-count-based load balancing methods fail to address two unique challenges: (1) Information Heterogeneity, where numerous redundant visual tokens are treated equally to semantically critical ones, and (2) Modality Dynamics, where varying visual to text ratios across tasks lead to resource misallocation. To address these challenges, we propose MACS (Modality-Aware Capacity Scaling), a training-free inference framework. Specifically, MACS introduces an Entropy-Weighted Load mechanism to quantify the semantic value of visual tokens, addressing information heterogeneity. Additionally, the Dynamic Modality-Adaptive Capacity mechanism allocates expert resources based on the real-time modal composition of the input. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MACS significantly outperforms existing methods on various multimodal benchmarks, providing a novel and robust solution for the efficient deployment of MoE MLLMs in EP inference.

</details>


### [252] [Internalizing Outcome Supervision into Process Supervision: A New Paradigm for Reinforcement Learning for Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05226)
*Fei Ding,Yongkang Zhang,Runhao Liu,Yuhao Liao,Zijian Zeng,Sibo wang,Huiming Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种监督内化方法，将结果监督转化为过程监督，让模型自动从失败的推理轨迹中提取过程级学习信号，实现更细粒度的策略优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法要么依赖稀疏的结果奖励难以进行细粒度信用分配，要么依赖昂贵的外部过程监督难以规模化扩展。

Method: 提出监督内化框架，通过让模型自动识别、纠正和重用失败的推理轨迹，从结果级监督中提取过程级学习信号，实现细粒度信用分配。

Result: 该方法在仅依靠结果监督的条件下实现了更细粒度的策略优化，为推理强化学习提供了新的路径。

Conclusion: 提出了一种将结果监督内化为过程监督的新训练范式，模型在强化学习过程中持续生成和优化自身的内部过程监督信号，不同于传统的外部过程监督方法。

Abstract: The central challenge of reinforcement learning for reasoning lies not only in the sparsity of outcome-level supervision, but more fundamentally in how to transform feedback provided only at the end of a sequence into fine-grained learning signals that can guide intermediate reasoning steps. Existing approaches either rely on outcome-level rewards for sequence-level optimization, which makes precise credit assignment difficult, or depend on externally constructed process supervision, which is costly and difficult to scale sustainably. To address this, we propose a new perspective: reinforcement learning for reasoning can be understood as the problem of internalizing outcome supervision into process supervision. From this perspective, we introduce a supervision-internalization method for reinforcement learning for reasoning, enabling the model to automatically extract process-level learning signals through identifying, correcting, and reusing failed reasoning trajectories, thereby achieving finer-grained policy optimization under outcome-only supervision. We further abstract this idea into a new training paradigm, in which the model continually generates and refines its own internal process supervision during reinforcement learning, opening a new path for fine-grained credit assignment in reinforcement learning for reasoning that differs from externally provided process supervision.

</details>


### [253] [Rethinking Data Curation in LLM Training: Online Reweighting Offers Better Generalization than Offline Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05227)
*Wanru Zhao,Yihong Chen,Yuzhi Tang,Wentao Ma,Shengchao Hu,Shell Xu Hu,Alex Iacob,Abhinav Mehrotra,Nicholas D. Lane*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ADAPT是一个在线数据重加权框架，通过在训练中动态调整每个样本的学习率（基于损失加权，而非静态预处理），替代传统的离线数据筛选和混合方法。实验表明，在指令微调和大规模预训练中，ADAPT在同等算力下实现了更强的跨基准泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据筛选/混合方法采用离线范式，与训练过程脱节，存在工程开销大、模型/任务转移时需重新运行、通过硬过滤或重采样牺牲数据多样性等问题。
