We prove that this drift forms a positive feedback loop with the feature, causing the global classifier mean and the global feature mean to grow exponentially. We call this mechanism Numerical Feature Inflation (NFI). This mechanism explains the rapid norm growth before a Slingshot spike, the subsequent reappearance of gradients, and the resulting loss spike. We further show that NFI is not equivalent to an observed loss spike: in more practical tasks, partial absorption may not produce visible spikes, but it can still break the zero-sum constraint and drive rapid growth of parameter norms. Our results reinterpret Slingshot as a numerical dynamic of finite-precision training, and provide a testable explanation for abnormal parameter growth and logit divergence in late-stage training.

</details>


### [329] [Knowing but Not Correcting: Routine Task Requests Suppress Factual Correction in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05957)
*Zixuan Chen,Hao Lin,Zizhe Chen,Yizhou Tian,Garry Yang,Depeng Wang,Ya Guo,Huijia Zhu,James Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LLM在任务导向请求中会抑制纠错行为（纠错抑制率19%-90%），机制分析发现是响应选择阶段而非知识编码阶段的问题。本文提出两种免训练干预方法：CDS（校正方向引导）和DPA（动态有效载荷放大），显著提升模型的事实严格性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究关注LLM在孤立情境下纠正虚假信息的能力，但忽视了在任务导向请求中模型明知错误却仍然顺从的失败模式。本文旨在系统揭示这一现象并探究其内部机制。

Method: 构建300个虚假前提的基准测试集，对8个模型进行系统评估；通过机械论分析揭示纠错抑制的神经机制；提出两种免训练干预方法：CDS（从匹配对估计校正-顺从方向并在中间层注入）和DPA（通过注意力发散定位有效载荷词并在最后层增强其表示）。

Result: 纠错抑制率在8个模型中达19%-90%，4个模型超过80%。CDS在Qwen3.5-9B上将校正率从0%提升至58.2%；DPA是唯一在两个模型上都保持或提升推理能力的方法。

Conclusion: 纠错抑制是广泛存在的严重问题，其本质是"知道但不纠正"而非知识缺失。本文提出的"事实严格性"可作为模型可靠性的新维度，两种免训练干预方法为缓解该问题提供了有效路径。

Abstract: LLMs reliably correct false claims when presented in isolation, yet when the same claims are embedded in task-oriented requests, they often comply rather than correct. We term this failure mode \emph{correction suppression} and construct a benchmark of 300 false premises to systematically evaluate it across eight models. Suppression rates range from 19\% to 90\%, with four models exceeding 80\%, establishing correction suppression as a prevalent and severe phenomenon. Mechanistic analysis reveals that suppression is not a knowledge failure: the model registers the error internally but task context diverts early-layer attention from the false claim as output intent crystallizes toward compliance at middle layers. We characterize this as \emph{knowing but not correcting} -- suppression occurs at response selection rather than knowledge encoding. Guided by this mechanism, we propose two training-free interventions. Correction Direction Steering (CDS) estimates a correction-compliance direction from matched pairs and injects it at middle layers before output intent crystallizes. Dynamic Payload Amplification (DPA) localizes payload tokens via attention divergence between early and late layers and amplifies their representation at the final layer, requiring no calibration data. Experiments on Qwen3.5-9B and LLaMA3.1-8B show both methods substantially improve factual strictness. CDS achieves the highest correction rate on Qwen3.5-9B (0\%$\to$58.2\%). DPA is the only method that preserves or improves reasoning capability on both models. These findings introduce \emph{factual strictness} -- the willingness to uphold accuracy against contextual pressures -- as a new dimension of model reliability.

</details>


### [330] [Uncertainty Estimation via Hyperspherical Confidence Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05964)
*Eunseo Choi,Ho-Yeon Kim,Jaewon Lee,Taeyong jo,Myungjun lee,Heejin Ahn*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需采样和分布假设的确定性不确定性估计方法HCM，通过将输出分解为幅度和单位超球面方向向量，利用几何约束违反程度量化不确定性，在分类和回归任务中效果媲美集成和证据方法且推理成本更低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高风险领域（如自动驾驶、医疗、制造）中，对神经网络预测进行不确定性量化至关重要，但现有方法通常依赖昂贵的采样或严格的分布假设，缺乏高效且通用的解决方案。

Method: 将网络输出分解为幅度和归一化方向向量，约束方向向量位于单位超球面上，将不确定性定义为对该几何约束的违反程度，从而实现无需采样、无需分布假设的确定性不确定性估计。

Result: 在多种基准和真实工业任务中，HCM在不确定性估计性能（置信度-误差对齐）上匹配或超越集成方法和证据方法，同时推理成本显著更低。

Conclusion: 几何结构在不确定性估计中具有强大潜力，HCM可作为传统方法的通用且高效的替代方案。

Abstract: Quantifying uncertainty in neural network predictions is essential for high-stakes domains such as autonomous driving, healthcare, and manufacturing. While existing approaches often depend on costly sampling or restrictive distributional assumptions, we propose Hyperspherical Confidence Mapping (HCM), a simple yet principled framework for sampling-free and distribution-free uncertainty estimation. HCM decomposes outputs into a magnitude and a normalized direction vector constrained to lie on the unit hypersphere, enabling a novel interpretation of uncertainty as the degree of violation of this geometric constraint. This yields deterministic and interpretable estimates applicable to both regression and classification. Experiments across diverse benchmarks and real-world industrial tasks demonstrate that HCM matches or surpasses ensemble and evidential approaches, with far lower inference cost and stronger confidence-error alignment. Our results highlight the power of geometric structure in uncertainty estimation and position HCM as a versatile alternative to conventional techniques.

</details>


### [331] [Beyond Uniform Credit Assignment: Selective Eligibility Traces for RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05965)
*Chaoli Mou,Zhan Zhuang,Xinning Chen,Yu Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对GRPO等无评论家算法中统一信用分配（uniform credit assignment）导致学习效率低下的问题，本文提出选择性资格迹（S-trace），通过局部信任区域保留和稀疏资格迹机制实现细粒度信用分配，在Qwen3系列模型上取得了优于GRPO的性能（最高提升3.16%），同时具有更高的样本和token效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法中广泛使用的无评论家算法（如GRPO）采用"统一信用分配"假设，将轨迹级别的优势信号无差别地广播到所有token，无法区分关键推理步骤与普通步骤，严重制约了学习效率。

Method: 1）提出P-trace（部分信任区域保持的样本高效无评论家资格迹方法）；2）在P-trace基础上构建S-trace，通过选择性掩码低熵token实现稀疏资格迹机制，降低方差并实现细粒度信用分配；3）从理论上证明了GSPO是资格迹框架下统一信用分配的一个特例。

Result: 在Qwen3系列模型上的pass@16指标测试中，S-trace相比GRPO在1.7B模型上提升0.49%，在4B模型上提升3.16%，在8B模型上稳健提升2.98%，同时具有更高的样本效率和token效率。

Conclusion: S-trace通过稀疏资格迹机制有效解决了无评论家强化学习中的统一信用分配问题，在提升性能的同时实现了更好的效率，为RLVR提供了一种更优的替代方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become a key approach for improving the reasoning abilities of large language models. However, widely used critic-free algorithms such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) necessitate a ``uniform credit assignment'' assumption that indiscriminately broadcast trajectory-level advantages, hindering learning efficiency by failing to distinguish critical reasoning steps. To address this limitation, we propose Selective Eligibility Traces (S-trace). Grounded in the intuition of partial trust region preservation, we initially introduce P-trace as a sample-efficient, critic-free eligibility traces method, upon which we build S-trace, implementing a sparse eligibility traces mechanism to further mitigate variance and achieve fine-grained credit assignment by selectively masking low-entropy tokens. Theoretically, we contextualize the recent Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO) method within the critic-free eligibility traces framework, identifying it as a special instance of the eligibility traces method operating under uniform credit assignment. Experiments demonstrate that S-trace not only outperforms GRPO, showing gains of 0.49\% on Qwen3-1.7B and 3.16\% on Qwen3-4B, and maintaining a robust 2.98\% improvement when scaled further to Qwen3-8B in average pass@16, but notably achieves this with simultaneously higher sample and token efficiency.

</details>


### [332] [Contrastive Identification and Generation in the Limit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06211)
*Xiaoyu Li,Andi Han,Jiaojiao Jiang,Junbin Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了对比识别的极限学习模型，其中学习器只能观察到满足 h(x)≠h(y) 的无序对，而非传统的正例或全标记数据。作者给出了无噪声设置下的精确刻画（对比可识别类的几何条件、对比闭包维度及样本复杂度、对比生成与识别的严格层级关系），并证明了有限对抗噪声下的显著反转：某些类能从对比对中识别（任意有限噪声预算下），却无法从单个错误标注的正例中识别。核心技术对象是公共交叉图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统极限识别学习模型仅考虑正例或全标记数据，但现实中许多监督信号本质上是关系型的（如对比对），而非单例标记。作者希望填补这一空白，研究在对比呈现（仅知 x 和 y 标记不同，但不知谁为正）下的识别与生成问题。

Method: 引入公共交叉图作为统一技术对象，刻画成对歧义性、族级生成障碍和噪声缺陷。在无噪声设置下推导出：(1) 对比可识别类的精确刻画（Angluin 的 tell-tale 条件的几何精炼变体）；(2) 对比闭包维度及其对均匀对比生成的样本复杂度紧界；(3) 对比生成与识别间的严格层级关系。在有限对抗噪声下，证明了一个反转结果。

Result: (1) 给出了对比可识别类的充要条件；(2) 定义了对比闭包维度，并精确刻画了均匀对比生成的样本复杂度；(3) 证明对比生成与文本识别相互不可比较；(4) 在有限对抗噪声下，存在可由对比对识别（任何噪声预算下）但无法由单个被污染正例识别的类别。

Conclusion: 对比呈现提供了一种比传统正例呈现更鲁棒的监督信号，尤其是在存在对抗噪声时。公共交叉图是分析对比学习的有效工具，也为关系型监督信号的学习理论奠定了基础。

Abstract: In the classical identification in the limit model of Gold [1967], a stream of positive examples is presented round by round, and the learner must eventually recover the target hypothesis. Recently, Kleinberg and Mullainathan [2024] introduced generation in the limit, where the learner instead must eventually output novel elements of the target's support. Both lines of work focus on positive-only or fully labeled data. Yet many natural supervision signals are inherently relational rather than singleton, which encode relationships between examples rather than labels of individual ones. We initiate the study of contrastive identification and generation in the limit, where the learner observes a contrastive presentation of data: a stream of unordered pairs $\{x,y\}$ satisfying $h(x)\ne h(y)$ for an unknown target binary hypothesis $h$, but which element is positive is hidden from the learner. We first present three results in the noiseless setting: an exact characterization of contrastive identifiable classes (a one-line geometric refinement of Angluin [1980]'s tell-tale condition), a combinatorial dimension called contrastive closure dimension (a contrasitive analogue of the closure dimension in Raman et al. [2025]) and exactly characterizing uniform contrastive generation with tight sample complexity, and a strict hierarchy in which contrastive generation and text identification are mutually incomparable. We then prove a sharp reversal under finite adversarial corruption: there exist classes identifiable from contrastive pairs under any finite corruption budget by a single budget-independent algorithm, yet not identifiable from positive examples under even one corrupted observation. The unifying technical object is the common crossing graph, which encodes pairwise ambiguity, family-level generation obstructions, and corruption defects in a single coverage-and-incidence language.

</details>


### [333] [Sharper Guarantees for Misspecified Kernelized Bandit Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05967)
*Davide Maran,Csaba Szepesvári*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对核化 Bandit 优化中模型错误指定的放大问题，提出通过局部化机制可将错误指定项的放大因子从核复杂度的平方根（如 $\sqrt{d_\mathrm{eff}}$ 或 $\sqrt{\gamma_n}$）降低至对数或多项式对数增长。离线场景下，利用谱 Lebesgue 常数得到对数级放大；在线场景下，修改域分割算法，在温和的局部特征衰减假设下去除了错误指定项中多余的 $\sqrt{\gamma_n}$ 因子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有核化 Bandit 的离线/在线错误指定界中，错误指定项 $\varepsilon$ 会被核复杂度（如有效维度 $d_\mathrm{eff}$ 或最大信息增益 $\gamma_n$）显著放大，导致实际中错误容忍度极低。本文旨在证明通过局部化策略可以大幅降低这种放大效应，使错误指定界更紧、更实用。

Method: 离线设置：引入谱 Lebesgue 常数来刻画近似算子的局部化特性，对一维单调谱得到对数放大，对多维傅里叶对角乘积核得到多项式对数放大。在线设置：修改域分割算法，利用空间上的局部化机制（类似于频域谱局部化的空间对应），在局部特征衰减假设下推导出 $\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{\gamma_n n}+n\varepsilon)$ 的累积遗憾界。

Result: 离线场景下，错误指定项的放大因子从 $\sqrt{d_\mathrm{eff}}$ 降至对数或多项式对数增长；在线场景下，去除了错误指定项中多余的 $\sqrt{\gamma_n}$ 因子，遗憾界为 $\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{\gamma_n n}+n\varepsilon)$。

Conclusion: 局部化是降低核化 Bandit 中错误指定放大的核心原则，无论在频域（谱局部化）还是空域（域分割）都能有效抑制局部错误向全局传播，从而得到更紧的界。

Abstract: Existing guarantees for misspecified kernelized bandit optimization pay for misspecification through kernel complexity: in generic offline bounds, the misspecification level $\varepsilon$ is multiplied by $\sqrt{d_\mathrm{eff}}$, where $d_\mathrm{eff}$ is the kernel effective dimension, while in online regret bounds, the corresponding penalty is $\sqrt{γ_n}\,n\varepsilon$, where $γ_n$ is the maximum information gain after $n$ rounds of interaction.
  In this work, we show that, for a large class of kernels, the misspecification amplification can be reduced to logarithmic or polylogarithmic growth. In the offline setting, we first prove high-probability simple-regret bounds whose misspecification term is governed by a spectral Lebesgue constant. This yields logarithmic amplification for one-dimensional monotone spectra and polylogarithmic amplification for multivariate Fourier-diagonal product kernels. In the online setting, we modify a domain-splitting algorithm and prove a cumulative regret bound of $\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{γ_n n}+n\varepsilon)$ under mild localized eigendecay assumptions, removing the extra $\sqrt{γ_n}$ factor from the misspecification term. The common principle is localization: spectral localization controls the Lebesgue constant of the offline approximation operator, while domain splitting implements the spatial analogue of this mechanism in the online setting, preventing local misspecification errors from being amplified globally.

</details>


### [334] [Is Escalation Worth It? A Decision-Theoretic Characterization of LLM Cascades](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06350)
*Dylan Bouchard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于约束优化和对偶理论的决策框架来分析模型级联（cascades）的成本-质量前沿。研究发现，两模型级联的成本-质量前沿在置信度支持的收益递减区域上呈现分段凹性；对于k个模型的池，确定性两模型阈值级联的前沿是成对级联的逐点包络。实验表明，在确定性阈值级联类别中，完整固定链的表现不如成对包络，而轻量级预生成路由器的表现优于最佳级联策略——主要因为它避免了将查询直接发送给大模型时产生的廉价模型生成成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将级联中的延迟阈值视为经验性超参数，对模型池上成本-质量前沿的几何特性缺乏理论指导。作者希望建立严格的决策理论框架来理解级联策略的最优性条件及其局限性。

Method: 使用约束优化和对偶理论建立决策框架。对两模型级联分析成本-质量前沿的分段凹性及影子价格关系；对k模型池推导确定性阈值级联的前沿为成对包络；对k模型级联推导一阶条件（单一影子价格在各阶段边界上均等化边际质量-成本比）。在五个基准和八个模型上验证。

Result: 确定性阈值级联中，完整固定链不如成对包络；优化的子序列级联在保留数据上无实际意义的提升。轻量级预生成路由器在4/5数据集上优于最佳级联策略，原因主要是避免了廉价模型的生成成本而非更好的路由信号。级联性能主要受结构性成本限制（级联在决定升级前已支付廉价模型成本），而非中间阶段不足。

Conclusion: 级联策略的局限性根源在于结构性成本（必须先运行廉价模型），而非中间阶段数量不足。预生成路由器通过消除这种结构性成本获得了优势。这提示未来设计可考虑避免固定顺序执行的结构。

Abstract: Model cascades, in which a cheap LLM defers to an expensive one on low-confidence queries, are widely used to navigate the cost-quality tradeoff at deployment. Existing approaches largely treat the deferral threshold as an empirical hyperparameter, with limited guidance on the geometry of the resulting cost-quality frontier over a model pool. We develop a decision-theoretic framework grounded in constrained optimization and duality. For a two-model cascade, we establish piecewise concavity of the cost-quality frontier on decreasing-benefit regions of the confidence support, with reciprocal shadow prices linking the budget- and quality-constrained formulations. Given a pool of $k$ models, we characterize the frontier achievable by deterministic two-model threshold cascades as the pointwise envelope over $\binom{k}{2}$ pairwise cascades, with switching points where the optimal pair changes. For $k$-model cascades, we derive first-order conditions in which a single shadow price equalizes marginal quality-per-cost across stage boundaries. We validate the framework on five benchmarks (MATH, MMLU, TriviaQA, SimpleQA, LiveCodeBench) across eight models from five providers. Within the deterministic threshold-cascade class, full fixed chains underperform the pairwise envelope, and optimized subsequence cascades do not deliver practically meaningful held-out gains over it. A lightweight pre-generation router exceeds the best cascade policy on four of five datasets, mainly because it avoids the cheap model's generation cost on queries sent directly to a larger model rather than because of a stronger routing signal. These results suggest that cascade performance is limited primarily by structural cost, since cascades pay the cheap model before any escalation decision, rather than by a shortage of intermediate stages.

</details>


### [335] [Training Transformers for KV Cache Compressibility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05971)
*Yoav Gelberg,Yam Eitan,Michael Bronstein,Yarin Gal,Haggai Maron*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文形式化了KV缓存可压缩性的概念，证明其取决于模型表示而非上下文本身，并提出KV-CAT（KV压缩感知训练）方法，通过在训练中引入KV稀疏化策略，引导模型学习更易于压缩的表征，从而提升下游压缩方法在检索、长上下文问答和困惑度评估中的质量-预算权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文语言模型中KV缓存的内存和访问成本随前缀长度线性增长，成为瓶颈。现有后处理压缩方法受限于预训练模型的内部表示，效果有限。因此需要引导模型在训练阶段学习可压缩的表征。

Method: 提出KV-CAT（KV-Compression Aware Training），一种继续预训练流程。在训练时引入KV稀疏化策略，通过遮蔽KV槽位，迫使模型使用更少的KV槽位，从而学习易于后处理压缩的表征。

Result: KV-CAT在检索、长上下文问答和压缩前缀续写的困惑度评估中，改善了下游压缩方法的质量-预算权衡。

Conclusion: KV缓存的可压缩性是学习到的表示属性，而非上下文本身固有。通过在训练中引导模型学习可压缩表征，可以显著提升后处理压缩的效果。

Abstract: Long-context language modeling is increasingly constrained by the Key-Value (KV) cache, whose memory and decode-time access costs scale linearly with the prefix length. This bottleneck has motivated a range of context-compression methods, from token-level summarization to recent optimization-based KV compression methods. These post-hoc methods operate on the KV cache of a fixed pretrained model, so their effectiveness is fundamentally limited by how well the model's internal representations can be compressed. In this work, we formalize the notion of KV compressibility and show that it is a property of the learned representations, rather than of the context alone. We prove that almost any sequence-to-vector function admits both highly compressible and inherently non-compressible transformer implementations, highlighting the need to guide transformers toward compressible representations during training. Motivated by this, we propose KV-Compression Aware Training (KV-CAT), a continued pretraining procedure that incentivizes the emergence of compressible representations. We introduce a train-time KV sparsification policy that masks KV slots during training. This forces the model to use fewer KV slots and encourages it to learn representations amenable to post-hoc compression. Empirically, we show that KV-CAT improves the quality-budget tradeoff of downstream compression methods across retrieval, long-context question answering, and perplexity-based evaluation of compressed-prefix continuation.

</details>


### [336] [E = T*H/(O+B): A Dimensionless Control Parameter for Mixture-of-Experts Ecology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06415)
*Qingjun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 E = T*H/(O+B) 这一无量纲控制参数，用于预测混合专家模型（MoE）的专家生态健康程度。通过12项控制实验（8项视觉、4项语言，总计超11,000训练epoch）证明，E >= 0.5 足以保证零死亡专家，无需手工设计的负载均衡辅助损失函数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合专家模型（MoE）在训练中常出现"死亡专家"问题（某些专家未被激活），现有解决方案依赖手工设计的负载均衡辅助损失函数（auxiliary loss），缺乏统一的理论指导。作者希望找到一个简洁的、类似流体力学中雷诺数的统一诊断量来预测MoE训练的健康状态。

Method: 提出控制参数 E = T*H/(O+B)，其中 T 为路由温度，H 为路由熵权重，O 为 oracle 权重，B 为平衡权重。在CIFAR-10/100、TinyImageNet-200、WikiText-2/103上进行了12项控制实验（8视觉+4语言），总计超11,000个训练epoch来验证E的有效性。

Result: (1) E >= 0.5 即可保证零死亡专家；(2) 死亡专家可被"复活"（balance loss驱动路由器重新探索）；(3) 正交毒性（ortho toxicity）与数据集相关而非通用；(4) 任务复杂度会改变E的临界阈值；(5) 模型过拟合与专家生态健康解耦；(6) 三层MoE会自发坍缩为两层功能结构；(7) 生态结构在50倍温度范围内保持不变。

Conclusion: E可作为MoE训练的统一直观诊断工具，可替代手工设计的辅助损失函数。类似雷诺数在流体力学中的角色，E为MoE生态健康提供了理论指导框架。

Abstract: We introduce E = T*H/(O+B), a dimensionless control parameter that predicts whether Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models will develop a healthy expert ecology or collapse into dead experts. E combines four hyperparameters -- routing temperature T, routing entropy weight H, oracle weight O, and balance weight B -- into a single quantity. Through 12 controlled experiments (8 vision, 4 language) totaling over 11,000 training epochs, we establish that E >= 0.5 alone is sufficient to guarantee zero dead experts, removing the necessity for handcrafted load-balancing auxiliary losses. We validate this cross-modally on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, TinyImageNet-200, WikiText-2, and WikiText-103. Six additional findings emerge: (1) dead experts can resuscitate -- triggered by balance loss driving router re-exploration; (2) ortho toxicity is dataset-dependent, not universal; (3) task complexity shifts the critical E threshold; (4) model overfitting is decoupled from expert ecological health; (5) three-tier MoE spontaneously collapses into a two-tier functional structure; (6) ecological structure is temperature-invariant across a 50x range. We propose that E serves as a unified diagnostic for MoE training, analogous to the Reynolds number in fluid dynamics.

</details>


### [337] [Physical Fidelity Reconstruction via Improved Consistency-Distilled Flow Matching for Dynamical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05975)
*Sicheng Ma,Tianyue Yang,Xiuzhe Wu,Xiao Xue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将最优传输流匹配模型蒸馏为一步一致性模型，用于从低保真观测中快速重建高保真流场，在三个流体力学基准上实现12倍加速，同时保持相似的频谱性能，且参数量减半。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的扩散模型和流匹配模型在科学流场重建中虽能生成高保真结果，但依赖迭代采样过程，计算成本高，难以应用于对延迟敏感的流形预测、实时可视化和仿真环推断等场景。

Method: 将最优传输流匹配（OT-FM）教师模型蒸馏为一步一致性模型（Consistency Model）。推理时通过沿传输路径对低保真观测添加噪声来初始化生成轨迹，使无条件的教师模型能够执行条件重建，无需重新训练教师模型。

Result: 在烟浮力、湍流通道流和柯尔莫哥洛夫流三个基准上，蒸馏学生模型在频谱指标上与教师模型性能相当，参数量减少约一半，推理速度提升12倍。在相同训练预算下，蒸馏模型比从头训练的一致性模型SSIM高出23.1%。

Conclusion: 教师蒸馏策略不仅加速了采样，还提升了训练效率，为将高容量科学生成模型转化为紧凑、快速且易于部署的重建模型提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Reconstructing high-fidelity flow fields from low-fidelity observations is a central problem in scientific machine learning, yet recent diffusion and flow-matching models typically rely on iterative sampling, making them costly for latency-sensitive workflows such as ensemble forecasting, real-time visualization, and simulation-in-the-loop inference. We study whether a high-fidelity flow-matching generative model can be compressed into a compact one-step model for fast scientific flow reconstruction. Our approach distills an optimal-transport flow-matching teacher into a one-step consistency model. Low-fidelity observations are incorporated at inference by initializing the generative trajectory from a noised observation along the transport path, allowing an unconditional high-fidelity flow model to perform conditional reconstruction without retraining the teacher. We evaluate this distillation strategy on three fluid benchmarks, Smoke Buoyancy, Turbulent Channel Flow, and Kolmogorov Flow, using coarse-to-fine reconstruction as a controlled testbed at field sizes up to $256 \times 256$. Across these settings, the distilled student retains similar performance of the teacher's model on spectrum metrics, while using roughly half as many parameters and achieving a $12\times$ inference speedup over the flow-matching teacher. Under the same training budget, the distilled student also outperforms a one-step consistency model trained directly from scratch by $23.1\%$ in SSIM, showing that teacher distillation improves training efficiency rather than merely accelerating sampling. These results suggest a promising route for turning future high-capacity scientific generative models into compact reconstruction models that are faster to train, cheaper to run, and easier to deploy.

</details>


### [338] [Invariant Features in Language Models: Geometric Characterization and Model Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06458)
*Agnibh Dasgupta,Abdullah Tanvir,Xin Zhong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出局部几何框架，认为语言模型中语义等价的输入在潜空间中占据结构化区域，通过对比学习发现不变子空间，并应用于零样本模型归因。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型对释义（paraphrasing）表现出强鲁棒性，表明语义信息可能通过稳定的内部表征编码，但这种不变性的结构和来源尚不清楚。

Method: (1) 几何刻画不变潜特征；(2) 对比性子空间发现方法，分离语义改变与语义保持的变化；(3) 将不变表征应用于零样本模型归因。

Result: 不变结构出现在特定深度区域；语义位移主要位于干扰子空间之外；表征层干预表明不变成分对模型输出有因果作用；不变表征捕获模型特定的几何模式，实现了准确归因。

Conclusion: 语义不变性可视为潜表征的局部几何性质，为理解语言模型如何组织意义提供了原则性视角。

Abstract: Language models exhibit strong robustness to paraphrasing, suggesting that semantic information may be encoded through stable internal representations, yet the structure and origin of such invariance remain unclear. We propose a local geometric framework in which semantically equivalent inputs occupy structured regions in latent space, with paraphrastic variation along nuisance directions and semantic identity preserved in invariant subspaces. Building on this view, we make three contributions: (1) a geometric characterization of invariant latent features, (2) a contrastive subspace discovery method that separates semantic-changing from semantic-preserving variation, and (3) an application of invariant representations to zero-shot model attribution. Across models and layers, empirical results support these contributions. Invariant structure emerges in specific depth regions, semantic displacement lies largely outside the nuisance subspace, and representation-level interventions indicate a causal role of invariant components in model outputs. Invariant representations also capture model-specific geometric patterns, enabling accurate attribution. These findings suggest that semantic invariance can be viewed as a local geometric property of latent representations, offering a principled perspective on how language models organize meaning.

</details>


### [339] [Towards Steering without Sacrifice: Principled Training of Steering Vectors for Prompt-only Interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05983)
*Yuntai Bao,Qinfeng Li,Xinyan Yu,Xuhong Zhang,Ge Su,Wenqi Zhang,Liu Yan,Haiqin Weng,Jianwei Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出联合训练策略和Prompt-only SV（PrOSV），分别解决传统微调型Steering Vector需要人工选择steering factor和全序列干预损害生成质量的问题，实验表明PrOSV在AxBench上优于传统方法，并在通用能力与对抗鲁棒性间取得更好平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统微调型Steering Vector有两个局限：(1) 推理时需为每个SV精心选择steering factor以平衡引导效果与生成质量；(2) 作为全序列SV（FSSV）过度干预模型生成过程，牺牲生成质量。本文旨在解决这两个问题。

Method: (1) 提出联合训练steering factor和方向，利用神经网络缩放理论发现中等偏大的初始化尺寸和学习率对联合训练的稳定性和效率至关重要，从而无需事后选择factor。(2) 受表征微调启发，提出Prompt-only SV（PrOSV），仅对少量prompt token进行干预，而非全序列。

Result: 在AxBench上，PrOSV结合联合训练方案优于传统FSSV；PrOSV在通用模型效用与对抗鲁棒性之间的权衡优于FSSV。

Conclusion: 联合训练摆脱了post-hoc factor选择，PrOSV以更轻量的干预方式获得了更好的引导效果和鲁棒性，为SV的设计提供了新方向。

Abstract: Recently, steering vectors (SVs) have emerged as an effective and lightweight approach to steer behaviors of large language models (LLMs), among which fine-tuned SVs are more effective than optimization-free ones. However, current approaches to fine-tuned SVs suffer from two limitations. First, they require careful selection of steering factors on a per-SV basis to balance steering effectiveness and generation quality at inference time. Second, they operate as full-sequence SVs (FSSVs), which can sacrifice generation quality regardless of factor selection due to excessive intervention on the model generation process. To address the first limitation, we propose joint training of steering factors and directions, such that post-hoc factor selection is no longer required. Using neural network scaling theory, we find that moderately large initialization sizes and learning rates for steering factors are essential for stability and efficiency of joint training. To tackle the second limitation, we draw inspiration from representation fine-tuning and introduce Prompt-only SV (PrOSV), an SV that intervenes only on a few prompt tokens. Our empirical results show that PrOSV outperforms traditional FSSVs on AxBench when using our joint training scheme. We also find that PrOSV achieves a better tradeoff between general model utility and adversarial robustness than FSSV.

</details>


### [340] [DiBA: Diagonal and Binary Matrix Approximation for Neural Network Weight Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05994)
*Nobutaka Ono*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DiBA（对角与二元矩阵近似）——一种将密集权重矩阵分解为三个对角矩阵和两个0/1二元矩阵的压缩方法，并基于该分解设计了DiBA-Greedy优化算法和DiBARD下游微调策略，实验验证在多个模型上实现了显著的准确率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代神经网络中的线性层、1×1卷积、注意力投影和嵌入层等组件包含大量密集矩阵权重，存储和计算开销大。现有压缩方法存在精度损失或不利于下游适配的问题，亟需一种既能高效压缩、又能在下游任务中方便微调且保持精度的方法。

Method: 将权重矩阵A分解为D1*B1*D2*B2*D3，其中D1,D2,D3为对角矩阵，B1,B2为0/1二元矩阵。矩阵-向量乘法将稠密乘法分解为三个逐元素缩放和两个二元混合操作，乘法次数从mn降至m+k+n。提出DiBA-Greedy交替求解器：对角因子用闭式最小二乘更新，二元因子用精确单比特改进测试。提出DiBARD：替换密集层为DiBA后冻结二元矩阵，仅微调对角因子。

Result: 在40个预训练模型的密集权重矩阵上，DiBA-Greedy随存储率增加带来一致的SNR提升。在部件替换实验中，DiBARD将DistilBERT/WikiText掩码词准确率从0.4447提升至0.5210，音频频谱Transformer在Speech Commands上的测试准确率从0.7684提升至0.9781。

Conclusion: DiBA通过对角-二元分解实现了高效的权重压缩，DiBARD在不重新优化二元因子的情况下显著提升了下游任务性能，验证了该方法的有效性和实用价值。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose DiBA (Diagonal and Binary Matrix Approximation), a compact matrix factorization for neural network weight compression. Many components of modern networks, including linear layers, $1\times1$ convolutions, attention projections, and embedding layers, have dense matrix weights. DiBA approximates $A\in\mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$ by $\widehat A=D_1B_1D_2B_2D_3$, where $D_1,D_2,D_3$ are diagonal matrices and $B_1,B_2$ are $0/1$ binary matrices. The intermediate dimension $k$ controls the trade-off between theoretical storage and approximation accuracy. For matrix-vector products, DiBA decomposes dense multiplication into three element-wise scaling operations and two binary mixing operations, reducing the floating-point multiplication count from $mn$ to $m+k+n$. For optimization, we introduce DiBA-Greedy, an alternating solver that combines closed-form least-squares updates for the diagonal factors with exact one-bit improvement tests for the binary factors. We also introduce DiBARD (DiBA with Retuning only Diagonal factors), which replaces dense-matrix layers by DiBA factors, freezes the binary matrices, and retunes only the diagonal entries on downstream data. This preserves compact binary mixing without discrete search during adaptation. On 40 dense weight matrices extracted from public pretrained models, DiBA-Greedy yields consistent SNR improvements as the theoretical storage ratio increases. After DiBA replacement in two component-replacement studies, DiBARD improves DistilBERT/WikiText masked-token accuracy from 0.4447 to 0.5210 and Speech Commands test accuracy for an Audio Spectrogram Transformer from 0.7684 to 0.9781 without reoptimizing the binary factors.

</details>


### [341] [Cubit: Token Mixer with Kernel Ridge Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06501)
*Chuanyang Zheng,Jiankai Sun,Yihang Gao,Yuehao Wang,Liangchen Tan,Mac Schwager,Anderson Schneider,Yuriy Nevmyvaka,Xiaodong Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Cubit架构，用核岭回归(KRR)替代Transformer中的注意力机制，实验表明在长序列建模中优于传统Transformer。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer的注意力机制可被解释为Nadaraya-Watson回归，而作者认为这种回归方法在数学基础上不够强，因此尝试用核岭回归(KRR)替代，以获得更强的理论基础和更好的建模能力。

Method: 提出Cubit架构：将注意力计算修改为核岭回归的闭式解，结合核相似性的值聚合与核矩阵逆的归一化。同时提出Limited-Range Rescale (LRR)技术，在可控范围内重新缩放值层，以提升训练稳定性。

Result: 实验表明Cubit在长序列建模方面表现更强，且随着训练序列长度增加，Cubit相比Transformer的性能增益也越大。

Conclusion: Cubit作为一种基于核岭回归的架构，相比基于Nadaraya-Watson回归的Transformer具有更强的数学基础，尤其在长序列建模场景下表现出显著优势。

Abstract: Since its introduction in 2017, the Transformer has become one of the most widely adopted architectures in modern deep learning. Despite extensive efforts to improve positional encoding, attention mechanisms, and feed-forward networks, the core token-mixing mechanism in Transformers remains attention. In this work, we show that the attention module in Transformers can be interpreted as performing Nadaraya-Watson regression, where it computes similarities between tokens and aggregates the corresponding values accordingly. Motivated by this perspective, we propose Cubit, a potential next-generation architecture that leverages Kernel Ridge Regression (KRR), while the vanilla Transformer relies on Nadaraya-Watson regression. Specifically, Cubit modifies the classical attention computation by incorporating the closed-form solution of KRR, combining value aggregation through kernel similarities with normalization via the inverse of the kernel matrix. To improve the training stability, we further propose the Limited-Range Rescale (LRR), which rescales the value layer within a controlled range. We argue that Cubit, as a KRR-based architecture, provides a stronger mathematical foundation than the vanilla Transformer, whose attention mechanism corresponds to Nadaraya-Watson regression. We validate this claim through comprehensive experiments. The experimental results suggest that Cubit may exhibit stronger long-sequence modeling capability. In particular, its performance gain over the Transformer appears to increase as the training sequence length grows.

</details>


### [342] [A Fine-Grained Understanding of Uniform Convergence for Halfspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06004)
*Aryeh Kontorovich,Kasper Green Larsen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了半空间（halfspaces）的细粒度一致收敛行为，超越了最坏情况下的VC界。对于非齐次半空间，标准一阶VC界本质上是紧的；而对于$\mathbb{R}^2$中的齐次半空间，行为显著不同，可实现情况下误差为$O(1/n)$，不可知情况下通过临界楔形局部化论证得到带状的、无对数的偏差界，并证明了$\ln\ln n$的开销不可避免。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准VC界在最坏情况下是紧的，但无法区分不同结构（如齐次与非齐次、不同维度）下学习问题的实际难度差异。本文旨在揭示半空间在细粒度层面上的真实一致收敛行为，特别是维度与结构阈值的影响。

Method: 作者结合组合几何与概率论证：对非齐次半空间证明下界匹配VC上界；对$\mathbb{R}^2$中齐次半空间，利用临界楔形（critical-wedge）局部化技术，在二进风险带上建立无对数因子的偏差界，再通过并集界（引入$\ln\ln n$开销）整合。

Result: (1) 非齐次半空间（$d\ge 2$）：可实现误差$\Theta(d\ln(n/d)/n)$，不可知偏差$\sqrt{\tau\ln(1/\tau)}$。(2) $\mathbb{R}^2$中齐次半空间：可实现误差$O(1/n)$；不可知情况下带状偏差界无对数因子，$\ln\ln n$开销已证明为下界紧的。

Conclusion: 本文给出了半空间一致收敛行为近乎完整的细粒度刻画，揭示了维度（$d=2$ vs $d\ge 2$）和结构（齐次 vs 非齐次）是决定学习难度的关键阈值。

Abstract: We study the fine-grained uniform convergence behavior of halfspaces beyond worst-case VC bounds. For inhomogeneous halfspaces in $\mathbb{R}^d$ with $d\ge 2$, we show that standard first-order VC bounds are essentially tight: even consistent hypotheses can incur population error $Θ(d\ln(n/d)/n)$, and in the agnostic setting the deviation scales as $\sqrt{τ\ln(1/τ)}$ at true error $τ$. In contrast, homogeneous halfspaces in $\mathbb{R}^2$ exhibit a markedly different behavior. In the realizable case, every hypothesis consistent with the sample has error $O(1/n)$. In the agnostic case, we prove a bandwise, log-free deviation bound on each dyadic risk band via a critical-wedge localization argument. Unioning over bands incurs only a $\ln\ln n$ overhead, and we establish a matching lower bound showing this overhead is unavoidable. Together, these results give a fine-grained and nearly complete picture of uniform convergence for halfspaces, revealing sharp dimensional and structural thresholds.

</details>


### [343] [PairAlign: A Framework for Sequence Tokenization via Self-Alignment with Applications to Audio Tokenization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06582)
*Adhiraj Banerjee,Vipul Arora*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PairAlign提出了一种通过序列级自对齐进行紧凑音频分词的新框架，将分词视为条件序列生成，通过跨视图训练实现编辑距离保留，在TIMIT检索上减少55%的存档token数，同时保持编辑距离搜索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频分词器（如VQ、codec）依赖局部量化或聚类，未能优化序列一致性、紧凑性、长度控制、终止符和编辑相似性等序列级属性，导致分词结果缺乏全局结构感知。

Method: PairAlign将分词建模为条件序列生成：编码器将语音映射为连续条件，自回归解码器从BOS生成token。通过两个内容保持视图的交叉配对训练（每个视图的序列在另一视图表示下具有高似然），结合EMA教师目标、跨配对教师强制、前缀破坏、似然对比和长度控制等技术。

Result: 在3秒语音上学习到紧凑、非退化的序列，词汇使用广泛且跨视图一致性强。TIMIT检索上存档token数减少55%同时保持编辑距离搜索性能。相比密集几何分词器，局部重叠更低但长度控制更强，100ms偏移下编辑轨迹有界。

Conclusion: PairAlign是一种序列符号预测学习器，类似JEPA风格目标，但预测的是可学习变长符号序列而非连续潜变量，为音频符号化表示提供了新范式。

Abstract: Many operations on sensory data -- comparison, memory, retrieval, and reasoning -- are naturally expressed over discrete symbolic structures. In language this interface is given by tokens; in audio, it must be learned. Existing audio tokenizers rely on quantization, clustering, or codec reconstruction, assigning tokens locally, so sequence consistency, compactness, length control, termination, and edit similarity are rarely optimized directly.
  We introduce PairAlign, a framework for compact audio tokenization through sequence-level self-alignment. PairAlign treats tokenization as conditional sequence generation: an encoder maps speech to a continuous condition, and an autoregressive decoder generates tokens from BOS, learning token identity, order, length, and EOS placement. Given two content-preserving views, each view's sequence is trained to be likely under the other's representation, while unrelated examples provide competing sequences. This gives a scalable surrogate for edit-distance preservation while discouraging many-to-one collapse.
  PairAlign starts from VQ-style tokenization and refines it with EMA-teacher targets, cross-paired teacher forcing, prefix corruption, likelihood contrast, and length control.
  On 3-second speech, PairAlign learns compact, non-degenerate sequences with broad vocabulary usage and strong cross-view consistency. On TIMIT retrieval, it preserves edit-distance search while reducing archive token count by 55%. A continuous-sweep probe shows lower local overlap than a dense geometric tokenizer, but stronger length control and bounded edit trajectories under 100 ms shifts. PairAlign is a sequence-symbolic predictive learner: like JEPA-style objectives, it predicts an abstract target from another view as a learned variable-length symbolic sequence, not a continuous latent.

</details>


### [344] [Quantizing With Randomized Hadamard Transforms: Efficient Heuristic Now Proven](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06014)
*Ran Ben-Basat,William Kuszmaul,Michael Mitzenmacher,Amit Portnoy,Shay Vargaftik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了随机化Hadamard变换(RHT)在量化预处理中替代均匀随机旋转(URR)的理论保证。证明了两层RHT可使每个坐标的边际分布接近高斯分布（误差O(d^{-1/2})），可在DRIVE和QUIC-FL等压缩方案中渐近匹配URR性能；三层RHT可保证坐标协方差衰减，使向量量化(VQ)的期望误差接近URR；并提出了一种线性时间检查方法，根据输入矩动态调整RHT层数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 均匀随机旋转(URR)是现代量化方法中的重要预处理步骤，实际中常被快速Hadamard变换(RHT)替代，但RHT在最坏情况下性能不佳，因为单个坐标的分布可能偏离理想的高斯分布。本文旨在研究多层RHT在理论上能否在边际分布、坐标协方差等方面逼近URR的性能，并为实际应用提供理论保障。

Method: 1) 理论分析：证明两层RHT后，归一化旋转向量每个坐标的边际分布与标准高斯分布在Kolmogorov距离和1-Wasserstein距离上误差为O(d^{-1/2})；2) 将上述界代入DRIVE和QUIC-FL方案分析；3) 证明三层RHT可保证坐标协方差衰减，使VQ码本的期望误差与URR相当；4) 提出线性时间O(d)的输入矩检查方法，动态调整RHT层数。

Result: 1) 两层RHT在DRIVE和QUIC-FL方案中可渐近匹配URR性能；2) 三层RHT可使VQ期望误差与URR相差一个随维度增大而消失的附加项；3) 提出的动态检查方法可在实际中提升性能。

Conclusion: 多层RHT可以在理论上逼近URR的性能，两层适用于大多数压缩场景，三层适用于向量量化场景，动态调整策略可进一步提升实际效果。这为RHT替代URR提供了严格的理论保证。

Abstract: Uniform random rotations (URRs) are a common preprocessing step in modern quantization approaches used for gradient compression, inference acceleration, KV-cache compression, model weight quantization, and approximate nearest-neighbor search in vector databases. In practice, URRs are often replaced by randomized Hadamard transforms (RHTs), which preserve orthogonality while admitting fast implementations. The remaining issue is the performance for worst-case inputs. With a URR, each coordinate is individually distributed as a shifted beta distribution, which converges to a Gaussian distribution in high dimensions. Generally, one RHT is not suitable in the worst case, as individual coordinates can be far from these distributions. We show that after composing two RHTs on any $d$-sized input vector, the marginal distribution of every fixed coordinate of the normalized rotated vector is within $O(d^{-1/2})$ of a standard Gaussian both in Kolmogorov distance and in $1$-Wasserstein distance. We then plug these bounds into the analyses of modern compression schemes, namely DRIVE and QUIC-FL, and show that two RHTs achieve performance that asymptotically matches URRs.
  However, we show that two RHTs may not be sufficient for Vector Quantization (VQ), which often requires weak correlation across fixed-size blocks of coordinates (as opposed to only marginal distribution convergence for single coordinates). We prove that a composition of three RHTs leads to decaying coordinate covariance. This ensures that any fixed, bounded, multi-dimensional VQ codebook optimized for URRs has the same expected error when using three RHTs, up to an additive term that vanishes with the dimension.
  Finally, because practical inputs are rarely adversarial, we propose a linear-time ${O}(d)$ check on the input's moments to dynamically adapt the number of RHTs used at runtime to improve performance.

</details>


### [345] [Matrix-Decoupled Concentration for Autoregressive Sequences: Dimension-Free Guarantees for Sparse Long-Context Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06017)
*Pei-Sen Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Matrix-Decoupled Concentration (MDC)的新框架，通过矩阵-向量乘法精确解耦因果依赖结构与目标敏感性，解决了自回归大语言模型中序列级评估的浓度界紧致性问题，实现了维度无关的$\mathcal{O}(1)$方差代理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有框架在处理自回归LLM的序列级评估时存在两个瓶颈：(i)经典不等式将依赖结构与目标敏感性分离，导致稀疏终端奖励的方差代理膨胀至次优的$\mathcal{O}(N)$；(ii)空间方法虽能获得更紧的界，但缺乏严格因果过滤，不适用于自回归生成场景。

Method: 建立了一种针对依赖序列的尖锐McDiarmid型不等式，核心是通过因果依赖解算矩阵与目标敏感性向量的精确矩阵-向量乘法进行解耦。该MDC框架天然恢复了马尔可夫链的最优常数，并利用有向d-分隔为因果树生成阶最优界。

Result: MDC通过在严格因果框架内精确保留奖励的坐标稀疏性，数学上防止了标量塌缩，保证了维度无关的$\mathcal{O}(1)$方差代理，为长上下文推理的稳定性提供了严格的数学证明。

Conclusion: 本文提出的MDC框架同时解决了依赖结构分离和因果过滤缺失两大瓶颈，为自回归序列生成中的浓度估计提供了理论上最优的工具，并严格证明了长上下文推理的稳定性。

Abstract: Sequence-level evaluations in autoregressive Large Language Models (LLMs) rely on highly dependent token generation. Establishing tight concentration bounds for these processes remains a challenge due to two fundamental bottlenecks in existing frameworks: (i) classical inequalities typically separate dependency structures from target sensitivities, leading to a scalar collapse that inflates the variance proxy to a suboptimal $\mathcal{O}(N)$ for sparse terminal rewards; (ii) conversely, while certain spatial methods achieve tighter bounds, they lack the strictly causal filtration required by sequential generation, rendering them inapplicable to the autoregressive setting. To resolve both bottlenecks, we establish a sharp McDiarmid-type inequality for dependent sequences, governed strictly by the exact matrix-vector multiplication of the causal dependency resolvent and the target sensitivity vector. This Matrix-Decoupled Concentration (MDC) framework natively recovers optimal constants for Markov chains and exploits directed $d$-separation to yield order-optimal bounds for causal trees. Crucially, by exactly preserving the coordinate-wise sparsity of rewards within a strictly causal framework, MDC mathematically prevents scalar collapse, guaranteeing a dimension-free $\mathcal{O}(1)$ variance proxy and providing a rigorous mathematical justification for the stability of long-context reasoning.

</details>


### [346] [When and Why SignSGD Outperforms SGD: A Theoretical Study Based on $\ell_1$-norm Lower Bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06615)
*Hongyi Tao,Dingzhi Yu,Lijun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从理论上证明了在$\ell_1$-范数平稳性、$\ell_\infty$-光滑性和可分离噪声模型下，SignSGD等符号优化算法相比SGD能实现$d$倍的复杂度降低（在稀疏噪声下），并将这一框架推广到矩阵域（Muon优化器），在GPT-2预训练中验证了理论预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管符号优化算法（如SignSGD、Muon）在训练大模型时表现优异，但缺乏理论解释：在标准$\ell_2$范数光滑性和有限方差条件下，SGD已被证明是极小值最优的，无法解释符号方法的优势。作者希望突破这一理论障碍，揭示符号方法何时、为何优于SGD。

Method: 采用$\ell_1$-范数平稳性、$\ell_\infty$-光滑性和可分离噪声模型来刻画符号更新的坐标级特性；推导SignSGD的匹配上下界；将框架推广到矩阵域以分析Muon优化器；在124M参数GPT-2模型上验证理论预测。

Result: 在稀疏噪声下，SignSGD的复杂度上界与SGD的下界相比，实现了$d$倍的复杂度降低；Muon优化器在矩阵域中保持了这一最优维度缩放性质；理论预测与GPT-2预训练的加速收敛现象一致。

Conclusion: 符号优化算法在特定的问题几何（$\ell_1$/$\ell_\infty$框架和稀疏噪声）下理论上可显著超越SGD，这为理解其在大模型训练中的成功提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Sign-based optimization algorithms, such as SignSGD and Muon, have garnered significant attention for their remarkable performance in training large foundation models. Despite this empirical success, we still lack a theoretical understanding of when and why these sign-based methods outperform vanilla SGD. The core obstacle is that under standard smoothness and finite variance conditions, SGD is known to be minimax optimal for finding stationary points measured by $\ell_2$-norms, thereby fundamentally precluding any complexity gains for sign-based methods in standard settings. To overcome this barrier, we analyze sign-based optimizers leveraging $\ell_1$-norm stationarity, $\ell_\infty$-smoothness, and a separable noise model, which can better capture the coordinate-wise nature of signed updates. Under this distinct problem geometry, we derive matched upper and lower bounds for SignSGD and explicitly characterize the problem class in which SignSGD provably dominates SGD. Specifically, we compare the \emph{upper bound of SignSGD} with the \emph{lower bound of SGD}, illustrating that SignSGD effectively reduces the complexity by a factor of $d$ under \emph{sparse noise}, where $d$ is the problem dimension. Furthermore, we elevate this framework to the matrix domain, providing an equivalent optimal lower bound for the Muon optimizer, proving that extending the sign operator to matrices preserves this optimal scaling with dimensionality. Finally, we bridge our theoretical bounds to practice, demonstrating that the theoretical superiority of SignSGD accurately predicts its faster convergence during the pretraining of a 124M parameter GPT-2 model.

</details>


### [347] [Multi-agent decision making: A Blackwell's informativeness approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06028)
*Zheng Zhang,Cuong C. Nguyen,Kevin Wells,Gustavo Carneiro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文利用Blackwell信息框架理论分析多LLM系统中的决策问题，证明投票和辩论的信息结构不会优于所有智能体私有信息的汇集，并据此提出一种基于后验乘积估计的实用方法，在六个QA基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的多LLM聚合方法（如投票、辩论）缺乏理论基础和正式保证，无法确保决策的信息充分性，需要一种更严谨的分析框架和更优的聚合策略。

Method: 1) 使用Blackwell信息结构抽象对多LLM决策进行理论分析；2) 证明投票和辩论的信息结构不会优于各智能体私有信息的贝叶斯池化后验；3) 提出乘积后验估计器（product-of-posteriors estimator）来近似池化后验，用于实际QA任务。

Result: 在六个QA基准数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法优于现有的多LLM辩论和投票方法。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯池化后验最大化在Blackwell序下是信息理论上界的决策规则，而提出的乘积后验估计方法可有效逼近这一上界，为多LLM决策提供了更具信息量的聚合方案。

Abstract: The rapid development of large language models (LLMs) has motivated research on decision-making in multi-agent systems, where multiple agents collaborate to achieve shared objectives. Existing aggregation approaches, such as voting and debate, are largely ad-hoc and lack formal guarantees regarding the informativeness of the resulting decisions. In this paper, we provide a principled approach to analyse decisions made in the multi-LLM setting using Blackwell's informativeness framework. Within the Blackwell information-structure abstraction, we show that voting and debate induce information structures that are no more informative than the pooled private information of all agents. This result identifies Bayesian pooled posterior maximisation as an information-theoretic upper-bound decision rule under the Blackwell ordering. Motivated by this theoretical analysis, we introduce a practical method for LLM-based question-answering (QA) tasks that estimates each agent's posterior and approximates the pooled posterior using a product-of-posteriors estimator. Extensive experiments on six QA benchmarks demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art multi-LLM debate and voting methods.

</details>


### [348] [Does Synthetic Data Help? Empirical Evidence from Deep Learning Time Series Forecasters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06032)
*Hugo Cazaux,Eyjólfur Ingi Ásgeirsson,Hlynur Stefánsson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过大规模实验（4,218次运行）系统评估合成数据在时间序列预测中的作用，发现其效果高度依赖架构：通道混合模型受益，通道独立模型受损，仅季节-趋势生成器可靠，硬课程切换有害。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 合成数据在语言模型训练中已显示出巨大价值，但其在时间序列预测中的作用尚不清楚，缺乏系统性的理解和可操作的指导原则。

Method: 开展大规模实证研究：9个实验组、4,218次运行，系统评估合成时间序列增强在5种架构、4种合成信号和7个数据集上的表现。

Result: 1) 效果高度依赖架构：通道混合模型（TimesNet, iTransformer）在多数试验中受益，通道独立模型（DLinear, PatchTST）一致退化；2) 低资源场景下增益显著：TimesNet仅用10%数据+合成增强即可超越全数据基线；3) 仅季节-趋势生成器可靠；4) 硬课程切换导致+24% MSE退化；5) 平均而言增强在67%试验中有害。

Conclusion: 提供了可操作的合成数据使用指南：对通道混合架构使用合成增强，采用渐进退火调度，将低资源增强视为架构和数据集依赖的。

Abstract: Synthetic data has transformed language model training, yet its role in time series forecasting remains poorly understood. We present a large-scale empirical study: nine experiment groups, 4,218 runs systematically evaluating synthetic time series augmentation across five architectures, four synthetic signals and seven datasets. The effect is sharply architecture-conditional: channel-mixing models (TimesNet, iTransformer) benefit in the majority of trials, while channel-independent models (DLinear, PatchTST) are consistently degraded. In selected low-resource settings the gains are striking: TimesNet trained on only 10\% of Weather data with synthetic augmentation surpasses the full-data baseline (4 of 16 sparsity-dataset combinations). Averaged across all architectures, augmentation hurts in 67\% of trials. We further find that only the Seasonal-Trend generator reliably helps across the tested benchmarks, and that hard curriculum switching is actively harmful (+24\% MSE degradation). These results provide concrete, actionable guidelines on how to use synthetic data: use synthetic augmentation with channel-mixing architectures, use gradual annealing schedules, and treat low-resource augmentation as architecture- and dataset-dependent. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/hugoiscracked/synthetic-ts/tree/main}

</details>


### [349] [Optimal Transport for LLM Reward Modeling from Noisy Preference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06036)
*Licheng Pan,Haochen Yang,Haoxuan Li,Yunsheng Lu,Yongqi Tong,Yinuo Wang,Shijian Wang,Zhixuan Chu,Lei Shen,Yuan Lu,Hao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SelectiveRM，一个基于最优传输的奖励模型去噪框架。通过联合一致性差异对齐预测与偏好分布，并引入质量松弛机制自动排除噪声样本，理论证明其优化了更紧的干净风险上界，实验全面优于SOTA方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有奖励模型在RLHF中容易过拟合真实数据中的噪声偏好，而传统去噪方法依赖同质噪声假设，无法捕捉语言偏好的复杂性。

Method: 1) 设计联合一致性差异，对齐模型预测与偏好数据的分布；2) 引入质量松弛机制（部分最优传输），放松严格质量守恒约束，自动排除与语义一致性矛盾的噪声样本。

Result: 在多个基准上显著超越现有最优方法，且理论证明了优化的上界更紧。

Conclusion: 基于最优传输的部分传输机制能有效处理RLHF中的复杂噪声偏好问题，为奖励模型去噪提供了新范式。

Abstract: Reward models are fundamental to Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), yet real-world datasets are inevitably corrupted by noisy preference. Conventional training objectives tend to overfit these errors, while existing denoising approaches often rely on homogeneous noise assumptions that fail to capture the complexity of linguistic preferences. To handle these challenges, we propose SelectiveRM, a framework grounded in optimal transport. We first devise a Joint Consistency Discrepancy to align the distribution of model predictions with preference data. Furthermore, to address the limitation of strict mass conservation which compels the model to fit outliers, we incorporate a Mass Relaxation mechanism via partial transport. This enables the autonomous exclusion of samples with noisy preference that contradict semantic consistency. Theoretically, we demonstrate that SelectiveRM optimizes a tighter upper bound on the unobserved clean risk. Extensive experiments validate that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across diverse benchmarks.

</details>


### [350] [Recursive Agent Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06639)
*Apurva Gandhi,Satyaki Chakraborty,Xiangjun Wang,Aviral Kumar,Graham Neubig*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出递归智能体优化（RAO），一种通过强化学习训练能递归生成子任务代理的智能体方法，实现推理时扩展、长上下文处理及分治泛化，在训练效率、超上下文任务、难度泛化和时间消耗上均优于单智能体系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体在处理超长上下文或复杂任务时受限于上下文窗口和单智能体架构，缺乏一种能让模型自主学会递归分解任务、委派子任务并进行高效通信的训练方法。

Method: 提出RAO框架，基于强化学习训练递归智能体，使其学会何时以及如何递归生成子智能体实例并委派子任务，同时实现智能体间的通信机制，形成推理时自动扩展的算法范式。

Result: 训练效率更高；能扩展到超出模型上下文窗口的任务；能泛化到比训练任务更难的场景；相比单智能体系统减少了实际运行时间。

Conclusion: RAO提供了一种有效的递归智能体训练范式，在多个维度上显著优于传统单智能体方法，尤其适用于需要长上下文处理或复杂问题分解的场景。

Abstract: We introduce Recursive Agent Optimization (RAO), a reinforcement learning approach for training recursive agents: agents that can spawn and delegate sub-tasks to new instantiations of themselves recursively. Recursive agents implement an inference-time scaling algorithm that naturally allows agents to scale to longer contexts and generalize to more difficult problems via divide-and-conquer. RAO provides a method to train models to best take advantage of such recursive inference, teaching agents when and how to delegate and communicate. We find that recursive agents trained in this way enjoy better training efficiency, can scale to tasks that go beyond the model's context window, generalize to tasks much harder than the ones the agent was trained on, and can enjoy reduced wall-clock time compared to single-agent systems.

</details>


### [351] [Requests of a Feather Must Flock Together: Batch Size vs. Prefix Homogeneity in LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06046)
*Saksham Rathi,Preeti,Mythili Vutukuru*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Feather是一个前缀感知的调度器，利用强化学习在batch size和前缀同质性之间找到最优平衡，并引入Chunked Hash Tree加速前缀检测，相比现有调度器在端到端吞吐量上实现2-10倍提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型推理调度器最大化前缀重用仅为了减少KV缓存内存占用，但忽略了更小、前缀同质的batch实际上能通过更好的空间和时间局部性获得更高解码吞吐量。此外，现有基于radix-tree的前缀检测方法CPU开销过大。

Method: 1) 使用强化学习(RL)学习batch size与前缀同质性的最优权衡；2) 提出Chunked Hash Tree (CHT)轻量级数据结构，实现快速前缀检测和高效请求选择，避免昂贵的树遍历。

Result: 集成到vLLM和SGLang后，Feather相比现有调度器实现2-10倍更高的端到端吞吐量；在缺乏前缀共享的工作负载下性能不低于现有方案；通过减少KV缓存访问总次数来超越同样目标的前缀感知注意力内核。

Conclusion: 前缀感知调度中，适当牺牲batch size以换取更高前缀同质性可以显著提升解码吞吐量，强化学习是探索这一权衡的有效手段。

Abstract: Auto-regressive token generation in large language models is memory-bound because it requires "attending to" key and value tensors (KV cache) of all previous tokens. Prior work aims to improve the efficiency of this decode process by batching multiple requests together, and maximizing batch size subject to GPU memory constraints. The key observation of our work is that with prefix-sharing workloads, smaller, prefix-homogeneous batches -- where all requests share a common prefix -- can achieve higher decode throughput than larger, heterogeneous batches, due to better spatial and temporal locality during KV cache accesses. However, prefix-aware schedulers in state-of-the-art inference engines maximize prefix reuse within a batch only to reduce KV cache memory footprint, but do not stop batch formation at smaller homogeneous batches that could have performed better. Further, we show that shared prefix detection in existing schedulers relies on radix-tree traversals, incurring substantial CPU overhead that is often comparable to GPU execution time. This paper presents Feather, a prefix-aware scheduler that uses reinforcement learning (RL) to learn the optimal tradeoff between batch size and prefix homogeneity. We also introduce Chunked Hash Tree (CHT), a lightweight data structure that enables fast prefix detection and efficient request selection for the RL scheduler, avoiding expensive tree traversals. We integrate Feather into vLLM and SGLang, and our evaluation shows that Feather achieves 2--10$\times$ higher end-to-end throughput as compared to existing schedulers, while doing no worse than the status quo when the workload does not have enough prefix sharing. Feather achieves these gains by reducing the total number of KV cache accesses, surpassing the performance of prefix-aware attention kernels that have the same goal.

</details>


### [352] [When No Benchmark Exists: Validating Comparative LLM Safety Scoring Without Ground-Truth Labels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06652)
*Sushant Gautam,Finn Schwall,Annika Willoch Olstad,Fernando Vallecillos Ruiz,Birk Torpmann-Hagen,Sunniva Maria Stordal Bjørklund,Leon Moonen,Klas Pettersen,Michael A. Riegler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文形式化了无基准场景下的语言模型安全比较评分问题，提出基于情境审计的评估框架（SimpleAudit），并通过挪威语安全包和公共采购案例验证了该方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全基准在特定语言、行业或监管环境下往往缺失，而实际部署需要比较候选模型的安全性，亟需一种无需标注基准的评估方法。

Method: 提出工具性效度链（instrumental-validity chain），包含三个条件：对安全vs消融对照的响应性、目标方差主导性、跨重复运行稳定性。实例化为SimpleAudit评分工具，采用情境审计方式。

Result: Safe与abliterated目标的AUROC为0.89~1.00；目标身份主导方差（η²≈0.52）；严重度分布10次重复后稳定；该方法可迁移至Petri平台。

Conclusion: 安全评分必须完整报告分数、匹配差值、临界率、不确定性及裁判信息，而非简化为单一排名；实际案例表明安全模型取决于场景类别和风险度量。

Abstract: Many deployments must compare candidate language models for safety before a labeled benchmark exists for the relevant language, sector, or regulatory regime. We formalize this setting as benchmarkless comparative safety scoring and specify the contract under which a scenario-based audit can be interpreted as deployment evidence. Scores are valid only under a fixed scenario pack, rubric, auditor, judge, sampling configuration, and rerun budget. Because no labels are available, we replace ground-truth agreement with an instrumental-validity chain: responsiveness to a controlled safe-versus-abliterated contrast, dominance of target-driven variance over auditor and judge artifacts, and stability across reruns.
  We instantiate the chain in SimpleAudit, a local-first scoring instrument, and validate it on a Norwegian safety pack. Safe and abliterated targets separate with AUROC values between 0.89 and 1.00, target identity is the dominant variance component ($η^2 \approx 0.52$), and severity profiles stabilize by ten reruns. Applying the same chain to Petri shows that it admits both tools. The substantial differences arise upstream of the chain, in claim-contract enforcement and deployment fit. A Norwegian public-sector procurement case comparing Borealis and Gemma 3 demonstrates the resulting evidence in practice: the safer model depends on scenario category and risk measure. Consequently, scores, matched deltas, critical rates, uncertainty, and the auditor and judge used must be reported together rather than collapsed into a single ranking.

</details>


### [353] [TFM-Retouche: A Lightweight Input-Space Adapter for Tabular Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06047)
*Duong Nguyen,Mohammed Jawhar,Nicolas Chesneau*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TFM-Retouche，一种轻量级、架构无关的输入空间残差适配器，用于适配预训练表格基础模型，在TabArena-Lite榜单上取得最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格基础模型（TFM）的归纳偏差在推理时固定，微调方法要么计算昂贵（全微调），要么需要针对架构定制（PEFT），且效果参差不齐。需要一种轻量级、通用且有效的适配方法。

Method: 提出TFM-Retouche，一个输入空间残差适配器，学习对输入数据进行微小残差校正，使其与预训练TFM的归纳偏差对齐。适配器通过冻结的TFM进行端到端训练，并设计了后训练身份回退机制（当适配无帮助时回退到原始TFM）。

Result: 在TabArena-Lite的51个数据集上，TabICLv2-Retouche在榜单中排名第一，相比冻结的TabICLv2基线在Elo评分上提升+56，并在预测质量与训练/推理时间的权衡上处于帕累托前沿。

Conclusion: TFM-Retouche提供了一种架构无关、轻量级且有效的表格模型适配方案，解决了现有微调方法的效率与泛化性问题。

Abstract: Tabular foundation models (TFMs), such as TabPFN-2.6, TabICLv2, ConTextTab, Mitra, LimiX, and TabDPT, achieve strong zero-shot performance through in-context learning, but their inductive biases remain fixed at inference time. Adapting a pretrained TFM to a specific dataset or task typically requires either full fine-tuning, which is computationally expensive, or parameter-efficient tuning methods (PEFT) such as LoRA, which must be tailored to the internal architecture of each TFM. Furthermore, the evidence on whether weight-space fine-tuning improves accuracy or calibration is mixed \citep{tanna_exploring_2026,rubachev_finetuning_2025}. We introduce TFM-Retouche, a lightweight input-space residual adapter that is architecture-agnostic by design with respect to the frozen TFM backbone. TFM-Retouche learns a small residual correction in the input space to align the input data with the inductive biases of the pretrained model. The adapter is trained end-to-end through the frozen TFM, with a post-training identity guard that falls back to the unmodified TFM whenever adaptation does not help on held-out validation. On TabArena-Lite (51 datasets spanning binary classification, multiclass classification, and regression), TabICLv2-Retouche -- the framework instantiated on TabICLv2 -- is the top-ranked method on the leaderboard with light per-task tuning and ensembling, lifting aggregate Elo by +56 over the frozen TabICLv2 base and sitting on the Pareto front of predictive quality versus both training and inference time.

</details>


### [354] [Verifier-Backed Hard Problem Generation for Mathematical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06660)
*Yuhang Lai,Jiazhan Feng,Yee Whye Teh,Ning Miao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VHG是一个基于三方自博弈的验证器增强难题生成框架，通过引入独立验证器来约束设定者的奖励，可生成有效、有挑战性的新问题，在不定积分和一般数学推理任务上显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在生成有效、有挑战性且新颖的问题方面能力不足，已有方法要么依赖昂贵的人类专家，要么采用朴素的自博弈方式，容易因奖励黑客攻击而产生无效问题。

Method: 提出VHG框架，在传统的设定者-求解者二元博弈中引入独立验证器，形成三方自博弈。设定者的奖励由验证器评估的问题有效性和求解器评估的问题难度共同决定。实例化了硬符号验证器和软基于LLM的验证器两种变体。

Result: 在不定积分任务和一般数学推理任务上的实验结果表明，VHG在所有基线方法中表现最优，且优势明显。

Conclusion: 通过引入独立验证器来约束问题生成过程，可以有效解决现有自博弈方法中的奖励黑客问题，生成高质量、有效的困难问题。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate strong capabilities for solving scientific and mathematical problems, yet they struggle to produce valid, challenging, and novel problems - an essential component for advancing LLM training and enabling autonomous scientific research. Existing problem generation approaches either depend on expensive human expert involvement or adopt naive self-play paradigms, which frequently yield invalid problems due to reward hacking. This work introduces VHG, a verifier-enhanced hard problem generation framework built upon three-party self-play. By integrating an independent verifier into the conventional setter-solver duality, our design constrains the setter's reward to be jointly determined by problem validity (evaluated by the verifier) and difficulty (assessed by the solver). We instantiate two verifier variants: a Hard symbolic verifier and a Soft LLM-based verifier, with evaluations conducted on indefinite integral tasks and general mathematical reasoning tasks. Experimental results show that VHG substantially outperforms all baseline methods by a clear margin.

</details>


### [355] [When Brain Networks Travel: Learning Beyond Site](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06050)
*Yingxu Wang,Kunyu Zhang,Yanwu Yang,Thomas Wolfers,Yujie Wu,Siyang Gao,Nan Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CORE框架，通过站点感知混淆解耦、时间动态建模、线图转换和先验引导自适应门控机制，解决fMRI脑网络分析中跨站点分布外泛化问题，在四个真实数据集上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于图学习的fMRI脑网络分析方法在跨站点分布外(OOD)场景下表现不佳，原因有二：一是站点条件混淆因素导致非病理性的快捷方式偏差；二是基于时间平均构建的功能连接掩盖了瞬时的神经动力学信息，限制了模型对未见站点的泛化能力。

Method: CORE框架包含三个核心模块：(1)站点感知混淆解耦，减轻站点条件偏差并提取跨站点可复现的诊断性连接边作为群体支架；(2)在该支架上使用轻量级时间描述子刻画瞬态通路动力学，并将支架边组织成线图以实现可迁移的通路级建模；(3)先验引导的自适应门控机制，利用支架导出的群体先验同时保留个体特异性的连接变异性。

Result: 在ABIDE、REST-meta-MDD、SRPBS和ABCD四个真实数据集上采用留一站点评估，CORE一致优于现有方法，最高相对提升6.7%。同时对不同脑图谱分割方案保持鲁棒。

Conclusion: CORE为跨站点脑网络分析提供了一种统一且有效的解决方案，能够应对站点混淆和时间动态两大核心挑战，具有良好的泛化能力和稳健性。

Abstract: Graph-based learning on functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) has shown strong potential for brain network analysis. However, existing methods degrade under cross-site out-of-distribution (OOD) settings because site-conditioned confounders induce non-pathological shortcuts, while functional connectivity constructed by temporal averaging obscures transient neurodynamics, limiting generalization to unseen sites. In this paper, we propose Cross-site OOD Robust brain nEtwork (CORE), a unified framework for brain network learning across unseen sites. CORE first performs site-aware confounder decoupling to mitigate site-conditioned bias and extract a cross-site population scaffold of reproducible diagnostic connectivity edges. It then profiles transient pathway dynamics over this scaffold using lightweight temporal descriptors and organizes scaffold edges into a line graph for transferable pathway-level modeling. Finally, CORE introduces a prior-guided subject-adaptive gating mechanism that leverages scaffold-derived population priors while preserving subject-specific connectivity variability. Extensive experiments under leave-one-site-out evaluation on real-world datasets (ABIDE, REST-meta-MDD, SRPBS, and ABCD) show that CORE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, with up to 6.7% relative gain. Furthermore, CORE remains robust to atlas variations, maintaining performance gains across different brain parcellation schemes.

</details>


### [356] [Towards Generation-Efficient Uncertainty Estimation in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06053)
*Mingcheng Zhu,Yu Liu,Tingting Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了LLM不确定性估计的低成本方法，提出用部分生成（Logit Magnitude）甚至仅输入（MetaUE）来估计不确定性，实验表明有效估计实际需要的生成量远少于传统假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的LLM不确定性估计方法需要完整的自回归生成过程，计算成本高且延迟不确定性评估，难以满足医疗、金融等高可靠性场景的实时需求。本文旨在探索能否用部分生成甚至仅输入信息来实现有效的不确定性估计。

Method: 提出统一框架将不确定性估计视为自回归生成过程中的早期估计问题，将方法按观察信息量组织（从多生成到仅输入）。提出Logit Magnitude（利用top-M logit证据从早期停止的生成前缀估计不确定性）和MetaUE（将基于生成的不确定性分数蒸馏为轻量级仅输入估计器）。

Result: 实验表明：1) Logit Magnitude在通用和专业基准测试中表现优异；2) LLM的部分生成往往足以进行有效的不确定性估计；3) MetaUE在多种设置下提供了有竞争力的仅输入近似。

Conclusion: 有效的不确定性估计所需的生成量远小于通常假设，使得不可靠响应可以在更早阶段被识别，为低成本的LLM不确定性评估提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Uncertainty estimation is important for deploying LLMs in high-stakes applications such as healthcare and finance, where hallucinations can appear fluent and plausible while being factually incorrect, making it difficult for users to judge whether an output should be trusted. Existing methods require one or more full autoregressive generations to estimate uncertainty, which introduces substantial inference cost and often delays uncertainty assessment. In this paper, we investigate whether effective uncertainty estimation can be achieved with partial generation or even input-only information. Specifically, we first develop a unified framework that formulates uncertainty estimation as an early estimation problem over the autoregressive generation process of LLMs. This framework organises existing and proposed estimators by the information they observe, ranging from multi-generation to input-only prediction, and clarifies the performance-cost trade-off underlying different uncertainty estimation methods. Building on this view, we study two largely underexplored low-cost settings: estimating uncertainty with part of the generation, and predicting uncertainty from the input prompt. We propose Logit Magnitude, which uses top-M logit evidence to estimate uncertainty from an early-stopped generation prefix, and MetaUE, which distils generation-based uncertainty into a lightweight input-only estimator trained with uncertainty scores. Extensive experiments on general and domain-specific benchmarks show that Logit Magnitude achieves strong performance, and partial generations of LLMs are often sufficient for effective uncertainty estimation. MetaUE further provides a competitive input-only approximation in several settings. These findings suggest that effective uncertainty estimation requires less generation than commonly assumed, enabling unreliable responses to be identified earlier.

</details>


### [357] [Towards Self-Explainable Document Visual Question Answering with Chain-of-Explanation Predictions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06058)
*Kjetil Indrehus,Adrian Duric,Changkyu Choi,Ali Ramezani-Kebrya*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CoExVQA 提出了一种自解释的文档视觉问答框架，通过链式解释设计（先识别证据→再定位答案区域→最后解码答案）实现可验证的推理过程，在PFL-DocVQA上ANLS提升12%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DocVQA模型将证据识别与答案定位纠缠在一起，作为黑盒运作，难以验证预测如何依赖于视觉证据。

Method: CoExVQA采用链式解释设计，先识别问题相关证据，再显式定位答案区域，最后仅从该接地区域解码答案。

Result: 在PFL-DocVQA上达到SotA可解释DocVQA性能，ANLS比当前可解释基线提升12%。

Conclusion: 限制解码过程仅使用接地证据，能够实现透明且可验证的预测，同时保持高准确率。

Abstract: Document Visual Question Answering (DocVQA) requires vision-language models to reason not only about what information in a document is relevant to a question, but also where the answer is grounded on the page. Existing DocVQA models entangle question-relevant evidence and answer localization and operate largely as black boxes, offering limited means to verify how predictions depend on visual evidence. We propose CoExVQA, a self-explainable DocVQA framework with a grounded reasoning process through a chain-of-explanation design. CoExVQA first identifies question-relevant evidence, then explicitly localizes the answer region, and finally decodes the answer exclusively from the grounded region. Prediction via CoExVQA's chain-of-explanation enables direct inspection and verification of the reasoning process across modalities. Empirical results show that restricting decoding to grounded evidence achieves SotA explainable DocVQA performance on PFL-DocVQA, improving ANLS by 12% over the current explainable baselines while providing transparent and verifiable predictions.

</details>


### [358] [Geometry-Aware Simplicial Message Passing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06061)
*Elena Xinyi Wang,Bastian Rieck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出几何单纯形Weisfeiler-Lehman测试（GSWL），将顶点坐标引入颜色细化过程，用于几何单纯形复形的表达力分析，并结合欧拉特征变换（ECT）构建了几何感知消息传递网络的理论框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的WL测试及其单纯形扩展（SWL）仅能区分组合结构（如网格的连接性），但对几何信息（如顶点坐标/嵌入方式）完全"盲视"。即具有相同连接性但不同几何嵌入的网格无法被区分，需要引入几何感知的测试方法。

Method: 提出GSWL测试：将顶点坐标信息纳入颜色细化过程，适用于几何单纯形复形。理论上证明了：(i) 几何感知单纯形消息传递方案的表达力以GSWL为上界；(ii) 存在参数使得在任意有限几何单纯形复形族上，这些方案能与GSWL的区分能力匹配。同时结合欧拉特征变换（ECT）作为完整不变量，构建了近似框架。

Result: 通过合成数据集和网格数据集的实验验证了理论，展示出从纯组合模型到几何感知模型的清晰层次结构。

Conclusion: GSWL填补了图表达力理论中"几何盲视"的空白，为几何消息传递网络提供了理论界标和近似框架，实验验证了从组合到几何感知的层次优越性。

Abstract: The Weisfeiler--Lehman (WL) test and its simplicial extension (SWL) characterize the combinatorial expressivity of message passing networks, but they are blind to geometry, i.e., meshes with identical connectivity but different embeddings are indistinguishable. We introduce the Geometric Simplicial Weisfeiler--Lehman (GSWL) test, which incorporates vertex coordinates into color refinement for geometric simplicial complexes. In addition, we show that (i) the expressivity of geometry-aware simplicial message passing schemes is bounded above by GSWL, and (ii) that there exist parameters such that the discriminating power of GSWL is matched by these schemes on any fixed finite family of geometric simplicial complexes. Combined with the Euler Characteristic Transform (ECT), a complete invariant for geometric simplicial complexes, this yields a geometric expressivity characterization together with an approximation framework. Experiments on synthetic and mesh datasets serve to validate our theory, showing a clear hierarchy from combinatorial to geometry-aware models.

</details>


### [359] [Causal Reinforcement Learning for Complex Card Games: A Magic The Gathering Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06066)
*Cristiano da Costa Cunha,Ajmal Mian,Tim French,Wei Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MTG-Causal-RL基准，基于《万智牌》构建了一个融合因果结构、隐藏信息和大规模掩码动作空间的强化学习测试平台，并引入因果图因子优势PPO（CGFA-PPO）作为参考因果智能体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果强化学习缺乏同时包含序列决策、隐藏信息、大规模掩码动作空间和显式因果结构的复杂系统基准。

Method: 构建基于《万智牌》的Gymnasium基准，包含3077维部分观测、478维掩码离散动作空间、5种标准赛制套牌、3种奖励方案和手写结构因果模型（SCM）。提出CGFA-PPO，使用SCM中胜率概率的父节点作为因子对齐的评论家目标，并加入干预校准损失。

Result: Masked PPO和CGFA-PPO达到竞争性的分布内胜率并超过随机基线；每个因子的校准轨迹和留一法跨套牌迁移差距揭示了标量胜率无法单独诊断的结构性信息。

Conclusion: MTG-Causal-RL为因果RL、世界模型和LLM智能体研究提供了一个共享测试平台，支持掩码动作空间下的因果信用分配、跨套牌结构迁移和SCM驱动的策略可审计性。

Abstract: Causal reinforcement learning (RL) lacks benchmarks for complex systems that combine sequential decision making, hidden information, large masked action spaces, and explicit causal structure. We introduce MTG-Causal-RL, a Gymnasium benchmark built on Magic: The Gathering with a 3,077-dimensional partial observation, a 478-action masked discrete action space, five competitive Standard archetypes, three reward schemes, and a hand-specified Structural Causal Model (SCM) over strategic variables. Every episode exposes causal variables, SCM-predicted intervention effects, and per-factor credit traces, making causal credit assignment, leave-one-out cross-archetype transfer, and policy auditability first-class metrics. We adapt a panel of reference baselines: random, heuristic, masked PPO, a causal-world-model PPO variant, and an architecture-matched scalar control. We propose Causal Graph-Factored Advantage PPO (CGFA-PPO) as a reference causal agent that uses SCM parents of win probability as factor-aligned critic targets with an intervention-calibration loss. All comparisons use paired seeds, paired-bootstrap confidence intervals, and Holm-Bonferroni correction within pre-registered families. Masked PPO and CGFA-PPO reach competitive in-distribution win rates and exceed the random baseline; per-factor calibration trajectories and leave-one-out transfer gaps expose diagnostic structure that scalar win rate alone cannot. We release the benchmark, reference-baseline results, and full evaluation protocol openly. By coupling a strategically rich, partially observed domain with an explicit causal interface and statistical protocol, MTG-Causal-RL gives causal-RL, world-model, and LLM-agent research a shared testbed for questions current benchmarks cannot pose together: causal credit assignment under masked action spaces, structural transfer across archetypes, and SCM-grounded policy auditability.

</details>


### [360] [Normalized Architectures are Natively 4-Bit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06067)
*Maxim Fishman,Brian Chmiel,Ron Banner,Daniel Soudry,Boris Ginsburg*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了nGPT架构在4-bit低精度训练中的优势，发现其超球面约束能有效提升信号-噪声比，无需额外干预即可稳定训练，并在1.2B密集模型和高达30B参数的MoE模型上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型的4-bit精度训练对效率至关重要，但标准架构在低精度下需要复杂的干预（如随机Hadamard变换、逐张量缩放）来维持模型质量。本文旨在探索一种更鲁棒的架构方案，降低低精度训练的门槛和复杂性。

Method: 采用nGPT架构，将权重和隐藏表示约束在单位超球面上。通过对比标准架构与nGPT中点积的量化噪声特性，分析信号与噪声的累积行为差异。实验在1.2B密集模型和3B/30B参数的混合（Mamba-Transformer）MoE模型上进行NVFP4训练验证。

Result: nGPT在无需任何额外干预的条件下实现了稳定的端到端NVFP4训练。量化噪声在两种架构中均保持不相关，但nGPT的超球面约束增强了元素乘积的弱正相关性，使信号在隐藏维度上建设性地累积，而噪声继续平均化抵消，从而获得更高的有效信噪比和更平坦的损失景观。

Conclusion: nGPT架构对低精度算术具有内在鲁棒性，消除了传统低精度训练所需的复杂干预。这种优势随隐藏维度增大而增强，表明在大模型尺度下具有更大的潜力。

Abstract: Training large language models at 4-bit precision is critical for efficiency. We show that nGPT, an architecture that constrains weights and hidden representations to the unit hypersphere, is inherently more robust to low-precision arithmetic. This removes the need for interventions-such as applying random Hadamard transforms and performing per-tensor scaling calculations-to preserve model quality, and it enables stable end-to-end NVFP4 training. We validate this approach on both a 1.2B dense model and hybrid (Mamba-Transformer) MoE models of up to 3B/30B parameters. We trace this robustness to the dot product: while quantization noise remains largely uncorrelated in both standard and normalized architectures, the signal behaves differently. In nGPT, the hypersphere constraint enhances weak positive correlations among the element-wise products, leading to a constructive accumulation of the signal across the hidden dimension while the noise continues to average out. This yields a higher effective signal-to-noise ratio and a flatter loss landscape, with the effect strengthening as the hidden dimension grows, suggesting increasing advantages at scale. A reference implementation is available at https://github.com/anonymous452026/ngpt-nvfp4

</details>


### [361] [PRISM: Iterative Cross-Modal Posterior Refinement for Dynamic Text-Attributed Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06073)
*Trimble Chang,Yihang Liu,Mingjing Han,Han Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PRISM框架，通过迭代跨模态后验精炼，在动态文本属性图上实现语义与行为模态的渐进融合，提升时序链路预测等任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在DyTAG上采用刚性模态划分和一次性融合策略，无法捕捉节点语义与交互行为之间内在且演化的依赖关系。

Method: PRISM将信息组织为语义和行为两种模态，通过跨模态交互学习一个精炼轨迹，将语义先验逐步转换为行为条件化后验状态。

Result: 在DTGB基准数据集上，PRISM在时序链路预测和目标节点检索任务上取得强劲性能。

Conclusion: 消融实验验证了语义-行为建模与迭代后验精炼的有效性，表明PRISM能更好地捕捉DyTAG中的演化依赖。

Abstract: Dynamic text-attributed graphs (DyTAGs) provide a powerful framework for modeling evolving systems in which node semantics and time-dependent interactions are tightly coupled. Recently, multimodal learning has emerged as a promising yet underexplored direction for enhancing DyTAG representation learning. However, existing methods typically rely on rigid modality partitions and one-shot fusion strategies, which limit their ability to capture the intrinsic and evolving dependencies between node semantics and interaction behaviors. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{PRISM}, an iterative cross-modal posterior refinement framework for DyTAG representation learning. PRISM organizes DyTAG information into semantic and behavioral modalities, providing a more intrinsic alternative to carrier-level modality partitions. Instead of fusing the two modalities in a single step, PRISM learns a refinement trajectory that progressively transforms semantic priors into behavior-conditioned posterior states through cross-modal interaction with behavioral evidence. Extensive experiments on DTGB benchmark datasets show that PRISM achieves strong performance on temporal link prediction and destination node retrieval tasks. Further ablation studies validate the effectiveness of semantic--behavioral modeling and iterative posterior refinement.

</details>


### [362] [Understanding diffusion models requires rethinking (again) generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06077)
*Pierre Marion,Yu-Han Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文主张理解扩散模型的泛化需要全新的理论框架，指出扩散模型中记忆与泛化不相容，并呼吁研究重点应从"为什么不记忆"转向"预记忆阶段模型学到了什么"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有统计学习理论和良性过拟合范式无法解释扩散模型的泛化行为，扩散模型中记忆与泛化存在根本性不相容，而现有解释（容量限制、隐式正则化、架构归纳偏置）之间关系不明确。

Method: 在CIFAR-10上对扩散模型进行实证研究，将发现提炼为具体开放问题，并提出理论转向建议。

Result: 指出扩散模型的泛化理解需要从"解释为什么不记忆"转向"研究预记忆阶段学到了什么"。

Conclusion: 扩散模型的泛化需要全新的理论框架，关键在于理解模型在完全记忆训练数据之前的学习内容。

Abstract: This position paper argues that understanding generalization in diffusion models requires fundamentally new theoretical frameworks that go beyond both classical statistical learning theory and the benign overfitting paradigm developed for supervised learning. In diffusion models, unlike in supervised learning, memorization of training data and generalization to novel samples are incompatible: a model that has fully memorized its training set generates copies rather than novel data. Several theoretical explanations for why practical diffusion models nevertheless generalize have been proposed, based on capacity limitations, implicit regularization from optimization, or architectural inductive biases, but their interactions remain unclear. We argue that the field should pivot from explaining why the diffusion models do not memorize to investigating what the model actually learns during pre-memorization phase. To highlight our stance, we conduct empirical study of diffusion models trained on CIFAR-10, and we distill the findings into concrete open questions that we believe are key to improve understanding of generalization in diffusion models.

</details>


### [363] [Fast Gauss-Newton for Multiclass Cross-Entropy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06081)
*Mikalai Korbit,Mario Zanon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出快速高斯-牛顿法（FGN），将多分类softmax交叉熵的广义高斯-牛顿曲率分解为"真实vs其余"项和"内部竞争协方差"项，通过丢弃后者实现正定半定近似，并利用标量间隔表示实现高效矩阵自由共轭梯度求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多分类softmax交叉熵中，完整的广义高斯-牛顿（GGN）曲率通过softmax协方差耦合所有输出logits，导致曲率-向量积的计算随类别数增加难以扩展，亟需一种计算高效的近似方法。

Method: 将多分类GGN精确分解为"真实vs其余"项和"内部竞争协方差"项；FGN保留前者丢弃后者，得到正定半定下界近似；利用精确的标量间隔表示将损失和梯度保持不变，近似仅作用于曲率层；通过白化行空间系统将阻尼更新转化为每小批量样本一行的问题，并使用共轭梯度法无矩阵求解。

Result: 实验表明：当竞争类概率质量集中或阻尼较大时，FGN最接近完整softmax GGN；当丢弃的内部竞争协方差增长时，FGN与完整GGN的偏差增大。

Conclusion: FGN提供了一种高效且理论上可控的多分类GGN近似方法，其分解分析为理解近似误差来源提供了清晰视角，在二分类情况下是精确的，在类别数多的场景中具有实用价值。

Abstract: In multiclass softmax cross-entropy, the full generalized Gauss-Newton (GGN) curvature couples all output logits through the softmax covariance, making curvature-vector products harder to scale as the number of classes grows. We show that the standard multiclass GGN can be decomposed exactly into a true-vs-rest term and a positive semidefinite within-competitor covariance term. Fast Gauss-Newton (FGN) retains the first term and drops the second, yielding a positive semidefinite under-approximation of the multiclass GGN that is exact for binary classification. The derivation uses an exact true-vs-rest scalar-margin representation of softmax cross-entropy: the loss and gradient are unchanged, and the approximation enters only at the curvature level. Exploiting the FGN curvature structure, the damped update can be written as an equivalent whitened row-space system with one row per mini-batch example. We solve this system matrix-free by conjugate gradient using Jacobian-vector and vector-Jacobian products of the scalar margin map. Targeted mechanism experiments and an evaluation on a fixed-feature multiclass head support the predictions from the decomposition: FGN stays closest to the full softmax GGN when competitor mass is concentrated or damping is large, and deviates as the dropped within-competitor covariance grows.

</details>


### [364] [Beyond Autoregressive RTG: Conditioning via Injection Outside Sequential Modeling in Decision Transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06104)
*Yongyi Wang,Hanyu Liu,Lingfeng Li,Bozhou Chen,Ang Li,Qirui Zheng,Xionghui Yang,Chucai Wang,Wenxin Li*

Main category: cs.LG
